Peter - I often think about my father's journey to America. He arrived with just $1.75 in his pocket and a dream in his heart. It's a reminder that the American Dream is within reach, no matter where we start.

As I run for Governor of Virginia, I'm reminded of the power of small actions adding up to make a big difference. That's why I'm writing to ask for your help today.

_**If every person reading this email could give just $1.75, we would hit our major fundraising goal and be one step closer to winning this toss-up race.**_ It's a small ask, but it would make a huge impact.

You see, my father's story isn't just about him - it's about the opportunities that America provides. It's about the chance to build a better life, to work hard, and to succeed. And that's exactly what I'm fighting for.

As a Marine, a businesswoman, and a public servant, I've seen firsthand the positive impact that conservative policies can have on our communities. I've fought for education reform, economic growth, and individual freedom. _**And I'm just getting started.**_

[**So I'm asking you to join me in this fight. Will you give $1.75 today to help us reach our goal? It may seem like a small amount, but trust me, it will add up to make a big difference.**](http://links.conservativeum.com/s/c/og3RasQG99ujB-_WhAOfajhFDLyutr_tSuOwz_FfUBJxL9uPlVgGJYTsWtrnMdx199oyMcXqmwxqlLegZP1wnFQE8FyNUwNTzSk3ndYHuqVN2yzqK3zUAyiG2aBMy3Uqax9k9QT3_XGJVAYCoPGFM9hw8_vaiH3mn7BaWe-BxFnjkmNRqc7J4HxlWtS9bLsS_4ppQnpsZEJcF8ABhOM3sEnX_Cul0LrBqGrv59fnwYDSFogbKMZsRD1yjTaV-ShNo7ZcrXQ705951SAKRkAXK74ag9C8S6SVzB0Wcj2f0tRaADibVDerxmiHkNVXwtrBt6zbKgL0ySnRi-3Bsv85Kj2AEXsF1v15yujtMMOBAFEWh3q26scGNDAyLxTKtkmz-yKcpy91k65-bxfAYswmP00SKirHP3-OATdqg38Ql9U5DRYLT0QNsILY11EX-tH3yUzxppFEKq595Ca3wcTz7qGoLctjKoPOwBDsB6jb65Tv7j6eRUZCY7Syr2g0ZqPPupznU_Sva2wsYexdnsO4igQXpLl3_YEn4MRRx8uVnHpWXbABTpv2qmRnf1yleDCEDnuEAKPsM-FpYmvJQmWyBqHKo5-CyDqzOTGmH6g8QW0OCIc1S9sRfJPGj3dS_D1-ZuxZJrVvjPSukaCJO65fUg6FNBjsylmhAEw1V26SO2aoXeLA6R4gBmRqrkCrP9WZbrkVB2UGA2Y52i69TQkAu5MLZ5Isgd_q4jmBbcQrE0iKQawKQCwC7xI2Y77SfLi_QfLh-Lfpf87R0sJ0tOBVgE6K_725goiA-5mP0qEK46-7By4Yld7EYzrGZRrqNxep25bd9E2PWHtK2yrcVLSBSiOxTwSzLUPZVKOWNXvDLxcDMWrZpjKi4K-WZuAbSvqsjWVGEBkKCmV3n_U/J9xYNpvoJkG4jos36QMfiFVEUYz85Klu/9)

Lieutenant Governor. I'm Winsome Earle-Sears, and I've held many titles in my life. Each one hasn't been a cakewalk, but I like a challenge. I've tried to show my daughters that what you can accomplish is not decided by the color of your skin or where you were born.Sure, a silver spoon would've made it easier, but I've found a helping hand from your community means so much more. _**[That’s why I’m reaching out to you asking for a helping hand to propel me to a win in my race for Governor.](http://links.conservativeum.com/s/c/mm93hrv52McrKQ1Yo2lZiPzNolVH2ctk6KjcM9ZdC884vmXPUfGZ9RWGGCHn8EMryZfKGl8aQsL8cpnEIVR8_ZpGkQJEBsDhnv0iO3guowjEi2rdBcMFky2fkOjCFbPEFuzDL5MJ2mq6rWOPovausdJ8P55mxgBkOA2Z8Zt3ZvlaRVlQYbOwgCBOzfZFkqh4hBDRjqkBQyMCq4XXpC0EMlu1vxTsRl68az19dLiaW28cW4lmUIxbKV3dypbW8w4l7e4S9VvUdeV0oilV1Z-Jtrq7MmKuY6Hp5516CSSaaLS9B0tj76NhkWHCtH7cIcquWYkCVKmQPXfU1d451Z0pC0zT-RvNCYxY47CepmhOrE1gMpbkcZ0rv-Gipq7Q9zBFRmKSEDbADFjDjvLeEjWA-fYVVLusfmUUCGKGAaIFHrsFS66yGw4poFq0iFr3ktvUv44mq-YbU80abbOhIVVSo-x5t1ayp9ZHDxOLoOhfTlWfIoEUTcqWwC9nMIHYdnva84mVxl1XsFBGIfRF2fkUc5C8wQHX69849cb9J1Os-nsOAV3RJYWmKSqBYZMKzRroUbIn43THQ32JjSVcLpqYRQcykZTFUHQvP_ycmlcs5wcjz4FyDiV7DmTwLmKeJCaYJSS-emnMO4G4IFK8RFmY5NHgZEzNgxC4W0nV84RRMXPUE2UPC8u1eJ5tdE4iuzel7kMdpzdAoX8W5ufnhu2UnHkwpuGY8k287yE5NHpzag-sB3Xv-xALLxFLWG7nY-VV7woGOEz5X9LQYl79X-m_5ePfn3DWOdMekfZOwGmPlFGnPDOu1mCwV25-Ub08tW1xavIIqzGdeqfzitWBZMM3YOedoG2WQTZWPv8OPJCnubAkVFpm71EJst1pNSF26lXrECRb0F41KkN9xxCtbQ3rMkpe-q_r9om22Jtbo6ZWKGjihwXv2-oc0b8lGd5c93ZijGYPU1W4PVtGvebkZM8cHFrEqoVKGK3i5MIs/B6lxiQnkFBX_5ZhMNGobtdNY708DZLiA/9)**_ This will be another challenge, but with you on my side, I know I can do this.

clean_body: | | | | | | | Peter - I often think about my father's journey to America. He arrived with just $1.75 in his pocket and a dream in his heart. It's a reminder that the American Dream is within reach, no matter where we start. As I run for Governor of Virginia, I'm reminded of the power of small actions adding up to make a big difference. That's why I'm writing to ask for your help today. If every person reading this email could give just $1.75, we would hit our major fundraising goal and be one step closer to winning this toss-up race. It's a small ask, but it would make a huge impact. You see, my father's story isn't just about him - it's about the opportunities that America provides. It's about the chance to build a better life, to work hard, and to succeed. And that's exactly what I'm fighting for. As a Marine, a businesswoman, and a public servant, I've seen firsthand the positive impact that conservative policies can have on our communities. I've fought for education reform, economic growth, and individual freedom. And I'm just getting started. Together, we can keep the American Dream alive for our kids and grandkids. We can build a brighter future, and we can show the country what it means to lead with conservative values. Thank you for your support, and let's do this! Winsome Earle-Sears | Immigrant. Marine. Mom. Small Business Owner. Lieutenant Governor. I'm Winsome Earle-Sears, and I've held many titles in my life. Each one hasn't been a cakewalk, but I like a challenge. I've tried to show my daughters that what you can accomplish is not decided by the color of your skin or where you were born.Sure, a silver spoon would've made it easier, but I've found a helping hand from your community means so much more. This will be another challenge, but with you on my side, I know I can do this. | | | | Paid for by Winsome for Governor Military disclaimer: Neither military info nor photographs of Winsome Earle-Sears in uniform imply endorsement of Winsome Earle-Sears by the Department of Defense or its particular military departments. PO Box 71596 Richmond, VA 23255-1596 | | |

clean_body: He is using the chaos he has caused as pretext to give him the power to deploy the U.S. military in our communities. | | Peter, Donald Trump is deploying the U.S. military on American soil. His justification: growing protests against mass arrests being conducted by ICE in Los Angeles and communities around the country. | This moment is reminiscent of the infamous 1933 Reichstag Fire, the historical event that Adolf Hitler used as pretext to begin the dissolution of Germany's democracy. Now more than ever, we need our courts to step in - preventing Trump from seizing the unprecedented power to use the U.S. military on American streets to roundup US citizens. Trump knows the courts are the only thing keeping American democracy from collapsing - that is why he is launching an all out war on our judges by attempting to replace state supreme court judges with MAGA loyalists in key swing states around the country in upcoming elections - like 2025 PA 's Supreme Court retention race. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: In solidarity, Team Defend our Courts | Mail checks to: Defend Our Courts P.O. Box 45569 Philadelphia, PA 19149 | | | Sent via . To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from Defend our Courts PAC, please .

name: The Real Texas PAC
subject: Donald Trump’s criminal bestie is about to hand us a golden opportunity...
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-flipasenateseat?refcode=060725_4 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-flipasenateseat?refcode=060725_4]
Let’s not waste time: If we want to flip this Texas Senate seat, we need to start building our war chest right now .
👉 Chip in $10 or more to help us seize this once-in-a-generation opportunity » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-flipasenateseat?refcode=060725_4]
Here’s what’s happening:
Ken Paxton is leading John Cornyn in the Republican primary. Yes — that Ken Paxton. The indicted, impeached, Trump-worshipping extremist whose scandals could fill a book.
And if (more like when ) he becomes the GOP nominee, Texas Democrats will have a gift we’ve never had before:
→ A deeply unpopular, scandal-ridden MAGA lunatic
→ Tied at the hip to Trump’s collapsing regime
→ Running on a record of economic disaster and authoritarianism
While Republicans tear each other to shreds, Democrats have a clear path — if we’re bold enough to take it.
We need to ensure our Democratic nominee enters this race with strength, momentum, and serious resources. That starts with grassroots donors like you stepping up NOW — before the big money floods in to rescue Paxton. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-flipasenateseat?refcode=060725_4]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to The Real Texas PAC will go through immediately: DONATE $5 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-flipasenateseat?express_lane=true&refcode=060725_4&amount=5]

Make no mistake: This isn’t just about Texas. This is about the future of the Senate. The future of our economy. The future of our democracy.
Trump and Paxton want to burn it all down. We can stop them — if we start fighting back today . [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-flipasenateseat?refcode=060725_4]
Let’s go.
- The Real Texas PAC

Contributions or gifts to The Real Texas PAC are not tax deductible. Contributions from corporations, labor organizations, treasury funds, and federal government contractors are prohibited. Only U.S. citizens or legal permanent residents are eligible to contribute. An Individual can contribute up to $5,000 to The Real Texas PAC per calendar year. Married couples may together give a total of $10,000 per calendar year. Federal political action committees (PACs) can contribute up to $5,000 per calendar year. The first $5,000 contributed in a calendar year from federally permissible sources will be deposited in The Real Texas PAC's contribution account. Once a federally permissible source has contributed $5,000 in a calendar year, The Real Texas PAC will transfer any amounts in excess of $5,000 to its non-contribution account. All contributions from corporations and labor unions will be deposited in the non-contribution account. Please contact us at realtexas@mbacg.com if you would like a different allocation.

clean_body: [] Let’s not waste time: If we want to flip this Texas Senate seat, we need to start building our war chest right now . 👉 Chip in $10 or more to help us seize this once-in-a-generation opportunity » [] Here’s what’s happening: Ken Paxton is leading John Cornyn in the Republican primary. Yes — that Ken Paxton. The indicted, impeached, Trump-worshipping extremist whose scandals could fill a book. And if (more like when ) he becomes the GOP nominee, Texas Democrats will have a gift we’ve never had before: → A deeply unpopular, scandal-ridden MAGA lunatic → Tied at the hip to Trump’s collapsing regime → Running on a record of economic disaster and authoritarianism While Republicans tear each other to shreds, Democrats have a clear path — if we’re bold enough to take it. We need to ensure our Democratic nominee enters this race with strength, momentum, and serious resources. That starts with grassroots donors like you stepping up NOW — before the big money floods in to rescue Paxton. [] If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to The Real Texas PAC will go through immediately: DONATE $5 [] DONATE $10 [] DONATE $50 [] DONATE $100 [] DONATE $250 [] Other Amount [] Make no mistake: This isn’t just about Texas. This is about the future of the Senate. The future of our economy. The future of our democracy. Trump and Paxton want to burn it all down. We can stop them — if we start fighting back today . [] Let’s go. - The Real Texas PAC [] The Real Texas PAC 1150 N Loop 1604 W Ste 108-230 San Antonio, TX 78248 United States Contributions or gifts to The Real Texas PAC are not tax deductible. Contributions from corporations, labor organizations, treasury funds, and federal government contractors are prohibited. Only U.S. citizens or legal permanent residents are eligible to contribute. An Individual can contribute up to $5,000 to The Real Texas PAC per calendar year. Married couples may together give a total of $10,000 per calendar year. Federal political action committees (PACs) can contribute up to $5,000 per calendar year. The first $5,000 contributed in a calendar year from federally permissible sources will be deposited in The Real Texas PAC's contribution account. Once a federally permissible source has contributed $5,000 in a calendar year, The Real Texas PAC will transfer any amounts in excess of $5,000 to its non-contribution account. name: Mark Trammell
subject: No double standard under the Constitution
body:
This isn't just bullying -- it's racial and political discrimination, and the school participated in it.

| |
---
| |
---
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zke63lrts7haqtoemk1vigp0qc3bto9fpii6ts6o_rp22sh2s8i6eob4spjm6o76c9h2bs)
---
| | Dear Friend,What would you do if your child or grandchild was bullied in front of his classmates -- not just by other kids, but also by the school principal and teachers? That's what happened to Brooks Warden when he was in middle school in Austin, Texas.Over the course of three years, Brooks was taunted, threatened, and harassed by students and staff -- simply because he wore a MAGA hat on a field trip.And instead of stepping in to stop it, the teachers and administrators joined in**.** One teacher called him "Whitey" in class. His classmates regurgitated the media's lies about Trump supporters. Students called Brooks a "racist," a "Nazi," and even accused of being in the Ku Klux Klan. Another student beat up Brooks at school.Even the **principal** joined in by pulling earbuds out of Brooks’s ear and asking him if he was listening to "Dixie." This isn't just bullying -- it's racial and political discrimination, and the school participated in it.**[That's why the Center for American Liberty stepped in and is bringing Brooks Warden's fight for justice to the Supreme Court.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zqv4lr0c3ndn6tqvaek6fs5am4nk80u5ptj4khh0_rp22sh2s8i6eob4spjm6o76c9h2bs)** This wasn't just a single bad day...** _...it was three years of targeted abuse._** When the Warden family asked the school for help, they were ignored. So the Center for American Liberty stepped in. We filed a lawsuit on behalf of Brooks Warden against the Austin Independent School District, arguing that the school violated Title VI of the Civil Rights Act by allowing racially motivated harassment to go unchecked.But when the case went to federal court, the judge dismissed it -- claiming the bullying was "primarily political," and the racial discrimination Brooks suffered wasn't "severe or pervasive" enough.Think about that:A student was called “Whitey” by teacher, beaten up and bullied by his classmates, and publicly humiliated by a principal, and a federal court says it doesn't count because the politics were louder than the racism.We refused to accept that. We appealed to the Fifth Circuit Court of Appeals, which en banc split 9–9. Now, we've filed a petition for certiorari with the U.S. Supreme Court to make one thing absolutely clear:**Racial harassment in public schools is unconstitutional -- whether it targets a student who is white, Black, Hispanic, conservative, liberal, or anything else.** But Friend, taking a case to the Supreme Court is incredibly expensive. And we're up against a well-funded school district...The Center for American Liberty is a nonprofit. We don't take a dime of government funding. We rely entirely on generous patriots like you who believe no child should be harassed for their conservative beliefs or race. **[Will you chip in $35, $50, or even $100 to help us bring Brooks Warden's case to the highest court in the land?](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zm80fncalaa5llmc3t060nj2nvrl3pkreo2sr5bo_rp22sh2s8i6eob4spjm6o76c9h2bs)** We're not just fighting for Brooks -- we're fighting for every student whose rights have been ignored because they don't fit the Left's narrative.And we're fighting for every student, who like Brooks, wants to wear a MAGA hat to school without fear of being beaten up and discriminated against.This case could set a national precedent. Let's make sure the Supreme Court hears it loud and clear: **there is no double standard under the Constitution.** Thank you for standing with Brooks -- and with us.Sincerely,
---
| | **Mark Trammell **CEO, Center for American Liberty
---
| [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z96veq6ro4ra7uc50m1po6l9b8p076bmd8f9r5dg_rp22sh2s8i6eob4spjm6o76c9h2bs)
---
| | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z9g6amd8nguol2ta2q9v28nr8jea2a1ojh1367s0_rp22sh2s8i6eob4spjm6o76c9h2bs)
---
|
---
| | **Mark Trammell **Executive Director Center for American Liberty
---
|

subject: ENDORSING my friend Mike Rogers
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rogers for Senate
body:
Mike Rogers will be a champion for our America First agenda in the Senate.

| | | Friend who is as strong as a Detroit engine, cool as the Motown sound, and smarter than a Democrat senator? _My friend Mike Rogers, that’s who!_ **Mike is the Republican veteran who just announced he’s running for Michigan’s open U.S. Senate seat and I am proud to endorse him!**

name: Maud Maron
subject: New York has become a third-world hellscape!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MAUD FOR MANHATTAN
body:
The George Soros elected, Pro-Criminal, Trump-Deranged DEI hire that has turned my beloved New York City into a third-world Hellscape.

| | |
---
---
| | [](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zmn725gc75sstkch1rohr5bbonmt6kgad4p04968_rp22sh2s8i6eob4spjm6o76cph2bs)
---
| | My Dear Friend, [**My name is Maud Maron, and I need your help to defeat Alvin Bragg and replace him as the District Attorney of Manhattan.**](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zi2af9h53qs8bb77rk7tjjnlnup08043igd672ro_rp22sh2s8i6eob4spjm6o76cph2bs) You know Alvin... The George Soros elected, Pro-Criminal, Trump-Deranged DEI hire that has turned my beloved New York City into a third-world Hellscape.If you think that sounds too dramatic, just look at a few examples of what Alvin Bragg’s “weak-on-crime,” Trump-obsessed tenure has brought to the law-abiding citizens of New York:
---
* An innocent woman set on fire by a Guatemalan Illegal Alien who had already been deported at least once before...
* A mob of Illegal criminals caught on video assaulting two New York City Law Enforcement officers outside a “Migrant Shelter,” all **released without bail by Alvin Bragg!**

---
Instead of working for the last 4 years to make the Citizens of New York safe and secure, Alvin has been on a singular, sick, twisted mission and one mission only -- TAKE DOWN DONALD TRUMP.That’s what he ran on...Those were his marching orders from George Soros and his Radical donors...And those are orders he dutifully followed -- at the expense of not only those of us who live in New York, but every single American that deserved to vote in a fair election not tainted by a ridiculous set of trumped-up charges made up out of thin air.New Yorkers deserve better...Americans deserve better.That’s why -- whether you live right here in Manhattan, a thousand miles away in Des Moines, Iowa, or anywhere else in our great country -- I hope you’ll help me defeat Alvin Bragg. **[Would you consider helping my campaign with a one-time $28 contribution today?](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zeqfgrbt5k8dkb4n1t4qte1hnl7u7nmpohsmcm60_rp22sh2s8i6eob4spjm6o76cph2bs)** I could really use your help.Alvin Bragg has millions of dollars pouring into his campaign by the same Radicals who put him there the first time around...
---
* George Soros
* Hollywood Celebrities
* Elites right here in New York and Hollywood
* The deep pockets of the Democrat election machine

---
I don’t have any of that on my side -- but I hope I’ve got YOU on my side.To have any chance of beating the Democrat machine funding Alvin Bragg’s run for re-election, I need a nationwide army of Americans to rally by my side...A nationwide army of Americans who understand how toxic it is having a Radical like Alvin Bragg in charge of the criminal justice system of one of our largest cities...Who know how close Alvin Bragg came to knocking Donald Trump out of the 2024 Presidential election and what that would have done to our country... Who watched in disgust as Alvin Bragg conjured up a 34-count felony conviction against a man whose only real crime was trying to Make America Great Again!This is our chance to send a clear message not only to the people of New York -- but the nation -- that these Radicals put into place by George Soros to do his bidding are not invincible...That they CAN be defeated! Alvin Bragg is the perfect example of why I left the Democrat party.I think it all started when my 11-year-old got COVID... We were told to mask in the house and give my son meals in his room for 10 days. Instead, we cuddled up & watched TV together -- unmasked in the living room and ate our meals as a family at the dinner table. That was a watershed moment for me.What were we doing?When did the United States of America turn into a place where the Government told us how to live?When I dared to suggest that it may not be the best idea for biological boys to participate in girls’ sports, I was all but run out of town on a rail... Then I dared suggest that the complete failure of our school system might be due to something other than racism, I -- after a lifetime of considering myself a liberal Democrat -- was labeled a “Right Wing Extremist” by the New York Times!The blinders came off -- suddenly, I realized that if simply acknowledging the truth, calling out corruption and challenging the long-held beliefs of the Democrat machine disqualified me from being a Democrat.The truth will set you free -- and it’s an honor to represent you on the “Freedom Side” of the wall.I’ve been in their camp.As a former Democrat and as a mom raising four kids in Manhattan. I know how much they are getting wrong. And how bad it is for our children. **[That’s why I’m asking good folks like you to help me.](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zudo6sopm683kujpto0kdopa8jl15r6fr1ad8438_rp22sh2s8i6eob4spjm6o76cph2bs)** It’s going to take all of us to take down Alvin Bragg -- but this has been a season of political miracles!I humbly ask for your help today. I hope you’ll find it in your heart to send a one-time $28 contribution to help me pull off one more political miracle......and send Alvin Bragg back to obscurity where he belongs.He’s bad for New York...He’s bad for America...And he needs to go.One last favor...I know not everybody is going to be able to give that I write to today. **[So if you think you could spare a larger gift -- of $50, $100, $250, $500 or even $1,000 or more, a few of those would really help right now.](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zakhfgavo758b52b33870kfln2cmjpse9kd5gtvg_rp22sh2s8i6eob4spjm6o76cph2bs)** We need a good, strong launch -- and without a few of those larger gifts, we’ll already be behind.Please just send what you can, My Friend.Just reading my email today is a tremendous favor, and I really appreciate it.Thank you, Wish Me Luck, and God Bless You!
---
---
**Maud Maron**

P.S. I guess Alvin Bragg has just been too darn busy to concentrate on the wave of crime and violence washing over New York...While he has spent the last 4 years prosecuting and persecuting President Trump, New York has become a third-world hellscape!New York deserves better...Our Country deserves better...

Will you help me take the place of Alvin Bragg by supporting my campaign to become the District Attorney of Manhattan?**[If so, please rush a one-time gift of $28, $50, $100, $250, $500 or even $1,000 or more -- I could really use your help!](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zh828i76utcb85n0ii3iff5ecluabgbmitus2pq8_rp22sh2s8i6eob4spjm6o76cph2bs)**
---
|
---
| | PAID FOR BY MAUD FOR MANHATTAN
---

I guess Alvin Bragg has just been too darn busy to concentrate on the wave of crime and violence washing over New York...While he has spent the last 4 years prosecuting and persecuting President Trump, New York has become a third-world hellscape!New York deserves better...Our Country deserves better... Will you help me take the place of Alvin Bragg by supporting my campaign to become the District Attorney of Manhattan? | | | PAID FOR BY MAUD FOR MANHATTAN P.O. Box 274New York, NY 10013-0274 Pop Acta Media | Updates for Great Americans PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

name: AMAC Action
subject: President Trump only has 18 months.
body:
My friend, President Trump only has 18 months left until the midterm elections.

| |
---
| |
---
| |
---
[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zojgsperdbjoog1p0m5onqk0cfg1tr442s238j8o_rp22sh2s8i6eob4spjm6o76c9h2bs)
---
| | Dear Fellow Conservative, **[I’m writing to you today because I need your help to secure our elections once and for all and keep America on the path to greatness.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zt5558l96k13q3podpmlu4jcqonhe4uhig7852k0_rp22sh2s8i6eob4spjm6o76c9h2bs)** My friend, President Trump only has 18 months left until the midterm elections. **That’s 18 months to push through as much of his America First agenda as he can while we have a majority in the House and Senate.** I don’t mean to be pessimistic about our chances in the midterms. I’m just being a realist.Historically, the party not in the White House wins control of the House of Representatives in the midterms. That means, in just 18 months we could be right back where we started if young radicals like Hakeem Jeffries and Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez regain power and start blocking every one of our efforts. **[That’s why our election integrity efforts must be a priority right now._election integrity efforts_ must be a priority right now.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zlqp86o7knk2q39i91d833a5oclqilrg9vj8mk08_rp22sh2s8i6eob4spjm6o76c9h2bs)**_If we can’t get the SAVE Act through the Senate...__ _ _If we can’t cement President Trump’s “Preserving and Protecting the Integrity of American Elections” executive order through legislation...__ __If we can’t stop non-citizens from being counted towards the apportionment of congressional seats and electoral vote counts..._ ...the Left will be free to use every dirty trick in the book for the midterms in 2026, the presidential election in 2028... and beyond.[**AMAC Action, will never give up. But my friend, as a strong conservative senior, we NEED you right there beside us.**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zf4mvgl5mitavisrid8v6iu3vr6haqvc85uqvat8_rp22sh2s8i6eob4spjm6o76c9h2bs) My name is Rebecca Weber. I’m the chairwoman of AMAC Action. **AMAC Action****is****the most influential advocacy group in the country when it comes to standing for the values of conservative Seniors.** **We’ve got 72 chapters and 300 volunteer delegates, who are the “feet on the street” advocates who contact Members of Congress and state legislators in their district offices.****Moreover, our chapters and delegates help organize Town Hall meetings with elected officials and candidates to enable those locally of 2,000,000 AMAC members to meet, hear, and question them.** **And you should also know that we now have more than 337,000 AMAC members who respond to our “calls-to-action” and weigh in with members of the U.S. House and Senate, as well as their state legislators on the****is****sues.** Friend, with the support of patriotic seniors like you, in just the past few months AMAC Action has been able to:
---
** Hold 100 meetings with Congress -- this year alone! And send 40 Letters of Support on a variety of issues that are important to you including opposing benefits for non-citizens. ** Support President Trump’s executive order “Preserving and Protecting the Integrity of American Elections.” This order requires that all mail-in and absentee ballots be received by Election Day, directs the DOJ to enforce laws prohibiting noncitizen voting, and instructs federal agencies to maintain accurate voter rolls. ** Answer the call from Speaker Johnson to mobilize our supporters and get 7,000 messages sent to Congress to help get the SAVE Act passed in the House of Representatives. The SAVE Act ensures only American citizens vote in American elections.** Launch calls-to-action in individual states to stop illegal immigrants from voting. ** And unite thousands of Americans around our “BAN NONCITIZEN VOTING” petition drive that calls for an amendment to the United States Constitution that expressly forbids illegal aliens from voting and from being counted in the census that determines congressional seats and electoral votes.
---
All our work is made possible by brave AMAC Action patriots. But with the stakes higher than ever, we need every conservative freedom fighter standing with us.That means YOU, friend.**[That’s why I hope you’ll click this link to support AMAC Action during this critical time for your sacred vote.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z7pavlmc8scvg1o5fj2i8km8kr2spqtb0ofavgco_rp22sh2s8i6eob4spjm6o76c9h2bs)** We’ve got our work cut out for us as we fight to stop the 11.5 million illegals Joe Biden and Kamala Harris let into our country from:
---
* voting in our elections
* taking benefits reserved for you
* being counted the same as citizens when it comes to apportioning seats in the House of Representatives
* and being counted as citizens when it comes to giving states electoral votes.

---
Letting illegals change the balance of power in Congress and the electoral college means your vote may be fully **canceled out in all future elections**.The Left thinks they can pull a fast one on the American people.You, me and AMAC Action... we can’t let up for one minute. **[And that’s why I hope you’ll pledge your support for AMAC Action with your very best gift today.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z1ronhc7tn4qtot585rrt15c13ju27fka3k4tbio_rp22sh2s8i6eob4spjm6o76c9h2bs)** AMAC Action is taking every step possible to secure our elections because no matter what issue you care about the most – inflation, crime, the 2nd Amendment, Social Security and Medicare solvency, even the right to life......if you and I don’t have a vote... none of it matters. **[That’s what makes your best gift to AMAC Action so important today.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z9np8fh1j34vg4ciu4pk6qmdeojcr8ds9e8k6rrg_rp22sh2s8i6eob4spjm6o76c9h2bs)** So whatever critical amount you decide to return to help us secure our elections and your vote, please respond as soon as possible. We have an ambitious battle plan for the rest of the year—but first I must know that we have the resources to make it happen.I look forward to your response.
---
| | For Freedom,
---
**Rebecca Weber,_Chairwoman_****AMAC Action**
---
| [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zna69lq19f9nuvh8jtsdi29sjdeq2c45e6ueovoo_rp22sh2s8i6eob4spjm6o76c9h2bs)
---
| | P.S. [**To secure our elections and your vote once and for all please click this link or the button below to make your critical gift today.**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zn8l64mdvoamike0hdhm32pc7i3gob41u7a225f0_rp22sh2s8i6eob4spjm6o76c9h2bs) My friend, YOU are the difference between success and failure.
---

body:
I’ve seen what they’re capable of. That FBI raid? They treated me like a terrorist, all to protect their own. The lawsuits? A flood meant to drown me. But I’m still standing because this matters—because you deserve to know how they’re gaming you.

| [****](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zned8ec9adjvrj6qaosaiqv9os0el8djd3rhln8o_rp22sh2s8i6eob4spjm6o76c9h2bs)

I'm James O'Keefe, and I founded OMG (O'Keefe Media Group) to do what the mainstream won't: expose the powerful with raw, unfiltered truth. We caught IRS officials on hidden cameras, bragging about their AI overreach--how they're building a surveillance net to track your every dollar. _The Post Millennial_ called it "chilling," and X users said it's "the kind of journalism we've been starving for." That's OMG: no fluff, just facts, straight from the source.

But this work comes at a cost. I've been jailed on trumped-up charges, had my home raided by the FBI over Ashley Biden's diary, and faced endless lawsuits from the left. Why?

Because I won't stop. I don't have a personal life--just a relentless drive to uncover corruption. I've built OMG from the ground up to fight for people like you, [**and now we need**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z184ililrlr8vj5lrdhpeaddbgetseg54n70q638_rp22sh2s8i6eob4spjm6o76c9h2bs)**[**$64,600 by June**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zaouvnpm9bl1ujt2m1u8hn13a0fkdisll83k36ao_rp22sh2s8i6eob4spjm6o76c9h2bs)**[**to keep going. **People call OMG a "wrecking ball" against the establishment. **

When we dropped the IRS tapes, it wasn't just a story--it was a warning shot.

But fighting the system takes resources--cameras, lawyers, guts--and we're running low. [**Your support keeps us in the game, digging into the shadows the elites want hidden.**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z8l4um8nd38s92jecrm927cvel4cel8cf4pm72f0_rp22sh2s8i6eob4spjm6o76c9h2bs)

I've seen what they're capable of. That FBI raid? They treated me like a terrorist, all to protect their own. The lawsuits? A flood meant to drown me. But I'm still standing because this matters--because you deserve to know how they're gaming you.

OMG's got more exposes ready to drop, [**but**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zj7tolnjggc7o0qhsmtbq4a4cuvkdvjqg9u9v68g_rp22sh2s8i6eob4spjm6o76c9h2bs)**[**$64,600 by June**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zvqmsr9te5c0o4dpe1nmf631ecdjdl1k20hql7gg_rp22sh2s8i6eob4spjm6o76c9h2bs)**[**is our lifeline. Without it, we fade, and they win.**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zaui4huc1j4js30eieqjnrjgjkppaqp8lhklh5u0_rp22sh2s8i6eob4spjm6o76c9h2bs)

If you're sick of the lies, the cover-ups, the smug insiders laughing at us, then this is your fight too. [**Your donation today --$20, $100, whatever you can--fuels work the mainstream's too scared to touch**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zsrjkttn093u5308bervfnlcjoulspa1jd55mb5o_rp22sh2s8i6eob4spjm6o76c9h2bs).

I'm not here to play nice; I'm here to win. Thank you for considering this. **With you, we 're unstoppable.**

In Truth,
James O’Keefe

name: Karrin Taylor Robson
subject: URGENT: Hobbs Blocks Bill to STOP China
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY KARRIN FOR ARIZONA
body:
Hobbs just vetoed a bill to block China from buying Arizona land.

[](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zkq9rfgql7uger7fhalrvhe4f89f8bbpj7s67ud0_rp22sh2s8i6eob4spjm6o76c9h2bs "Karrin for Arizona")

**

Patriot,

**
We should be putting America **FIRST**. **NOT** the Chinese Communist Party.

But Katie Hobbs? **She has other plans.**

🚨 [This week, Hobbs **VETOED** a common-sense bill that would’ve **BLOCKED** foreign adversaries like Communist China from **buying up** Arizona land.](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z0rpupbpv6vqq8ch7iipu69e0f1kvoup8ks45pqo_rp22sh2s8i6eob4spjm6o76c9h2bs)

**Let that sink in.**

➡ The CCP is circling our farmland.
➡ They’re buying up land near military bases.
➡ And they’re embedding themselves deeper into our state’s economy.

And Hobbs just gave them the green light.

This isn’t leadership. This is a total failure of priorities.

Patriot—national security is **NON-NEGOTIABLE.**

Yet time after time, Hobbs chooses her radical donors, foreign interests, and D.C. elites over Arizona families.

First, she **VETOED** crucial election integrity legislation.

Now, she’s paving the way for the CCP to seize Arizona land.

I’ve had enough.

That’s why I’m running—to finally deliver **STRONG** leadership that puts Arizona **FIRST**.

✅ Secure our border
✅ Protect Arizona’s land from foreign adversaries
✅ Defend election integrity
✅ Grow jobs & rebuild our economy

But I cannot do this without YOU.

The Radical Left and their dark money allies have already poured **MILLIONS** into Arizona to keep Hobbs in power.

Now my primary is just around the corner, and the clock is ticking.

This is our moment to take Arizona back.

[**Will you stand with me and send a message that Arizona is NOT for sale?**](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zli5653em4a9f96h7d7f6ubrsk1la5flo1d2dgdo_rp22sh2s8i6eob4spjm6o76c9h2bs)

[RUSH A DONATION & HELP DEFEAT HOBBS](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zv3plee4v9uboeofj7s0rmnnepkrdq46m6rb0ht0_rp22sh2s8i6eob4spjm6o76c9h2bs)

Let’s show the Left that Arizona belongs to Arizonans, not the CCP.

For America & Arizona,
Karrin Taylor Robson
[](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2ztp2kdpijnauqrkvvn0bfostb53nd11j1s4c0h48_rp22sh2s8i6eob4spjm6o76c9h2bs)

---
| | Dear Friend,What would you do if your child or grandchild was bullied in front of his classmates -- not just by other kids, but also by the school principal and teachers? That's what happened to Brooks Warden when he was in middle school in Austin, Texas.Over the course of three years, Brooks was taunted, threatened, and harassed by students and staff -- simply because he wore a MAGA hat on a field trip.And instead of stepping in to stop it, the teachers and administrators joined in**.** One teacher called him "Whitey" in class. His classmates regurgitated the media's lies about Trump supporters. Students called Brooks a "racist," a "Nazi," and even accused of being in the Ku Klux Klan. Another student beat up Brooks at school.Even the **principal** joined in by pulling earbuds out of Brooks’s ear and asking him if he was listening to "Dixie." This isn't just bullying -- it's racial and political discrimination, and the school participated in it.**[That's why the Center for American Liberty stepped in and is bringing Brooks Warden's fight for justice to the Supreme Court.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zfhfonu3dbpv4q28r44qb0o09474dvqjevmivqm8_rp22sh2s8i6eob4spjm6o76c9h2bs)** This wasn't just a single bad day...** _...it was three years of targeted abuse._** When the Warden family asked the school for help, they were ignored. So the Center for American Liberty stepped in. We filed a lawsuit on behalf of Brooks Warden against the Austin Independent School District, arguing that the school violated Title VI of the Civil Rights Act by allowing racially motivated harassment to go unchecked.But when the case went to federal court, the judge dismissed it -- claiming the bullying was "primarily political," and the racial discrimination Brooks suffered wasn't "severe or pervasive" enough.Think about that:A student was called “Whitey” by teacher, beaten up and bullied by his classmates, and publicly humiliated by a principal, and a federal court says it doesn't count because the politics were louder than the racism.We refused to accept that. We appealed to the Fifth Circuit Court of Appeals, which en banc split 9–9. Now, we've filed a petition for certiorari with the U.S. Supreme Court to make one thing absolutely clear:**Racial harassment in public schools is unconstitutional -- whether it targets a student who is white, Black, Hispanic, conservative, liberal, or anything else.** But Friend, taking a case to the Supreme Court is incredibly expensive. And we're up against a well-funded school district...The Center for American Liberty is a nonprofit. We don't take a dime of government funding. We rely entirely on generous patriots like you who believe no child should be harassed for their conservative beliefs or race. **[Will you chip in $35, $50, or even $100 to help us bring Brooks Warden's case to the highest court in the land?](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zuqan91oob5lepkuboif1d5p1k2i2ca2u7cjp9eg_rp22sh2s8i6eob4spjm6o76c9h2bs)** We're not just fighting for Brooks -- we're fighting for every student whose rights have been ignored because they don't fit the Left's narrative.And we're fighting for every student, who like Brooks, wants to wear a MAGA hat to school without fear of being beaten up and discriminated against.This case could set a national precedent. Let's make sure the Supreme Court hears it loud and clear: **there is no double standard under the Constitution.** Thank you for standing with Brooks -- and with us.Sincerely,
---
| | **Mark Trammell **CEO, Center for American Liberty

name: James O'Keefe
subject: Meet the Man the Elites Fear
body:
I’ve seen what they’re capable of. That FBI raid? They treated me like a terrorist, all to protect their own. The lawsuits? A flood meant to drown me. But I’m still standing because this matters—because you deserve to know how they’re gaming you.

| [****](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zfmiq63ckdttiefet15al8juh9fs3qh44q48bh8g_rp22sh2s8i6eob4spjmepr6cjh2bs)
[****](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z8tlje070v05icia6bu2smgtp98fa0usudvtdlvo_rp22sh2s8i6eob4spjmepr6cjh2bs) Dear Patriot,

I'm James O'Keefe, and I founded OMG (O'Keefe Media Group) to do what the mainstream won't: expose the powerful with raw, unfiltered truth. We caught IRS officials on hidden cameras, bragging about their AI overreach--how they're building a surveillance net to track your every dollar. _The Post Millennial_ called it "chilling," and X users said it's "the kind of journalism we've been starving for." That's OMG: no fluff, just facts, straight from the source.

But this work comes at a cost. I've been jailed on trumped-up charges, had my home raided by the FBI over Ashley Biden's diary, and faced endless lawsuits from the left. Why?

Because I won't stop. I don't have a personal life--just a relentless drive to uncover corruption. I've built OMG from the ground up to fight for people like you, [**and now we need**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zrkisf7d8kq7hq4urc7r9br07bsafej7qes8g640_rp22sh2s8i6eob4spjmepr6cjh2bs)**[**$64,600 by June**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zpdq3jmgbrk42hrbbl99fmlrt4g9g1lo7smarcrg_rp22sh2s8i6eob4spjmepr6cjh2bs)**[**to keep going. Will you join us?**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zbp1ovbbs2n9t20epqoas9mik0urqbcelfff43jg_rp22sh2s8i6eob4spjmepr6cjh2bs)

**People call OMG a "wrecking ball" against the establishment. **

When we dropped the IRS tapes, it wasn't just a story--it was a warning shot.

Supporters say we're "rewriting the rules of journalism," while critics whine we're "too aggressive." Good. **The truth isn 't polite**.

But fighting the system takes resources--cameras, lawyers, guts--and we're running low. [**Your support keeps us in the game, digging into the shadows the elites want hidden.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2za0mqg37gi2gr1j7k03nnhrqilnloqk3vig8gubo_rp22sh2s8i6eob4spjmepr6cjh2bs)

I've seen what they're capable of. That FBI raid? They treated me like a terrorist, all to protect their own. The lawsuits? A flood meant to drown me. But I'm still standing because this matters--because you deserve to know how they're gaming you.

OMG's got more exposes ready to drop, [**but**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z1r460rrphjrlh1s5v052iarde6nqhrh9ofukqig_rp22sh2s8i6eob4spjmepr6cjh2bs)**[**$64,600 by June**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zkfdgomcds1s1ldgk51sdra66gr15d1ncgt3kvh8_rp22sh2s8i6eob4spjmepr6cjh2bs)**[**is our lifeline. Without it, we fade, and they win.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zpee0d7nk6cqi52kn1f363pfd5v94cd81u51tbu8_rp22sh2s8i6eob4spjmepr6cjh2bs)

If you're sick of the lies, the cover-ups, the smug insiders laughing at us, then this is your fight too. [**Your donation today --$20, $100, whatever you can--fuels work the mainstream's too scared to touch**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zd5fqtv7onncv7t942e1ug3ufab9gr21g7l3o0u0_rp22sh2s8i6eob4spjmepr6cjh2bs).

I'm not here to play nice; I'm here to win. Thank you for considering this. **With you, we 're unstoppable.**

In Truth,
James O’Keefe
Founder and CEO
O'Keefe Media Group

body:
Hobbs just vetoed a bill to block China from buying Arizona land.

[](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zi55ck4b2uenqel0anntpq7hr425tsabruqmuq1o_rp22sh2s8i6eob4spjmepr6cjh2bs "Karrin for Arizona")

**

Patriot,

**
We should be putting America **FIRST**. **NOT** the Chinese Communist Party.

But Katie Hobbs? **She has other plans.**

🚨 [This week, Hobbs **VETOED** a common-sense bill that would’ve **BLOCKED** foreign adversaries like Communist China from **buying up** Arizona land.](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zr2i321er3abk4e5lctok4u10tho5kd1nu6nib5o_rp22sh2s8i6eob4spjmepr6cjh2bs)

**Let that sink in.**

➡ The CCP is circling our farmland.
➡ They’re buying up land near military bases.
➡ And they’re embedding themselves deeper into our state’s economy.

And Hobbs just gave them the green light.

This isn’t leadership. This is a total failure of priorities.

Patriot—national security is **NON-NEGOTIABLE.**

Yet time after time, Hobbs chooses her radical donors, foreign interests, and D.C. elites over Arizona families.

First, she **VETOED** crucial election integrity legislation.

Now, she’s paving the way for the CCP to seize Arizona land.

I’ve had enough.

That’s why I’m running—to finally deliver **STRONG** leadership that puts Arizona **FIRST**.

✅ Secure our border
✅ Protect Arizona’s land from foreign adversaries
✅ Defend election integrity
✅ Grow jobs & rebuild our economy

But I cannot do this without YOU.

The Radical Left and their dark money allies have already poured **MILLIONS** into Arizona to keep Hobbs in power.

Now my primary is just around the corner, and the clock is ticking.

This is our moment to take Arizona back.

[**Will you stand with me and send a message that Arizona is NOT for sale?**](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2z5co30hasaourcok886geeojmquppjso9bd6qbfo_rp22sh2s8i6eob4spjmepr6cjh2bs)

Let’s show the Left that Arizona belongs to Arizonans, not the CCP.

For America & Arizona,
Karrin Taylor Robson

name: Vitality Now on Behalf of Your America News
subject: When you sleep but still feel tired...here's why
body:
If you’re constantly feeling groggy, tired and totally sapped of energy when you need it the most...

Hi Friend,
If you’re constantly feeling **groggy, tired and totally sapped of energy** when you need it the most...
It’s likely you suffer from **Non-Restorative Sleep, or NRS**.
[**[Dr. Sam Report: Defeating NRS WITHOUT Dangerous Sedatives Or Melatonin]**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zsu9g40bgb554b5nuniti8efkqa15abfh8pqbm4g_rp22sh2s8i6eob4spge0ob2c9h2bs)
NRS affects millions of Americans every night... Yet most folks don’t even know what it is.
It’s categorized as sleep that **doesn’t allow you to wake up feeling refreshed and re-energized** , but rather fatigued and exhausted as if you hadn’t slept at all...
Even if you slept **a full eight hours** or more...
Poor sleep can absolutely **RUIN your health and quality of life**... Even if you live a very healthy lifestyle otherwise.
Because **you can’t make up for poor sleep** with good nutrition or exercise... no matter how hard you try.
And when you let NRS take over your life and you don’t address it, you’ll see its side effects everywhere you look:
* You become **mentally weaker**
* You’re less concerned about **losing money**
* You have **less empathy**
* You’re **less attractive**

The good news is, there’s a [**simple, ten-second trick**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zl81jv7gjf8fuittnrqtde6vekrfdmfo1cbafpgo_rp22sh2s8i6eob4spge0ob2c9h2bs) you can start doing tonight that will give you the **best night’s sleep of your life...**
And allow you to **wake up feeling totally refreshed and ready to take on the day**... no more groggy, unfocused mornings...
I outline it all in my shocking new report...
Because it is possible for normal folks to defeat NRS for good and **sleep like kings and queens** , with just this one little tweak to their night time routine...
[**Video: Get The Best Sleep Of Your Life Tonight [Try This Simple Sleep Trick] << **](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z43ddr006l07esub32r1skclmlmsh4ltr3f9p6q0_rp22sh2s8i6eob4spge0ob2c9h2bs)
**If you’re tired of being tired** , this report is CRUCIAL to your health.
God Bless,
Dr. Sam Walters
**P.S.** Did you know that almost **HALF of all Americans say they feel sleepy during the day** _between 3 and 7 days a week?_
That’s according to the Centers for Disease Control.
Now, before you jet out to the nearest drugstore to buy a popular sedative or sleeping pill, you should know the truth...
Which is, **sedative-style sleep aids do NOTHING to help defeat Non-Restorative Sleep.**
And that’s why millions of Americans STILL suffer with it, no matter how long they try to fight it with sedatives.
[**> > Discover the TRUTH about sedative sleep aids like melatonin and how they actually HURT your sleep quality
\-- and the ten-second ritual that can help you sleep like royalty and wake up totally rejuvenated**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zerhbsbuosd40c32k1dofid0ug7amc6epkir2i2o_rp22sh2s8i6eob4spge0ob2c9h2bs)

name: Hillsdale College via American Action News
subject: The greatest armed conflict in human history
body:
This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict

This sponsored message from American Action News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z9gfjfn9ivr98mciirs4c1e3c0pd21nocdfhucmg_rp22sh2s8i6eob4spge8pj6cph2bs) Dear Fellow American,
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important.
To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course called **“The Second World Wars.”**
**Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson** , this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zpqto0hb5a5daenap2ikc3kbbibvctdebd898d8g_rp22sh2s8i6eob4spge8pj6cph2bs) If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.
Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of **“The Second World Wars”** on DVD:
**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zoe6k7bn5vs4r3dbb2juavjpdbe6keep14bt58e8_rp22sh2s8i6eob4spge8pj6cph2bs)**
Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College!
Best regards,
Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D. Executive Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College
P.S. The **“The Second World Wars”** DVD set is great as a homeschool curriculum or for independent study. Plus, it makes a perfect gift for anyone who wants to know more about the Second World War. **[Reserve your copy now.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zt500n33j3urho1lhhccgpmeea193ehkibnmp5o0_rp22sh2s8i6eob4spge8pj6cph2bs)**

body:
Hobbs just vetoed a bill to block China from buying Arizona land.

**

Patriot,

**
We should be putting America **FIRST**. **NOT** the Chinese Communist Party.

But Katie Hobbs? **She has other plans.**

🚨 [This week, Hobbs **VETOED** a common-sense bill that would’ve **BLOCKED** foreign adversaries like Communist China from **buying up** Arizona land.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z7jn3mmdcp74j6nkvtfhhuajns4po8bdk71g0ddo_rp22sh2s8i6eob4spge2p76c3h2bs)

**Let that sink in.**

➡ The CCP is circling our farmland.
➡ They’re buying up land near military bases.
➡ And they’re embedding themselves deeper into our state’s economy.

And Hobbs just gave them the green light.

This isn’t leadership. This is a total failure of priorities.

Patriot—national security is **NON-NEGOTIABLE.**

Yet time after time, Hobbs chooses her radical donors, foreign interests, and D.C. elites over Arizona families.

First, she **VETOED** crucial election integrity legislation.

Now, she’s paving the way for the CCP to seize Arizona land.

I’ve had enough.

That’s why I’m running—to finally deliver **STRONG** leadership that puts Arizona **FIRST**.

✅ Secure our border
✅ Protect Arizona’s land from foreign adversaries
✅ Defend election integrity
✅ Grow jobs & rebuild our economy

But I cannot do this without YOU.

The Radical Left and their dark money allies have already poured **MILLIONS** into Arizona to keep Hobbs in power.

Now my primary is just around the corner, and the clock is ticking.

This is our moment to take Arizona back.

[**Will you stand with me and send a message that Arizona is NOT for sale?**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zarbdkmoe1bcddb0udfsrr30ma78louiba7qv838_rp22sh2s8i6eob4spge2p76c3h2bs)

Let’s show the Left that Arizona belongs to Arizonans, not the CCP.

For America & Arizona,
Karrin Taylor Robson

Hello, and thank you for taking the time to read this email. This message is part of an ongoing conversation between us, and I want to take a moment to ensure you have full transparency about why you received this message, how your information is handled, and what to expect from future emails. Why You’re Receiving This Email You’re receiving this email because at some point, you opted in to receive updates, news, or information on a specific topic we’ve previously discussed or shared. Whether it was through a subscription, a form submission, or another form of communication, your information was shared willingly, and we respect your decision to connect with us. If you’re wondering about the nature of our correspondence, rest assured that we aim to keep all emails relevant, timely, and free from unnecessary clutter. This includes respecting your inbox and refraining from sending irrelevant messages. Your Privacy is Important We value your trust and take your privacy very seriously. The information you provide is securely stored and never shared, sold, or used outside the purpose for which you provided it. If you ever want to review how we handle your data, feel free to contact us directly. Transparency is our priority, and we’re happy to address any questions you might have. You are always in control of the information you share. If you feel that any part of your subscription or interaction needs clarification, let us know. We’re here to provide accurate answers and ensure your satisfaction. How to Unsubscribe or Manage Your Preferences We understand that everyone’s inbox is different. If you ever find our emails no longer relevant, there’s no hard feelings. You can easily manage your email preferences or unsubscribe using the link provided below. By clicking the unsubscribe link, you’ll be taken to a page where you can either adjust your communication preferences (such as receiving fewer emails or only on specific topics) or completely remove yourself from our list. The process is straightforward, and any changes will take effect promptly. We don’t use tricks or gimmicks to keep you subscribed. Our priority is to ensure that our emails add value to your day, and if they don’t, we respect your decision to part ways. Accessibility and Communication If you have any trouble accessing the unsubscribe page, managing preferences, or understanding why you’re receiving this email, you can reach out directly to our support team at info@commonsenseclub.org. We aim to provide a response within a reasonable time frame and address your concerns effectively. Our communication is designed to be as inclusive as possible, but we know there’s always room for improvement. If you have any feedback on how we can make our emails more accessible or relevant, please don’t hesitate to share. A Commitment to Non-Intrusive Emails We aim to create a non-intrusive communication experience. This means we won’t overwhelm your inbox with excessive messages, and we work hard to ensure our content remains clear and concise. The purpose of this email is to stay connected with you and provide updates or information that we believe is meaningful. If we ever fail to meet these standards, we encourage you to let us know. Feedback, whether positive or constructive, is always appreciated. Your thoughts help us understand how we can do better and improve our communication approach. While we cannot guarantee every suggestion will be implemented, we will take the time to carefully review and consider your input. 165 Route 35
Red Bank, New Jersey, 07701 We strive to ensure all communication channels are open and readily available to you. Whether it’s a question, comment, or concern, our team is ready to assist. Legal Information We comply with all applicable laws and regulations regarding email communication. This includes adhering to anti-spam laws and maintaining the highest standards for consent-based communication. Your trust matters, and we work diligently to ensure every email you receive meets these requirements. If you need further clarification on our compliance policies or legal obligations, please feel free to ask. Transparency and accountability are central to our communication strategy, and we’re happy to provide additional details if needed. A Final Note Emails are one of the many ways we stay connected, but we understand they aren’t perfect for everyone. If there’s another way you’d prefer to communicate or stay updated, let us know. Whether it’s through social media, a direct call, or another channel, we’re open to finding the most effective way to share information with you. We want to emphasize that our goal is never to disrupt or clutter your inbox. Every email sent is intended to provide value, and we genuinely appreciate your time and attention. name: Vitality Now on Behalf of Updates For Great Americans
subject: When you sleep but still feel tired...here's why
body:
If you’re constantly feeling groggy, tired and totally sapped of energy when you need it the most...

Hi Friend,
If you’re constantly feeling **groggy, tired and totally sapped of energy** when you need it the most...
It’s likely you suffer from **Non-Restorative Sleep, or NRS**.
[**[Dr. Sam Report: Defeating NRS WITHOUT Dangerous Sedatives Or Melatonin]**](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zd3b4gidpork3bvs2mbi2fvsvdof4m3u8kt79aig_rp22sh2s8i6eob4spgeeor4cth2bs)
NRS affects millions of Americans every night... Yet most folks don’t even know what it is.
It’s categorized as sleep that **doesn’t allow you to wake up feeling refreshed and re-energized** , but rather fatigued and exhausted as if you hadn’t slept at all...
Even if you slept **a full eight hours** or more...
Poor sleep can absolutely **RUIN your health and quality of life**... Even if you live a very healthy lifestyle otherwise.
Because **you can’t make up for poor sleep** with good nutrition or exercise... no matter how hard you try.
And when you let NRS take over your life and you don’t address it, you’ll see its side effects everywhere you look:
* You become **mentally weaker**
* You’re less concerned about **losing money**
* You have **less empathy**
* You’re **less attractive**

The good news is, there’s a [**simple, ten-second trick**](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z26sfsf8tpr68h1c9co8k5a1strd6a8le1eogsto_rp22sh2s8i6eob4spgeeor4cth2bs) you can start doing tonight that will give you the **best night’s sleep of your life...**
And allow you to **wake up feeling totally refreshed and ready to take on the day**... no more groggy, unfocused mornings...
I outline it all in my shocking new report...
Because it is possible for normal folks to defeat NRS for good and **sleep like kings and queens** , with just this one little tweak to their night time routine...
[**Video: Get The Best Sleep Of Your Life Tonight [Try This Simple Sleep Trick] << **](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zvem8gfsgaqchv6ppbi5fh34378fd5dvh8arrqg0_rp22sh2s8i6eob4spgeeor4cth2bs)
**If you’re tired of being tired** , this report is CRUCIAL to your health.
God Bless,
Dr. Sam Walters
**P.S.** Did you know that almost **HALF of all Americans say they feel sleepy during the day** _between 3 and 7 days a week?_
That’s according to the Centers for Disease Control.
Now, before you jet out to the nearest drugstore to buy a popular sedative or sleeping pill, you should know the truth...
Which is, **sedative-style sleep aids do NOTHING to help defeat Non-Restorative Sleep.**
And that’s why millions of Americans STILL suffer with it, no matter how long they try to fight it with sedatives.
[**> > Discover the TRUTH about sedative sleep aids like melatonin and how they actually HURT your sleep quality
\-- and the ten-second ritual that can help you sleep like royalty and wake up totally rejuvenated**](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zca3k7ugohah6a6c6a691fkqldoe5rsbpsnthtq0_rp22sh2s8i6eob4spgeeor4cth2bs)

Pop Acta Media | Updates for Great Americans
---
_PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522_

Protests [began Friday](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkDHOnTAQhE9jOj8ZY2MoXKSh-9OmRIu9wEYGI3vz0Lt9RHKEv5piRqOZ79fX_AWU6Nx-woGe1zyfeNeEzFhmCniVzFi5Yg2QgPEPw0511kpbqXqphjkCpc9smuhXRI1dg751Zuyc0842u9cYoh5cZ1uIVik7gl0AIw7t0I0OsCH_tKleDa1SzprXk1l6g8aExa4LCKMwEufy-p3p5B3X9MlvLK-Qjyb5nfmqovsh9CT0BEtwjyH0dOXKj_y_gKXKA0rYZcz3yfk-ZcpVwrlhwiopoKTjoK0AUz5lAYpVBuKP0FPb90PrRiP01BQfr5tSoto7YdR2AKV_S_hb-N5e_w0AAP__hY6Ffw) when hundreds rallied in downtown Los Angeles to protest ICE immigration raids at three city locations earlier that day. Demonstrations [escalated Saturday](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0LFutDAQBOCnMZ2Rz9gYFy7-hu7-NiVazHI4WjDCe0fu7SMi5QlSjzSjbz7uwx0Spe3xH1YMPOdhw7MQMuMxpIj7kRkLFywRCBifDEsqg1baStVK1Q0TJHoPpprCjKixqTDcnPGNc9rZagnGxxZmZ7ometTGxnZstB87uPnRR7RVClebalV3U8pZUyvrYWwNGhNHO48gjMIpcT7qz5w2XnCmd37hUce8VhQW5r2I5p_QvdD9eZ71nL8IrlTo_uII3e9wwJqfG0vKRcL2QMIiU0T5K5QTvKWujjDtZyJKpXXCqMcKiX6G-E_vvIL-DgAA__9OZ3rl) as protesters set cars on fire and hurled rocks at border patrol agents, prompting the Trump administration to deploy the National Guard.
## SCOTUS Ruling Gives DOGE Win
The Supreme Court [handed the Trump administration a victory](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGOpDAQRL8GMo-MsQ0OHFwy2Vx6IWpMe-hbg5HdzGj-fsX-woalkkr13r_H9ABKtD__woaeY552fNeEzFgmCniUzFi5Yg2QgPFkWKlOSiojpBVynBag9Jl0u_iIqLBv0XeDdv0wqMG0qzd9iDAaZ2ftjJYj2AW63lkDi7NhDi35a01aOXZSDkbfpHEwW41ah9nEGRotcSHO5fY_084rxvTJLyy3kLc2-ZX5qE3_p1H3Rt3huACu6gqFKSRs1H3JTxQ1B4IkKoazEH8El3M7BKa8i-2sX8K52Ec1dp3REWV0HVqwaDs1xxHdDG3xy_GmlKjaodHyuQGlnxf8K3Uvr74DAAD__8tfgvc) on Friday, giving DOGE access to Social Security Administration (SSA) systems containing personal data on millions of Americans. The administration says it needs the access to carry out its mission of targeting waste in the federal government. The [data it seeks includes](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGOpDAQRL8GMiNjbAOBg0vI5tILUWM3Q98ZjOxm0Pz9aTbcdMNSSaV6789jfgBFOp6_YUfHa5oPvEtEZswzeTxzYixcsHiIwHgxbFRmJZUR0go5zAEovmddB7ciKuxqdG2vx67vVW_qzflh7cBLDaBx6YJZlRzbAUYdbLtY09XkPmvSyqGVsje6kWaExWrU2i9mXaDSEgNxys3fRAdvuMZ3emFufNrr6Dbms1Tdr0pNlZru-26OxX8oPn2lpjNFYvKlUlO5zow7Cp-uzN-z4HztpwjpiaIkTxBFQX9l4rcIwCDAeyxFYEyH2K_yT2R_gJLWtKbOLpw3xUjF9pWWzx0ofv3jH0l9OfU_AAD__3CUj0Q) Social Security numbers, medical records, and tax and banking information. _“We conclude that, under the present circumstances, SSA may proceed to afford members of the SSA DOGE Team access to the agency records in question in order for those members to do their work,”_ the court said in an unsigned order. The [Social Security Administration](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykULuOpDAQ_BqTgXqMwRA4uMTZXHohauxm8MmMkd0M4u9XrLRfsEmpglK9_j2nJ4YY3q-_uJHhJU1vOkskZspTcLTnxFS4UHEYkelgXEOZJMiuhr6GYfIY4jWpypuFSFJbkXloNbZaS91Vq3GzU0TgYYaxHf2scJQdzn5se-28d1Uwtxv0MDwAdKca6Eace0VKublbZhQKyAdOufmfwptXWuKVPpQbl7YqmpV5L6L9I6QV0p7n2RwFOXm8boGQtnDKl5D2Xiak3VMMHNxN72AhLfQ_UI4900a1S0fm2qcX1SW5gLEu5I4c-Ko9Mgpph7YbdT9oAC2krbLx-xliDKXXQsFrwxC_-_GvTv0Y-RUAAP__gMmK4g) oversees Social Security benefits for retirees and disabled people and helps administer programs run by other agencies, including Medicare and Medicaid.
## Gauff Upsets Sabalenka for French Open
In a battle of the top tennis players in the world, [No. 2 Coco Gauff](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGO3CAQQL8Gd6y4MRi7oEhDd2lTWmM8rElYsGDuLP99tPmF1E96enq_PtdPTDmV5098keNY10JXz8RMbU2BzlaZOnfqATMyfTEeqa-gwEg1STWvO6Z8r3rYXSQCGgdyH1Yvo7VgzXA4XCDOoMZFhRnsFmMwCkIwOOtlp3kcknvb1KTmD6Ws0Q9lFtwmTVqHzcQNhVa0J67t8bumwgfFfNdvao9QX0N2B_PZxfhDgBfgr-t6UD_LGwrwTKWkLsB3ru0W4FcBPu0CvDbaKgVWgA81VPnErxgl17NLbHdB2XHDTOUPylF24i6vVGRsVMIh60llaG4_r5Rz6pMVWj1fmPK_Jv6vkd8O_gYAAP__jJSHvQ) defeated top-ranked Aryna Sabalenka 6-7 (5), 6-2, 6-4 to win the French Open final on Saturday. Gauff's win makes her [the first American woman](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkrtuwzgURL9G7miQEvVgocKOX4jjIHaSzaMRKOpKokOTBnllRfn6RVJuu-1gZppz3g7VQWqjbfcoL1Bi6yoLYzCACL7SCq7eIQQMEJQ0EmFA2etQxTROCc0ILapGajNVfNaULUAMyQxKlnOR5Hmcp7O-pG3GclUkvGGCK1bLJKfAi5qJJoekyWa6_H2jGS0YpXnK5zQVss44cK7qtK1lxCk0Gp2fn5222ENrJncDP1fuMjNlj3gNUbKI4k0Ub8LVeQzzSfbO_RaieINgrQ5RvDH6BlG8aT1Y1RN3BUtGdwEbSKutNEQ55Ugnh7YlbkAjAwYi_WQlCbKWBuyXJOjIqC1ptQ9IUKMBIpF4Z6RtSCe9d4GwmFJWCJbNe7yYKNl0g1JusAg-SlYsirNuUFB5aMH7v0zuTlTtDtnDJH7UVkzN7jDA28bVcTF8xAIfxv-OqqC7KFktjovFYnVTbcdeP3_QLk_7b9iu-Omx3r6q-9bt617IYTde1_aHH5dPAh-YuG_Hl5SpYZtgdb5k6Tp5fv-nXpuC3Y_5QZ2_xyUp1j3t96vXx4rDEZ737-6EPIz9HQNxt_58Eb20-niYTkIN0_sLCYX7OF_cWdy5L3fcXie9rBdbkm5dMkxySteZfkqGmS-b66iN0SHLI067i9TmDyT-L_tuZfxvAAAA__-Vp_Lq) to take the French Open title in a decade after Serena Williams defeated Maria Sharapova in 2015. It is the second major title for the 21-year-old, who won the 2023 U.S. Open. It marked the first time she has beaten the No. 1 player in the world in a major after four previous losses.

Demonstrations as protesters set cars on fire and hurled rocks at border patrol agents, prompting the Trump administration to deploy the National Guard. SCOTUS Ruling Gives DOGE Win The Supreme Court on Friday, giving DOGE access to Social Security Administration (SSA) systems containing personal data on millions of Americans. The administration says it needs the access to carry out its mission of targeting waste in the federal government. The Social Security numbers, medical records, and tax and banking information. “We conclude that, under the present circumstances, SSA may proceed to afford members of the SSA DOGE Team access to the agency records in question in order for those members to do their work,” the court said in an unsigned order. The oversees Social Security benefits for retirees and disabled people and helps administer programs run by other agencies, including Medicare and Medicaid. Gauff Upsets Sabalenka for French Open In a battle of the top tennis players in the world, defeated top-ranked Aryna Sabalenka 6-7 (5), 6-2, 6-4 to win the French Open final on Saturday. Gauff's win makes her to take the French Open title in a decade after Serena Williams defeated Maria Sharapova in 2015. It is the second major title for the 21-year-old, who won the 2023 U.S. Open. It marked the first time she has beaten the No. 1 player in the world in a major after four previous losses. name: Maud Maron
subject: Defeat Alvin Bragg
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MAUD FOR MANHATTAN
body:
The George Soros elected, Pro-Criminal, Trump-Deranged DEI hire that has turned my beloved New York City into a third-world Hellscape.

| | |
---

---
| | [](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/V_umMA79wTY-3bgWDWUOlQ~~/AARclBA~/pxeTvH_AshKr0YlrsD7aEZ4p1_NparY_GeQwtNj7mZDF7K3cYPwrRosNiCwyRiJIrR3se3aWcPxEhFWcFzgG26RC5djCGz4sgHUoJ5AZDF0xGkR1Ga-WWvE2ByZJHQKpSvRk9iHQKyzzthECMN7eGE-gkuMR2r1sj8vBBfnL1YkfeNsDe3ud0YKdt9pPmTrM6RVMMaVURiu2UJUHGbsRPy0O5X6mHcbhDdQs-MDUBdRHwguSPsUM9-55uo2UhFIkT5RC0CgTC2sQ6IlIE1LrDWlezRtLsgsK_Yj6uOypDn8e0eTSXtmwvvlgKHbENgPH)
---
| | My Dear Friend, [**My name is Maud Maron, and I need your help to defeat Alvin Bragg and replace him as the District Attorney of Manhattan.**](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/V_umMA79wTY-3bgWDWUOlQ~~/AARclBA~/pxeTvH_AshKr0YlrsD7aEZ4p1_NparY_GeQwtNj7mZDF7K3cYPwrRosNiCwyRiJIrR3se3aWcPxEhFWcFzgG26RC5djCGz4sgHUoJ5AZDF0xGkR1Ga-WWvE2ByZJHQKpSvRk9iHQKyzzthECMN7eGE-gkuMR2r1sj8vBBfnL1YkfeNsDe3ud0YKdt9pPmTrM6RVMMaVURiu2UJUHGbsRPy0O5X6mHcbhDdQs-MDUBdRHwguSPsUM9-55uo2UhFIkT5RC0CgTC2sQ6IlIE1LrDWlezRtLsgsK_Yj6uOypDn8e0eTSXtmwvvlgKHbENgPH) You know Alvin... The George Soros elected, Pro-Criminal, Trump-Deranged DEI hire that has turned my beloved New York City into a third-world Hellscape. If you think that sounds too dramatic, just look at a few examples of what Alvin Bragg's "weak-on-crime," Trump-obsessed tenure has brought to the law-abiding citizens of New York:
---
* An innocent woman set on fire by a Guatemalan Illegal Alien who had already been deported at least once before...
* A mob of Illegal criminals caught on video assaulting two New York City Law Enforcement officers outside a "Migrant Shelter," all **released without bail by Alvin Bragg!**

---
Instead of working for the last 4 years to make the Citizens of New York safe and secure, Alvin has been on a singular, sick, twisted mission and one mission only -- TAKE DOWN DONALD TRUMP. That's what he ran on... Those were his marching orders from George Soros and his Radical donors... And those are orders he dutifully followed -- at the expense of not only those of us who live in New York, but every single American that deserved to vote in a fair election not tainted by a ridiculous set of trumped-up charges made up out of thin air. New Yorkers deserve better... Americans deserve better. That's why -- whether you live right here in Manhattan, a thousand miles away in Des Moines, Iowa, or anywhere else in our great country -- I hope you'll help me defeat Alvin Bragg. **[Would you consider helping my campaign with a one-time $28 contribution today?](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/V_umMA79wTY-3bgWDWUOlQ~~/AARclBA~/pxeTvH_AshKr0YlrsD7aEZ4p1_NparY_GeQwtNj7mZDF7K3cYPwrRosNiCwyRiJIrR3se3aWcPxEhFWcFzgG26RC5djCGz4sgHUoJ5AZDF0xGkR1Ga-WWvE2ByZJHQKpSvRk9iHQKyzzthECMN7eGE-gkuMR2r1sj8vBBfnL1YkfeNsDe3ud0YKdt9pPmTrM6RVMMaVURiu2UJUHGbsRPy0O5X6mHcbhDdQs-MDUBdRHwguSPsUM9-55uo2UhFIkT5RC0CgTC2sQ6IlIE1LrDWlezRtLsgsK_Yj6uOypDn8e0eTSXtmwvvlgKHbENgPH)** I could really use your help. Alvin Bragg has millions of dollars pouring into his campaign by the same Radicals who put him there the first time around...
---
* George Soros
* Hollywood Celebrities
* Elites right here in New York and Hollywood
* The deep pockets of the Democrat election machine

---
I don't have any of that on my side -- but I hope I've got YOU on my side. To have any chance of beating the Democrat machine funding Alvin Bragg's run for re-election, I need a nationwide army of Americans to rally by my side... A nationwide army of Americans who understand how toxic it is having a Radical like Alvin Bragg in charge of the criminal justice system of one of our largest cities... Who know how close Alvin Bragg came to knocking Donald Trump out of the 2024 Presidential election and what that would have done to our country... Who watched in disgust as Alvin Bragg conjured up a 34-count felony conviction against a man whose only real crime was trying to Make America Great Again! This is our chance to send a clear message not only to the people of New York -- but the nation -- that these Radicals put into place by George Soros to do his bidding are not invincible... That they CAN be defeated! Alvin Bragg is the perfect example of why I left the Democrat party. I think it all started when my 11-year-old got COVID... We were told to mask in the house and give my son meals in his room for 10 days. Instead, we cuddled up & watched TV together -- unmasked in the living room and ate our meals as a family at the dinner table. That was a watershed moment for me. What were we doing? When did the United States of America turn into a place where the Government told us how to live? When I dared to suggest that it may not be the best idea for biological boys to participate in girls' sports, I was all but run out of town on a rail... Then I dared suggest that the complete failure of our school system might be due to something other than racism, I -- after a lifetime of considering myself a liberal Democrat -- was labeled a "Right Wing Extremist" by the New York Times! The blinders came off -- suddenly, I realized that if simply acknowledging the truth, calling out corruption and challenging the long-held beliefs of the Democrat machine disqualified me from being a Democrat. The truth will set you free -- and it's an honor to represent you on the "Freedom Side" of the wall. I've been in their camp. As a former Democrat and as a mom raising four kids in Manhattan. I know how much they are getting wrong. And how bad it is for our children. **[That's why I'm asking good folks like you to help me.](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/V_umMA79wTY-3bgWDWUOlQ~~/AARclBA~/pxeTvH_AshKr0YlrsD7aEZ4p1_NparY_GeQwtNj7mZDF7K3cYPwrRosNiCwyRiJIrR3se3aWcPxEhFWcFzgG26RC5djCGz4sgHUoJ5AZDF0xGkR1Ga-WWvE2ByZJHQKpSvRk9iHQKyzzthECMN7eGE-gkuMR2r1sj8vBBfnL1YkfeNsDe3ud0YKdt9pPmTrM6RVMMaVURiu2UJUHGbsRPy0O5X6mHcbhDdQs-MDUBdRHwguSPsUM9-55uo2UhFIkT5RC0CgTC2sQ6IlIE1LrDWlezRtLsgsK_Yj6uOypDn8e0eTSXtmwvvlgKHbENgPH)** It's going to take all of us to take down Alvin Bragg -- but this has been a season of political miracles! I humbly ask for your help today. I hope you'll find it in your heart to send a one-time $28 contribution to help me pull off one more political miracle... ...and send Alvin Bragg back to obscurity where he belongs. He's bad for New York... He's bad for America... And he needs to go. One last favor... I know not everybody is going to be able to give that I write to today. **[So if you think you could spare a larger gift -- of $50, $100, $250, $500 or even $1,000 or more, a few of those would really help right now.](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/V_umMA79wTY-3bgWDWUOlQ~~/AARclBA~/pxeTvH_AshKr0YlrsD7aEZ4p1_NparY_GeQwtNj7mZDF7K3cYPwrRosNiCwyRiJIrR3se3aWcPxEhFWcFzgG26RC5djCGz4sgHUoJ5AZDF0xGkR1Ga-WWvE2ByZJHQKpSvRk9iHQKyzzthECMN7eGE-gkuMR2r1sj8vBBfnL1YkfeNsDe3ud0YKdt9pPmTrM6RVMMaVURiu2UJUHGbsRPy0O5X6mHcbhDdQs-MDUBdRHwguSPsUM9-55uo2UhFIkT5RC0CgTC2sQ6IlIE1LrDWlezRtLsgsK_Yj6uOypDn8e0eTSXtmwvvlgKHbENgPH)** We need a good, strong launch -- and without a few of those larger gifts, we'll already be behind. Please just send what you can, My Friend. Just reading my email today is a tremendous favor, and I really appreciate it. Thank you, Wish Me Luck, and God Bless You!
---
---
**Maud Maron**

P.S. I guess Alvin Bragg has just been too darn busy to concentrate on the wave of crime and violence washing over New York... While he has spent the last 4 years prosecuting and persecuting President Trump, New York has become a third-world hellscape! New York deserves better... Our Country deserves better...

Will you help me take the place of Alvin Bragg by supporting my campaign to become the District Attorney of Manhattan? **[If so, please rush a one-time gift of $28, $50, $100, $250, $500 or even $1,000 or more -- I could really use your help!](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/V_umMA79wTY-3bgWDWUOlQ~~/AARclBA~/pxeTvH_AshKr0YlrsD7aEZ4p1_NparY_GeQwtNj7mZDF7K3cYPwrRosNiCwyRiJIrR3se3aWcPxEhFWcFzgG26RC5djCGz4sgHUoJ5AZDF0xGkR1Ga-WWvE2ByZJHQKpSvRk9iHQKyzzthECMN7eGE-gkuMR2r1sj8vBBfnL1YkfeNsDe3ud0YKdt9pPmTrM6RVMMaVURiu2UJUHGbsRPy0O5X6mHcbhDdQs-MDUBdRHwguSPsUM9-55uo2UhFIkT5RC0CgTC2sQ6IlIE1LrDWlezRtLsgsK_Yj6uOypDn8e0eTSXtmwvvlgKHbENgPH)**
---
|

---

## Texas Had Most Active Shootings in 2024
Texas had the highest number of active shooter incidents in the nation in 2024, according to a [new FBI report](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0LGOpDAQBNCvMZlR22PABA4uIZtLL0Q2boaWPBjZfTDz96vZ_YQNSyo9lerffb57SrQ__vonOn6ted7xqgmZscwVTyx4oecNC74OXBjjsiHOGnQnoZdg5-gpvWfTRBcgjqpBpwYz3iyYUTebi6G_hSWAj2AsjrBY24XBdmbAtVfWNOQ-GPRglQKlx9ZYozqMXTAYlAUjDGAkzqXlDRlfvq7pnU8s7ZKfTXIb81HF7Y_Qk9DTdV3tGqh95FPoaaWEsuCR6wd4Cz19QuEq_R7l8T8kWjxT3qvQkwZtpF-YTpR1y5mxyJ-60NNJeDXFxeOilKj2gzDweHpK3yv4d9-dTn8FAAD__xQYhTA). Texas had [four active shooter incidents in 2024](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0cGOmzAQBuCngdtExnEScuCQqsqetpdW6hEN-Ce2ZGxkz0Ly9hWR-gR7_kb_aOb_-9l_sg8-Pn7xjE6eU-ojthIggtwXrMjYwOKQ8VwwCuzogF4rfSJ1JtX2ln149aa23aDstanRNRdzPbbKXHXtuuuZJ-YLFF9ao5oBg9GYrG5aM-p2Gmvf7WHqrNqmUY2-HkxrmhPsaTAYmlaZyihYLykfxEHw5DKFV1qRD2Oa69A5kaVUx1ul75W-b9t2mEvcrdJ3RPoqlb4vX0PwIxWeIC_iaAkz8gNx9NjdgYO4N_yfCciyk4-klTb03kyOLc0pg3gUv4KKS0mQycfRW0QpJI4jcXxR2r9GRVhA0-ApY0lZKGMFhz2ZM91uzYf9-NNWx3sava2OP3_sZWArv5GXOnd22XwIvpwvlVGPmX14Xy3f62rt9L8AAAD__0IBrO0)—double the number reported in California and North Carolina, and four times that of the states tied for third with one incident each. The annual report showed a 50% drop in casualties and a 57% decline in incidents from 2023, outlining incident locations and providing detailed 2024 metrics. You can [read the full report here](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0LGOpDAQBNCvMZlR22PABA4uIZtLL0Q2boaWPBjZfTDz96vZ_YQNSyo9lerffb57SrQ__vonOn6ted7xqgmZscwVTyx4oecNC74OXBjjsiHOGnQnoZdg5-gpvWfTRBcgjqpBpwYz3iyYUTebi6G_hSWAj2AsjrBY24XBdmbAtVfWNOQ-GPRglQKlx9ZYozqMXTAYlAUjDGAkzqXlDRlfvq7pnU8s7ZKfTXIb81HF7Y_Qk9DTdV3tGqh95FPoaaWEsuCR6wd4Cz19QuEq_R7l8T8kWjxT3qvQkwZtpF-YTpR1y5mxyJ-60NNJeDXFxeOilKj2gzDweHpK3yv4d9-dTn8FAAD__xQYhTA).
## Texas Softball Wins First National Championship
Texas softball [beat Texas Tech 10-4](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0D2u3CAcBPDT4I4VYGzjgiIN3Uub0sIwayPhD8Ffy-7to_dyhHQjjfTTaP58LV8-5XRuv_0BS-_ntZxoNYMIZal4oaDB046C941AiGEHFiXUwMXIhVmiT_mz6C7aVcRZdrBy0nNvhJ5Vt1tgeM5BjFpJPYc59lGvZhrWKRoxxbh2yX5jYhRGSiHV_NBGywFxWDVWaYRmWiAmusqDdhDevj7z53qhPMJ1dNnuRHdl_S-mHFOutfZAvc_vkikXrpyxgdf7KlSZcpWu8mHKLUy5FJlyetDjZHrDlPvB-QpPlf_LhLDzzR_gPW-hVd7SyZ-pVOKUKKMrNt4t5ZzqODEttsOn_LOL_u_Nl1V_AwAA__99gomk) in Game 3 of the Women's College World Series to win its first NCAA national title on Friday night. The Longhorns were led by home runs from Mia Scott and Leighann Goode, and another stellar performance from Teagan Kavan, who allowed no earned runs in all 312⁄3 innings pitched at the World Series. Texas Tech’s star pitcher, NiJaree Canady, gave up five runs in the first inning on just 25 pitches, which proved to be insurmountable for the Red Raiders, who scored four runs in the game. Texas’ win was also a first for coach Mike White, who made the World Series eight previous times but had never won. You can check out the [full box score here](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGOtCAcB58GuzXwXxAtKL7G5Cv22isNyE8lwcUAWd23v-y9wtWTzCTz_ZgeNsTwXL_sDlOvJU1PnCWiVuSp4IWME7ZuyLgOzBV-3oCJOKkb7268n7wN8T3JxhvH_SAaGKHlcO-5HKjZzOyVXjT0QJIG6xZHVsHdVa_0wr11TTAfGe94LwQXNLSyl0LBKyfhRM8lkxw-1JTbuqHismWJ7_RCbue0N9FstR6F3f8xGhmN53m2KMfzAxmNc4oRK24lLdXZGBmNLl1lThmMxonRuNod_z2jUXKhtVSdbrLxxxliDKXTTPJ1tyH-xurfFr0M_QQAAP__9SN6GQ).
## North and Central Texas Set to Experience Severe Weather
Severe weather is expected to [affect parts of Central and North Texas ](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykz01uwyAQQOHTwC7WzAT_LVh041267RJhGMdIJI7wyDi3r1r1Br3Ap_e-bu7mU07P-6d_sJVz2dyT655ZhIvb-eDClb2sXPh8cRCOYWV2BNReoLvA4KJP-e2MjnaGOKJmi70ZrwOYkfRqGWdveopmnJGwawO0CyDE2PcBKKBO9geDDgZEQBobMxhsObaz4RkHMMoAxyRbaWRl4dPvS35vB5cmbA-d7Sry2tX1Q9GkaKq1Nn_FzX07FE1LjYomXWx81ZRz2rteGbg_fMq_gvzv-7D0HQAA__9d42uk)tonight, with storms likely to begin around 7 p.m. as an active weather pattern moves into the state. Damaging winds up to 70 mph, hail, heavy rain, and possible tornadoes are forecast, with an enhanced risk for areas northwest of Waco, including Dallas-Fort Worth.
