Texas had —double the number reported in California and North Carolina, and four times that of the states tied for third with one incident each. The annual report showed a 50% drop in casualties and a 57% decline in incidents from 2023, outlining incident locations and providing detailed 2024 metrics. You can . Texas Softball Wins First National Championship Texas softball in Game 3 of the Women's College World Series to win its first NCAA national title on Friday night. The Longhorns were led by home runs from Mia Scott and Leighann Goode, and another stellar performance from Teagan Kavan, who allowed no earned runs in all 312⁄3 innings pitched at the World Series. Texas Tech’s star pitcher, NiJaree Canady, gave up five runs in the first inning on just 25 pitches, which proved to be insurmountable for the Red Raiders, who scored four runs in the game. Texas’ win was also a first for coach Mike White, who made the World Series eight previous times but had never won. You can check out the . North and Central Texas Set to Experience Severe Weather Severe weather is expected to , with storms likely to begin around 7 p.m. as an active weather pattern moves into the state. Damaging winds up to 70 mph, hail, heavy rain, and possible tornadoes are forecast, with an enhanced risk for areas northwest of Waco, including Dallas-Fort Worth. Severe weather is expected into midweek, with the potential for daily rain and storms continuing across the region. name: Elise Stefanik
subject: New York is now in play for Republicans
body:
We can flip the Empire State RED in 2026

| | | | [](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/aBqo/?__vbtrk=Mjk1MDg4OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjk1MDg4OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
---
This is a huge development in my home state.****
**[A new poll was recently released showing that a Republican - me - would be just ONE POINT behind Democrat Gov. Kathy Hochul in a hypothetical matchup for Governor of New York!](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/aBqo/?__vbtrk=Mjk1MDg4OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjk1MDg4OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)**
With 15% of voters still undecided, this race is wide open. Let me be blunt, we are closer now to a Republican winning a statewide election in New York than we have been for over 20 years.
We can put a Republican governor in Albany but we need to lay the groundwork right now.
[FLIP NY RED](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/aBqo/?__vbtrk=Mjk1MDg4OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjk1MDg4OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
Friend, if we can flip the Empire State next year and transform New York into a swing state it would _**completely change our electoral map**_ and _**strengthen our ability to deliver an America First agenda**_ for all Americans.
The transformation of states like Florida and Ohio into MAGA strongholds paved the way for our victory last year. New York is primed to become our nation’s next battleground and winning statewide elections here would solidify our ability to Make America Great Again at the state and federal level for years to come.
[MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/aBqo/?__vbtrk=Mjk1MDg4OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjk1MDg4OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
Decades of Democrat party control have led to the absolute degradation of New York.
New York is the hub of the world economy. It’s where Wall St meets Main St. For centuries it has been where families from across the nation and across the world have come to build the American dream for themselves and future generations.
Yet under the failed leadership of Eliot Spitzer, Andrew Cuomo, and now Kathy Hochul New York has become a cautionary tale.
Their economic policies have _**crushed entrepreneurship and small businesses**_ , their soft-on-crime policies and a refusal to take action on the illegal immigrant crisis have seen** __**_**a rise of violent crime on our streets**_ , and their _**horrific handling of COVID**_ led to thousands of deaths that were covered up by the Cuomo-Hochul administration.
The results are devastating. _**Businesses are shuttering** , **families are fleeing**_ to safer states, _**young people are leaving en masse**_ due to lack of opportunities as well as the rising cost of living, and there has been _**no accountability**_ for the Nursing Home Scandal.********
**[The situation is dire and Kathy Hochul, currently the worst governor in America, has no plan to repair the damage her party has done.](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/aBqo/?__vbtrk=Mjk1MDg4OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjk1MDg4OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)**
**It has gotten so BAD for the current regime that her own Lieutenant Governor, that she hand picked herself, is now primarying her:**
[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/aBqo/?__vbtrk=Mjk1MDg4OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjk1MDg4OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
It is evident that Hochul has lost support not just from Republicans and Independents, but now Democrats as well.
But changing one Democrat for another with the same failed policies would be like putting a new paint job on a broken down car, it would not solve any of the problems.
**It doesn’t have to be this way and New Yorkers know it. It’s time for a real change.**
[FIRE HOCHUL IN 2026](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/aBqo/?__vbtrk=Mjk1MDg4OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjk1MDg4OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
Fellow patriot, New York deserves better leadership and the United States deserves to have one of its largest states be governed with competence that will help usher in the next age of American greatness rather than undermine it.
I am committed to continue fighting tirelessly to ensure that we elect leadership that champions freedom, security, and prosperity for every American family, especially my fellow New Yorkers who have been long neglected by the Democrat Party.
From the North Country to the Big Apple we are going to fight for every vote, we just need the resources to keep up the momentum.
**[That’s why I launched the Flip NY Red Fund to FIRE Kathy Hochul and NY Democrats in 2026.](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/aBqo/?__vbtrk=Mjk1MDg4OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjk1MDg4OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)**
**_[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/aBor/?__vbtrk=Mjk1MDg4OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjk1MDg4OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)_****_[Please fill out this brief survey today and make a contribution to my efforts to fight for and deliver Republican leadership to New York](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/aBqo/?__vbtrk=Mjk1MDg4OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjk1MDg4OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)_.**
**_[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/aBor/?__vbtrk=Mjk1MDg4OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjk1MDg4OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)_**If we can save the Empire State, we can save America. I appreciate the support of every patriot who stands with me now in the fight for New York and our nation.
_Your fellow patriot,_
[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/aBqo/?__vbtrk=Mjk1MDg4OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjk1MDg4OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
**Elise Stefanik**
Proud New Yorker
[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/aBqo/?__vbtrk=Mjk1MDg4OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjk1MDg4OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)

| Peter, Republicans will do anything to justify the extreme, dangerous Medicaid cuts in the Trump-backed “Big Beautiful Bill” working its way through Congress. It’s ghoulish. The “Big Beautiful Bill” is going to be DEADLY for the American people – we have to stop it from passing in the Senate. [Will you urge Senate Democrats to stand up for Medicaid and BLOCK the “Big Beautiful Bill”? Affordable healthcare access is on the line for millions right now, so we need to DEMAND our leaders do the right thing and stop this dangerous bill before it’s too late!](https://default.salsalabs.org/T88b67fbb-5c44-4581-adf8-40daed488c51/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. Now more than ever, we need our courts to step in - preventing Trump from seizing the unprecedented power to use the U.S. military on American streets to roundup US citizens. Trump knows the courts are the only thing keeping American democracy from collapsing - that is why he is launching an all out war on our judges by attempting to replace state supreme court judges with MAGA loyalists in key swing states around the country in upcoming elections - like 2025 PA's Supreme Court retention race. name: The Editors at Broad + Liberty
subject: Coach Guy says: no more
body:
News + editorial to start your week | Broad + Liberty Weekly Reads | | | |
---
| | | Good morning and welcome to _Broad + Liberty_ 's Weekly Reads.

Stay up to date on all of this and more when you[ subscribe to our daily email list ](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=e2febd4fec&e=b7b3eddce2)and get the best of _Broad + Liberty_ delivered straight to your inbox.
---
|
---
|
### **1.[Power, profit, and guardianship: The fraught legacy of Chester County Treasurer Patricia Maisano](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=bdb5df017b&e=b7b3eddce2)**
_By Todd Shepherd_
The incumbent treasurer of Chester County has twice been accused of fleecing elderly persons she was in charge of protecting during her career as a professional guardian. In another instance, attorneys she was working with in a guardianship accused her of nonpayment. Those accusations, combined with previous Broad + Liberty reporting — revealing Patricia Maisano[ received her master’s and doctorate](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=23ac06b511&e=b7b3eddce2) from a diploma mill, and that she was[ removed from court cases](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=a8878be0a7&e=b7b3eddce2) after failing to meet standards as an expert witness — raise serious questions about her integrity and fitness for office. Her time as treasurer is uncontroversial. But it is her professional work that has left a trail of embittered and disillusioned people in her wake. **Why It Matters.** The perils of guardianship are not unknown. For example, in 2023, Gov. Josh Shapiro[ signed a bipartisan bill](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=baccc55f38&e=b7b3eddce2) meant to curb the possibility of courts overrelying on guardianships to solve difficult personal or family situations. But there are doubts about the law’s effectiveness, and there is also an admitted shortage of guardians for courts to choose from, according to media reports. Still, the 2019 indictments in Delaware County stand testament to the potential for financial abuse, if not outright embezzlement. Chester County Democrats renominated Maisano for her treasurer post in last month’s primary. Broad + Liberty[ approached the county Democratic leadership](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=e10bef7127&e=b7b3eddce2) last year for reaction to the story that Maisano had been[ kicked out of court cases](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=cb0b1ce782&e=b7b3eddce2) as an expert witness, but her party allies remained silent. **Quotable.** “[Maisano] called herself a guardian. She could make court testimony on mental capacity,” David Winstanley told Broad + Liberty. “She had all kinds of supposed degrees. And my private eye that I had hired said that these were purchased, these were bought degrees. She didn’t attend universities to get any professional schooling such as neuropsychology or anything like that where she could accurately make a determination.” **[Continue Reading](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=23466c85e3&e=b7b3eddce2)**
---
|
---
|
### **2.[Coach Guy’s tipping point](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=08e8b867cf&e=b7b3eddce2)**

_By Guy Ciarrocchi_
As readers, listeners and friends know, I’ve been coaching softball for 26 seasons. My family, faith, and conservative politics are the only things that I’ve been involved in longer. While coaching, I have purposefully kept a wall between my softball world and my political world. I even ignored a phone call from soon-to-be Speaker Kevin McCarthy while coaching at the Pennsylvania Little League Softball Championships. Recently, I saw the videos and read the story about Minnesota’s state high school softball championship. The “winning team” won the championship by having their pitcher throw back to back shut-outs. Their pitcher is a biological male. I can be silent no more. **Why It Matters.** Whatever one thinks about the morality or the politics of transgender issues, we should all agree that when it comes to competitive sports, allowing a biological male to pitch — from 43 feet away — to high school girls is wrong. It’s a safety issue. And, yes, it’s a fairness issue. Let me tell you about the girls I’ve coached. They put in thousands of hours of practices, drills, conditioning and lessons—and play hundreds of games. They play when it’s 101 degrees and the infield is like playing at the beach. They play after rain, when the batter’s box and pitcher’s mound are like swamps in Louisiana. They play in the early spring and late fall when the wind chill is in the 30’s. I’ve been at games when it was snowing. They play with bruises, blisters, and soreness. The pitchers throw until their arms almost fall off. They play for their coaches and trainers. They play for their teammates and parents. They play for themselves. They deserve better. **[Continue Reading](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=490bf60c6e&e=b7b3eddce2)**
---
|
---
|
# **3\. Lightning Round**
* **[Chester County leaders dodge questions on Maisano’s record as guardian, expert witness, and bogus degrees](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=3ebc7395e1&e=b7b3eddce2)**
* **[Guy Ciarrocchi: Lies, damn lies, and budget ‘cuts’](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=003072d96a&e=b7b3eddce2)**
* **[Kyle Sammin: Running out of other people’s money](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=aa5f19494c&e=b7b3eddce2)**
* **[Thom Nickels: The pretzel, the pain, and the prose — Pete Dexter’s Philadelphia years](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=546079cd4b&e=b7b3eddce2)**
* **[Richard F. Kosich: NPR in the crosshairs](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=66dbaf55e6&e=b7b3eddce2)**
* **[Carl Marrara: Plastic bag bans don’t work](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=8f493df045&e=b7b3eddce2)**

---
| [ ](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=ee4a4076a4&e=b7b3eddce2)
---
|
---
|
# **4\. Podcast**
---
| [ ](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=a4ae9ddbdb&e=b7b3eddce2)
---
|
---
|
# **5\. What we're reading**
As this newsletter goes to press, wild tweets are still flying between President Donald Trump and his erstwhile friend and political ally, Elon Musk. Surrogates on both sides of the intra-MAGA tiff are jumping in, accusations and personal attacks flying every which way. It’s all very unseemly and brought to mind this 2016 article at _The Federalist_ by David Harsanyi suggesting (not altogether seriously) that we [bring back dueling](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=189f964330&e=b7b3eddce2). It’s probably for the best that politicians no longer shoot each other, but the need to stand behind your actions certainly encouraged them to behave a little more like gentlemen.************
---
|
---

As always, gifts made to _Broad + Liberty_ are 100% tax deductible!

Thank you, dear reader, for your steadfast support of our independent, broad-minded brand of local journalism. We could not do this without you.

With gratitude,

— The Editors at _Broad + Liberty_

name: DLCC Newsletter
subject: In honor of Pride Month, we're highlighting LGBTQ+ representation and calling out the GOP’s harmful anti-LGBTQ+ agenda.
body:
Welcome to the LGBTQ+ Pride Month edition of the DLCC's newsletter, June 8th, 2025 | | |
---
|
---
| [ ](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.yjJN_MEbNx94PLaWzZ6hW9WL4ySifRyEQyG7D6ZDcaKmFQcO_SqeUFRkYFn0WrvHHisWiwN-mSj2nwLaaiVAndhLwjC3x9MI2KUAa0DnJVhnpYEDC1zCy_aVhTCXGaPnndepaL01a8jp-GXmOTuiDk8c3wREJnfo9XuqPEn__cET0jlQ7LBvM4jI8eeFcEZasbk854cq9i1K9hPCWfZKqRnGQVE-569N3lQ0bxLAhCtsTXHSSYAg5DDN7Q0hj0IoDtjczoAgrE3wWJG_18Fu4UKfbeZvr6_4_qgAgfaG5P8GlXnesxZYQDAWQimcFY3VzrmHubD-z816iDHm1wtaYSy-qVzLVYmvewRelHV3db8xXeo3a3VDwKdvp-k5bXlgiBZIHU_bEux3BmQP9z3iGcHfiTBLp3VrAtaJAGI7FY3RZ4CRKP09fC74fq_Myp_9v0TmSB2ZxVge96ASENQQ_49PVuWn3Ff0QL2ca0cHLBw/4h6/CSBz7CAbQauYdehUmx1ZVQ/h0/h001.Vhdb0g_dbrkwDFrr4CW0mxBxRcdLwM9M634Lk4a3Z0w)

🏳️🌈 **_Happy Pride Month:_ The DLCC stands united with the LGBTQ+ community **
As the official arm of the Democratic Party with the sole mission of building Democratic power in state legislatures, the DLCC is on the frontlines of protecting LGBTQ+ rights and freedoms in the states. We are proud to do our part to defend and amplify the voices of the LGBTQ+ community while making sure the GOP’s hateful attacks don’t slip under the radar.
* * *
🌈 **_Let’s celebrate:_ Representation matters **
❤️ There are **at least 246 openly LGBTQ+** state legislators currently serving in legislatures across the country
🧡 **47 states** now have at least one openly LGBTQ+ state legislator
💛 In **at least 10 states** , LGBTQ+ Democrats are serving as members of leadership
💚 Wisconsin’s LGBTQ+ Caucus **more than doubled** in size following the 2024 elections, with **seven new members** joining. **Three of the new members** were DLCC targets: Sen. Kristin Alfheim, Rep. Ryan Spaude, and Rep. Christian Phelps. 🎉
🚨 **_Stay informed:_ Republicans are on the attack **
🟦 **Over 570 anti-LGBTQ+ bills** have been introduced just this year – attacking this community has become a mainstay priority for the GOP
🟪 Republicans in **Oklahoma, Michigan, Idaho, North Dakota, Montana, and South Dakota** introduced resolutions that ask the Supreme Court to overturn the landmark 2015 _Obergefell_ decision that legalized same-sex marriage
🟫 **Over a dozen states** have bills that would ban Pride flags from public buildings.
⬛ Republicans made **Iowa the first state to remove civil rights** from a previously protected class when they removed gender identity from the state’s civil rights law.
👏 **_Learn more:_ Democrats are fighting back **
✨ **_Virginia:_ Democrats fight to protect same-sex marriage **
Democrats advanced a constitutional amendment to protect same-sex marriage in state law. Should the Supreme Court overturn _Obergefell_ , this amendment would protect same-sex marriage in the state. [**Read more here →**](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.SNYHID0cgDJeR88MOfSMuRFAavReYV4KnBA2gO_2BZQMW3j6X7ZB6qbpfYrxy3mqCh2b6MRZ6CRjPbK3gK6oY7VgGpy_YjwrQDajLU5-WH8SSOog7CXpvRaC_FtGGW8l1oJ86g5zpVA8MU8KWnD89DW04QA-YouVWkDtCaqHEv2dRg6YcwmLQyBKHng_AhhdtIUrSoDmsTGff0u9o1z83TmFSjc4d2TcrjO9K_j49bSTl8GDjNbLKlK-r1xdUTS6vXz7tVLSi61zb-LM1mqkZNtFxVJ6a0gDj1kFQF7z6B50BrzyJRZEoiD5Yx-je5fPV0ywQCDOMfKg8SB2uqTfZKyQCoICwrFCvI08IFxqu1EtcCIEmG2CyBcE20uxsz9gLf6bQ5HHzUJJOs2ZXd7qXqEy5JDcCKEJ5HtZ2ZzUTtEjT4Bmsue7d7WnTa9F1cKVDoeFUF_3lvndv9pvXN10CVM160eaN4UaiM7y4MFEeEd1kCTbEUWNCVnkWjREqbJW0sPLcFNjxEbw5tFsUllyJQ/4h6/CSBz7CAbQauYdehUmx1ZVQ/h1/h001.vDgQVB2wrmuj0emqeeVH6koxrkwZPJzp49hlcuFOohY)
✨ **_Washington:_ Democrats pass legislation to protect LGBTQ+ students **
Washington Democrats passed a bill to safeguard students’ rights and protect students from discrimination based on sexual orientation, gender expression, or gender identity. [**Read more here →**](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMb86bBua_FH3zhdag73OM5ZVQDF14x5kL0DlQ6x6wGHg589YxSyheQRe3Auy25ltbhfkbxkXKSmdQX6Pz9bHhjtd5NOMrcbBdSyPDXBICb7xCgmRX14CfasenomJh0VyihnEDfIhHA7MgKEVC15CyWgKgg-nebA7UZZ79pXHDiwtZsfZR31enPMEuP5pT-bRv-miGVPWtyPevYcIdqkBYO0SS_LL58yWp_7rZKmbs1d8FGZh9uNIRVQ_Kxb6hftOCjkDapdFmV6z64VTLop-6y7Kxrr2cIAHvELB_7xY0kWr64M0Ujq7nj63HQ5oDvQRr0uxHE2wpmURCe-MFs6Mc2QvQiQS1mktreQvjeCiwuNdJwUKiAwhCFty6IhNBT-R-_RAxE9qjknzTygVo6jBfNN_1cxfdqUvZtdPVmTkK5l9fi26CdGsx3ZY30T4PE-nVMqCEREwuKj3L1JxoFFauTCi5kOCkJk7ir9y2dd172Tv0Op8APPnpurc-pxvpmBMjnAdcOk-cz27_LT6oE24Fwa61PH3edQ4wfa2_lJGfRYpNNl1Xlq0Bdx7n2DDFF78_g/4h6/CSBz7CAbQauYdehUmx1ZVQ/h2/h001.3L1UiT5te4TT5K7bNnpjtQTUe_2eBDtokIrxQcIOI9I)
✨ **_Colorado:_ Democrats defend access to gender-affirming health care **
Democratic lawmakers in Colorado passed bills to prohibit health insurance plans from denying or limiting medically necessary gender-affirming health care. [**Read more here →**](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.SNYHID0cgDJeR88MOfSMuQeMpMWOebgA0GXhiMgGbyJ0p0JlHhFJXoZLrD07gvb9Qj-YeZ0cWqdyebRG6RRvj1G6XtvtjD3udkZfAW0cdzxnyi75cy_OgKjjNNFfQ8hTXSvaiO9pnZBTpNsHajvugPKdp1xRHoY8r401VstKK0gQJcRtOxLcTBLG9HeO0WTdkShoeAwsBTHNFNDPfjYxVrgh_2aPK812d8So0SeIZSP8HzAJ9LsI7NL2u_-XhWL-2nNI2hEpZk1_5Gn9RTwOP5eRDOzU7-rZhwqTHL2vscQLsLZdXFKy9FPPgA5_n488uix2TNo2J8v_6kvBXK9ACkzBRxbW3FLf7OYyoYzkrmkhzaabEnq-REUizBP9i0tzcTZPdRTIK1jVvVVKf-NKXKPOMd6ijbo1jjQNfM__LrLU6OhnCRxXftxV4KLWa3pXfB6yknOu25FVrzXo2LSMQYmG96HinGLUmrSNzU1-5HLJSusan3f_jG6clw5xBPFCUFgQec0v78_rKJCTPHHILg/4h6/CSBz7CAbQauYdehUmx1ZVQ/h3/h001.8SsBBH2R0kEhs2idAMs3xZHw15tfWyH9iypMUt6qEZA)
🫏 **_Join the fight:_ Become an Official DLCC Member **
If you’re looking for a way to take back your agency against the GOP power surge and help chart the path forward, we hope you’ll join our team by becoming a DLCC member. [**Join our team today →**](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqu05XtZnrBMT5R_mtAuAjxDu3dxGzlBB9YjsCEOc4FOGL2qIqa78zmdNqDgId1SGnHCLfc-iT7uNW2Y3IcAZxVf92nXPKBZVnSq7tEWQbfFm1RjhnfpITEAw_SCaTCip4_UeBBNiyvV4cHaFCt_upLElFqiwiEbGVHSHCXj8QoiGuBdHKFb-1i3p4Mxvr6eDtlCJQPCxVopXQO1hInuUL6VlbOG8ZhVJPjKtZ_Lgj5v6M72yJ0fWBebjw_gd6pLrNoCi5REClFGuQCQrsyfyw6M36RIemtNXarQIRS21vdjwGvGJjqMRQ3i2TsMMJI4PjXcCMmFIZDsJNGVCDANzHplUxgO86m8X9mW9MDBQgmDH76A__F5zsuL6vpEjTtBsb-RNC4QnvkiHbfn65RC93-JIjoyFduzzgKMSEpjgedTb_5WWrDsqmiFTc2s9J1e35DZWYYUt-3_c4puMipUoDS5l6yky8UwIlmumL-WQbGY5KqubJwVDSde4Jxbyryy-Er-c5efTlC-iX2AOg6f7dZn/4h6/CSBz7CAbQauYdehUmx1ZVQ/h4/h001.pjJOa5RAzm4ke5MsFj-r34SSKGa2-cRAR6Ce8gPBheA)
**🗳️ _Upcoming elections:_ Democrats work to build progressive power **
State Democrats are facing over a dozen elections in the coming months. [**With Trump assaulting our democracy, Democrats are making key investments to elect state legislators who can block the MAGA agenda. clean_body: Welcome to the LGBTQ+ Pride Month edition of the DLCC's newsletter, June 8th, 2025 | | | | | 🏳️🌈 Happy Pride Month: The DLCC stands united with the LGBTQ+ community As the official arm of the Democratic Party with the sole mission of building Democratic power in state legislatures, the DLCC is on the frontlines of protecting LGBTQ+ rights and freedoms in the states. We are proud to do our part to defend and amplify the voices of the LGBTQ+ community while making sure the GOP’s hateful attacks don’t slip under the radar. 🌈 Let’s celebrate: Representation matters ❤️ There are at least 246 openly LGBTQ+ state legislators currently serving in legislatures across the country 🧡 47 states now have at least one openly LGBTQ+ state legislator 💛 In at least 10 states , LGBTQ+ Democrats are serving as members of leadership 💚 Wisconsin’s LGBTQ+ Caucus more than doubled in size following the 2024 elections, with seven new members joining. Three of the new members were DLCC targets: Sen. Kristin Alfheim, Rep. Ryan Spaude, and Rep. Christian Phelps. 🎉 🚨 Stay informed: Republicans are on the attack 🟦 Over 570 anti-LGBTQ+ bills have been introduced just this year – attacking this community has become a mainstay priority for the GOP 🟪 Republicans in Oklahoma, Michigan, Idaho, North Dakota, Montana, and South Dakota introduced resolutions that ask the Supreme Court to overturn the landmark 2015 Obergefell decision that legalized same-sex marriage 🟫 Over a dozen states have bills that would ban Pride flags from public buildings. ⬛ Republicans made Iowa the first state to remove civil rights from a previously protected class when they removed gender identity from the state’s civil rights law. 👏 Learn more: Democrats are fighting back ✨ Virginia: Democrats fight to protect same-sex marriage Democrats advanced a constitutional amendment to protect same-sex marriage in state law. Should the Supreme Court overturn Obergefell , this amendment would protect same-sex marriage in the state. ✨ Washington: Democrats pass legislation to protect LGBTQ+ students Washington Democrats passed a bill to safeguard students’ rights and protect students from discrimination based on sexual orientation, gender expression, or gender identity. ✨ Colorado: Democrats defend access to gender-affirming health care Democratic lawmakers in Colorado passed bills to prohibit health insurance plans from denying or limiting medically necessary gender-affirming health care. 🫏 Join the fight: Become an Official DLCC Member If you’re looking for a way to take back your agency against the GOP power surge and help chart the path forward, we hope you’ll join our team by becoming a DLCC member. 🗳️ Upcoming elections: Democrats work to build progressive power State Democrats are facing over a dozen elections in the coming months. **** | | ---|---|--- | Democratic Legislative Campaign Committee 1225 Eye Street NW Suite 1250, Washington, DC 20005 Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Contributions or gifts to DLCC PAC are not tax deductible. | The Democratic Legislative Campaign Committee and DLCC PAC are dedicated to winning and defending Democratic majorities in state legislatures across the country. This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you are a part of our grassroots network. Emails are a crucial way to stay in touch with our supporters. Please add us to your address book or safe senders list to ensure timely election updates. We're fighting to elect Democrats and advance a progressive vision in the states. Our success depends on grassroots donors like you. Ninety-eight percent of our donors give less than $200, and two-thirds give less than $20. To make a contribution, please . To unsubscribe and stop receiving emails about our efforts, please | | Sent via . clean_body: TRUMP TO THE DEEP STATE: Hands Off Our Social Security! Peter, President Trump is proposing a bold plan to ELIMINATE THE TAX ON SOCIAL SECURITY and put more money in YOUR pocket. But he can't do it alone. He needs your help to make this plan a reality. So we're asking: Our President is working around the clock to put more money in your pockets and stop giving it to big government - but he needs your help to put his HUGE plan into action. That's why we're asking YOU for your opinion. Thank you, GOP HQ Paid for by the Republican National Committee Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

subject: Using Marines on U.S. Citizens? Hegseth Must Resign.
body:
| | | | |
---
| | |
# [ Denounce Hegseth's threat to use Marines against our own citizens, and demand he be fired](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta9eb8334-dee5-49c6-819d-b466e994f39a/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T1c00d37a-8792-485e-9fc4-360177eaa6aa/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | Secretary of Defense Pete Hegseth, the genius who earlier sent out top military secrets via a public chat app, is now [threatening to use active duty Marines against our own people](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb6d194e5-87ac-40c7-bdd7-b83b03729671/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9), here in the US, starting with protesters exercising their First Amendment rights. [**Hegseth needs to go, NOW.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T84f55563-bbd6-4598-8e21-932688f030a7/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Marines are trained for war, not for putting down peaceful protesters. And they have fought against dictators, not to enable them. And a secretary of defense who wants to use them to wage war on our own people is a dangerous threat, and needs to go, IMMEDIATELY. [**Sign now: "We denounce Hegseth's threat to use Marines against our own citizens, and demand he be lose his job ASAP."**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T9cc46578-e652-4dd8-86cb-a2cc629ac6ce/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---

name: Team AOTL
subject: A Supreme Court case that could determine the future of Louisiana’s congressional map
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE NATIONAL REDISTRICTING ACTION FUND
body:
Any day now...
|
---

Peter,
The United States Supreme Court will issue a decision in _Louisiana v. Callais_ any day now. This case could determine the future of Louisiana’s congressional map and critical protections under the Voting Rights Act (VRA).
[**Sign up here to receive breaking news text messages from All On The Line and be the first to know as soon as this critical ruling comes down.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/109206420/550339610/1843700183?refcode=cul_aotl_tier1_email_LAPreview_email_20250606-AOTL-Tier1-LAPreview_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=cul&utm_content=20250606-AOTL-Tier1-LAPreview_&utm_campaign=LAPreview&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjA0NTRkN2RkLTcwNDQtZjAxMS04ZjdjLTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=bU0ts6WgX4x3tVsf_S_Gbu9a-wWwiyegpBBl2fiJ6L8=&emci=e8474f0d-0243-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=0454d7dd-7044-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=8431045)
Here’s what A.G. Holder had to say about this case:
**"Federal law, the Supreme Court’s own precedent, and basic fairness dictate that Black Louisianians must vote on truly representative and fair maps.** A decision that does not recognize that fact or that weakens the Voting Rights Act of 1965 would signal an alarming retreat into a past that so many have fought so long and so hard to pull the country from.”
_**The facts:**_ Black voters in Louisiana make up roughly one-third of the state’s population, yet for decades had an opportunity to elect a candidate of their choice in **only one** of the state’s **six** congressional districts. Then, after a long legal fight supported by our affiliate, **the National Redistricting Foundation, the state enacted a new, fair map last year.**
But our fight didn’t end there. That’s because map manipulators are still working to undermine Black voting power in Louisiana.
After that, however, a group of radical conservative activists brought a new case in one of the most conservative federal courts in the country, **blatantly ignoring** the Supreme Court’s recent precedent in _Allen v. Milligan_. Unfortunately, that new court struck down Louisiana’s new, fair map.
**Now the Supreme Court is expected to rule in the days ahead on the future of Louisiana’s map and this hard-fought Black-opportunity district.[Sign up for text updates to get real-time breaking news as soon as it happens. >>](https://click.everyaction.com/k/109206425/550339630/1843700183?refcode=cul_aotl_tier1_email_LAPreview_email_20250606-AOTL-Tier1-LAPreview_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=cul&utm_content=20250606-AOTL-Tier1-LAPreview_&utm_campaign=LAPreview&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjA0NTRkN2RkLTcwNDQtZjAxMS04ZjdjLTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=bU0ts6WgX4x3tVsf_S_Gbu9a-wWwiyegpBBl2fiJ6L8=&emci=e8474f0d-0243-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=0454d7dd-7044-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=8431045)**
[SIGN-UP!](https://click.everyaction.com/k/109206428/550339652/1843700183?refcode=cul_aotl_tier1_email_LAPreview_email_20250606-AOTL-Tier1-LAPreview_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=cul&utm_content=20250606-AOTL-Tier1-LAPreview_&utm_campaign=LAPreview&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjA0NTRkN2RkLTcwNDQtZjAxMS04ZjdjLTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=bU0ts6WgX4x3tVsf_S_Gbu9a-wWwiyegpBBl2fiJ6L8=&emci=e8474f0d-0243-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=0454d7dd-7044-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=8431045)

All On The Line is building a truly representative democracy where all eligible voters can make their voices heard. We’re fighting for:
• A democracy that’s truly representative
• The end of extreme partisan and racial gerrymandering
• To ensure that historically marginalized voters can make their voices heard
No matter how hard these anti-democracy forces try, we will refuse to give in. **All On The Line will be here to fight for fair representation — in Louisiana, and across the country.**
This is where you come in, Peter.
None of this is possible without grassroots supporters like you, who understand how critical these issues are for the future of our democracy. clean_body: Any day now... | Peter, The United States Supreme Court will issue a decision in Louisiana v. Callais any day now. This case could determine the future of Louisiana’s congressional map and critical protections under the Voting Rights Act (VRA). Here’s what A.G. Holder had to say about this case: "Federal law, the Supreme Court’s own precedent, and basic fairness dictate that Black Louisianians must vote on truly representative and fair maps. A decision that does not recognize that fact or that weakens the Voting Rights Act of 1965 would signal an alarming retreat into a past that so many have fought so long and so hard to pull the country from.” The facts: Black voters in Louisiana make up roughly one-third of the state’s population, yet for decades had an opportunity to elect a candidate of their choice in only one of the state’s six congressional districts. Then, after a long legal fight supported by our affiliate, the National Redistricting Foundation, the state enacted a new, fair map last year. But our fight didn’t end there. That’s because map manipulators are still working to undermine Black voting power in Louisiana. After that, however, a group of radical conservative activists brought a new case in one of the most conservative federal courts in the country, blatantly ignoring the Supreme Court’s recent precedent in Allen v. Milligan. Unfortunately, that new court struck down Louisiana’s new, fair map. Now the Supreme Court is expected to rule in the days ahead on the future of Louisiana’s map and this hard-fought Black-opportunity district. All On The Line is building a truly representative democracy where all eligible voters can make their voices heard. We’re fighting for: • A democracy that’s truly representative • The end of extreme partisan and racial gerrymandering • To ensure that historically marginalized voters can make their voices heard No matter how hard these anti-democracy forces try, we will refuse to give in. All On The Line will be here to fight for fair representation — in Louisiana, and across the country. This is where you come in, Peter. None of this is possible without grassroots supporters like you, who understand how critical these issues are for the future of our democracy. = = More as soon as we know it — thank you, The AOTL Team is the grassroots advocacy campaign supported by the National Redistricting Action Fund. Support our work to end gerrymandering. Text FAIR to 88228 to receive recurring updates from AOTL by automated text message. Text HELP for help, STOP to end. Msg & Data rates may apply. and | = | PAID FOR BY THE NATIONAL REDISTRICTING ACTION FUND. Contributions or gifts to The National Redistricting Action Fund are not tax deductible. 712 H St NE, Suite #25, Washington, DC, 20002 This email was sent to:dpwillis67@gmail.com

[**MESSAGE FROM NAVY SEALS TIM SHEEHY, ELI CRANE, & RYAN ZINKE**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=bc2e0b8d635c4b5ab49b0882055d7f60&_e=82Xlz3na5Oea2oYGOxkLGEtFvxZuOyCqjkQu_kfYWI071BwY0cL8IHE4uNQ2OOJohVBcviTOZg4imTuXp66Mnd6q6adFB0SlHQDLvMrCAl3yUZBV3Rw7X1IpVMX1Qick1nhPgWLtcIDWA8R78kmCE3fBxunv7aooLKgFlkcvpn5hlgmuZR_ryYP4c7Gi8zDkbSeFvxfmmXyzjcQpFcvxKFv28dQXO-V-cP-WxG1L4vMiyY1Yit5IqwLEvgkIKLHy9EkxFJnzJqbHD7-60XfElsLdV_4Ew1ZqnBkZogD1srYcPd60lFmfZahSJE7VaTdASNdyT8YkUl_mqMbA1sNoHKFpQ-penpHsDZM4QSqR6KkFsRWu8bmkhpHBeFVIFEJN9I0_WzC0dUDJfgf3j5UeKKB0DGHSjgpDsNCNYXZuLNI%3D)

Peter,

Congress is like a battlefield—thrilling, mission-driven, and full of conflict. At least no one’s shooting at us here. Well, not with guns, anyway.

The out-of-touch fake news “reporters” at Politico decided they would target the most dangerous men in DC: Navy SEALs.

We all ran for office because we were still hungry to protect and fight for our country. The war may be over for us, but we can’t abandon the part of our lives that made us who we are. We were part of an elite unit on the front lines, and Congress is somewhere else we can be out front doing something special for our country.

_**Yet the liberal news corporations, who _desperately_ want to keep the status quo, _attacked us_ for wanting to take on the Swamp establishment and business-as-usual going on in our government.**_

All of us –**Navy SEALs Tim Sheehy, Eli Crane, and Ryan Zinke** – are teaming up to stop career politicians and lazy bureaucrats, but we’re up against more than just the DC establishment. We’re up against the liberal media, RINOs, and revenge-seeking Democrats.

**We need you, Peter to keep us on the frontlines, bucking the corrupt status quo! **[](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=bc2e0b8d635c4b5ab49b0882055d7f60&_e=82Xlz3na5Oea2oYGOxkLGEtFvxZuOyCqjkQu_kfYWI071BwY0cL8IHE4uNQ2OOJowQ0aK-XBRifCnk8P9OIo2nVzWSkplKwZLY-ZflHxiwR02uYljGoXmNT9f8_-OwIA2_J1nlbn3-HaUxxDBEWvbKKR1iRTgOR0zhag3ZXD0AMzcUNK76cgOoTyb-_Of3QUAgOiK__qNjG0z1HaIkBGCPtV_Jye2A4juNtd1rymyTWYgdZt4K4jnsjjB78riZLCUqCiMbqotH8Ps-LAKye-yQlOUQHTOJQMHOa3-QyR8sG39JIVq-5-usHqX4wJ7ioP6jrKzpevLZuGlrdoclJ0eFlmIHGxAEnwyvvnfx5ejosPzH-z6clpx_WB2fVC8RnRceopS7UiLRTEkFIT-ywxAw%3D%3D)

clean_body: Washington’s a different kind of warzone—high stakes, relentless battles, and no shortage of enemies. But I’m no stranger to tough fights. | Peter, Congress is like a battlefield—thrilling, mission-driven, and full of conflict. At least no one’s shooting at us here. Well, not with guns, anyway. The out-of-touch fake news “reporters” at Politico decided they would target the most dangerous men in DC: Navy SEALs. We all ran for office because we were still hungry to protect and fight for our country. The war may be over for us, but we can’t abandon the part of our lives that made us who we are. We were part of an elite unit on the front lines, and Congress is somewhere else we can be out front doing something special for our country. Yet the liberal news corporations, who desperately want to keep the status quo, attacked us for wanting to take on the Swamp establishment and business-as-usual going on in our government. All of us –Navy SEALs Tim Sheehy, Eli Crane, and Ryan Zinke – are teaming up to stop career politicians and lazy bureaucrats, but we’re up against more than just the DC establishment. We’re up against the liberal media, RINOs, and revenge-seeking Democrats. clean_body: | | | Some folks write you emails pretending to be President Trump. I won 't do that to you. Some folks pretend donations will somehow fund DOGE. I prefer to be honest with you. This is Steve Scalise. As your House Majority Leader, I work hand and glove with President Trump, and I love what DOGE is doing for our country. And when I ask you for support, I want to treat you with respect and be transparent about where your money is going. You are not an ATM. You are a valued member of our MAGA movement. You deserve to be treated that way. The Democrat Machine is firing on all cylinders to undermine, stonewall, and sabotage everything President Trump and DOGE are doing to make our government more efficient and cut waste. Of course, the DC Swamp can't have that. That's why they're mobilizing the courts, Deep State operatives, and Congressional Democrats to unleash a coordinated political hatchet job against the Trump Administration. Democrats are suing him. They 're pushing for partisan investigations. They're firing off hit piece after hit piece in the press. They're introducing legislation to block DOGE's access. Their plan is simple: 1. Attack the Trump Administration 2. Drag them into court battles 3. Slow them down at every turn 4. Use the press to attack their work 5. Unload millions to win the Midterms 6. Block Trump's ENTIRE legislative agenda That 's where House Republicans - and most importantly, YOU - can make a major difference. Democrats have already pledged 50 million dollars to win the Midterm elections, take control of Congress, and exploit that power to sabotage EVERYTHING President Trump is doing to save the country. That includes the critical work of DOGE. Cook Political Report just highlighted EIGHT toss-up districts that will determine who wins the House. If Democrats win even a few seats, it's over. They win the House. That's why I'm tapping our entire grassroots movement for help. _ | Again, I'm NOT pretending this money is going to fund DOGE or anything these other groups are alluding to. This money will go directly to the most important battleground districts in the country so we can win the Midterms and keep delivering on President Trump's MAGA agenda. name: Team Heartland Patriots
subject: Millions of Americans could lose their health coverage
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Heartland Patriots (LucasKunce
body:
Please sign on now to protect Medicaid and every American’s access to healthcare today »
#
Peter,
**Right now, out-of-touch politicians in DC are considering a plan to cut billions of dollars from Medicaid** — the program that provides life-saving health coverage for the elderly, pregnant women, and millions of other Americans — **as part of their “big, beautiful bill.”**
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/signup/hp-petition-20250608?t=1&akid=8991%2E614464%2E6tWX-p)
**[SIGN ON NOW: PROTECT MEDICAID](https://act.lucaskunce.com/signup/hp-petition-20250608?t=2&akid=8991%2E614464%2E6tWX-p)**
Let’s be clear: **Every American deserves access to the healthcare they need — and this proposal is a direct attack on the ability to access that care.**
These cuts would force rural hospitals and clinics to close, leaving people across the country without access to critical healthcare in their communities. They would leave patients in nursing homes — who are often already struggling to afford that care — stranded without many other options.
**Millions of Americans would lose their healthcare coverage — all so these greedy politicians can fund massive tax breaks for their billionaire buddies.**
So right now, we need people like you to speak out. We need to tell the Senate that we won’t stand for any cuts to Medicaid or any attacks on our ability to access healthcare.
**That’s why we’re urgently asking:[Will you join our call to protect Medicaid and every American’s access to healthcare today? This is our chance to show real solidarity across the country on this issue, and we’d be so grateful for your help.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/signup/hp-petition-20250608?t=3&akid=8991%2E614464%2E6tWX-p)**
**[SIGN ON NOW: PROTECT MEDICAID](https://act.lucaskunce.com/signup/hp-petition-20250608?t=4&akid=8991%2E614464%2E6tWX-p)**
Thanks for all your help, Peter.
Heartland Patriots HQ

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hp-email-footer?refcode=em20250608-8991-footer&t=5&refcode2=8991_614464_6tWX-p&akid=8991%2E614464%2E6tWX-p)**

| Peter, I know it’s a Sunday, so I’ll try to keep this quick.

Already, thousands of Virginians have rallied behind our message: protecting our rights, lowering costs, improving our schools, and keeping our communities safe. But with just days to go until our general election, we need your help more than ever.

National experts have named our race a total toss-up, and we can expect Republican PACS to pour millions into Virginia to try to sway the outcome.

That’s why your support is crucial. Every dollar you contribute will help us band together against the flood of outside money and continue spreading our message of progress and opportunity for all Virginians.

---

Congressman Tim Burchett **[clashed with CNN's Kaitlan Collins](https://substack.com/redirect/712484cc-57b5-4506-bb04-457ac3197296?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** during a live interview on the network about President Donald Trump and Elon Musk's "war" over the Big Beautiful Bill and its true effects on the country.
Burchett stood his ground!
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/712484cc-57b5-4506-bb04-457ac3197296?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[](https://substack.com/redirect/712484cc-57b5-4506-bb04-457ac3197296?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Burchett told Collins that the Trump/Elon spat would blow over soon and be inconsequential to the bigger picture. "The whole thing is bogus! Two weeks from now, nobody will be talking about it. Y'all wil lbe finding something else to run the country down about, **[it's a shame that the media seized upon this](https://substack.com/redirect/712484cc-57b5-4506-bb04-457ac3197296?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** because America is more worried about paying more taxes right now if we don't pass the Big Beautiful Bill," Burchett said.
Collins disagreed, "I don't think it's the media's fault that the president and the richest man in the world are in an open war right now."
The conversation pivoted to the effects and implications of the Big Beautiful Bill on average Americans. Republicans say it will lower taxes while Democrats say it removes crucial social safety nets that many rely on.
Burchett set the record straight on whether Medicaid and Medicare would be affected by Republican cuts. **["That's been disproven so many times!"](https://substack.com/redirect/712484cc-57b5-4506-bb04-457ac3197296?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** he told Collins. "The Democrats have fought us every time we want to cut out waste, abuse and fraud, you have a healthy man who is drawing a Medicaid check, that's wrong!"
Collins tried to interrupt but Burchett wasn't having it. "They need to work and you all need to quit allowing that lie to be facilitated!"
Watch the heated interview here:
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/712484cc-57b5-4506-bb04-457ac3197296?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

# First National Guard troops arrive in Los Angeles
[](https://substack.com/redirect/b3b7e86d-10cd-4172-8c4c-e35fea7ad189?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
President Donald Trump **[deployed 2,000 California National Guard troops](https://substack.com/redirect/78d627b0-2a63-4608-afca-6b50511fc3d9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** to Los Angeles on Sunday to respond to anti-I.C.E rioters, overriding Democratic Gov. Gavin Newsom's objections
* **The first National Guard troops arrived in Los Angeles early Sunday morning** \- **[Video from ABC 7](https://substack.com/redirect/4625c97c-d1c0-4923-97ca-30172f803361?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** showed vehicles stopping in front of the Hall of Justice near City Hall in downtown LA, following President Trump's order to deploy 2,000 troops to the city.
* **The deployment followed two days of violent protests and riots in response to ICE raids** \- The National Guard mobilization came after parts of downtown Los Angeles erupted in riots on Friday in response to federal immigration enforcement operations that resulted in multiple arrests.
* **Trump criticized local Democratic leaders while praising the Guard's response** \- The president blasted LA Mayor Karen Bass and California Governor Gavin Newsom for being "unable to handle the tasks" of restoring order, while Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth announced the Guard was being mobilized "IMMEDIATELY" to support federal law enforcement.
| | POLL

# Trump makes hero's entrance to UFC 316
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/ce3ba7e9-c2a2-4767-8e89-3826d7fa0994?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
At UFC 316, Saturday, **[President Donald Trump walked ringside](https://substack.com/redirect/ce3ba7e9-c2a2-4767-8e89-3826d7fa0994?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** at the Prudential Center to Kid Rock's "American Badass" while the audience erupted in "USA!" chants, greeting celebrities like Mike Tyson and Joe Rogan along with random fans during his arrival.
* **High-profile Trump family members and administration officials attended the event** \- The president was accompanied by Ivanka Trump, Eric Trump, Secretary of State Marco Rubio, and Acting New Jersey Attorney Alina Habba, showing strong family and political support at the sporting event.
* **Notably absent was Elon Musk, who had accompanied Trump to previous UFC events** \- The SpaceX billionaire, who previously joined Trump at UFC fights, was not present following his public feud with the president earlier in the week when he made "deranged posts" attacking Trump on social media platform X.

Collins disagreed, "I don't think it's the media's fault that the president and the richest man in the world are in an open war right now." The conversation pivoted to the effects and implications of the Big Beautiful Bill on average Americans. Republicans say it will lower taxes while Democrats say it removes crucial social safety nets that many rely on. Burchett set the record straight on whether Medicaid and Medicare would be affected by Republican cuts. he told Collins. "The Democrats have fought us every time we want to cut out waste, abuse and fraud, you have a healthy man who is drawing a Medicaid check, that's wrong!" Collins tried to interrupt but Burchett wasn't having it. "They need to work and you all need to quit allowing that lie to be facilitated!" First National Guard troops arrive in Los Angeles President Donald Trump to Los Angeles on Sunday to respond to anti-I.C.E rioters, overriding Democratic Gov. Gavin Newsom's objections The first National Guard troops arrived in Los Angeles early Sunday morning \- showed vehicles stopping in front of the Hall of Justice near City Hall in downtown LA, following President Trump's order to deploy 2,000 troops to the city. The deployment followed two days of violent protests and riots in response to ICE raids \- The National Guard mobilization came after parts of downtown Los Angeles erupted in riots on Friday in response to federal immigration enforcement operations that resulted in multiple arrests. Trump criticized local Democratic leaders while praising the Guard's response \- The president blasted LA Mayor Karen Bass and California Governor Gavin Newsom for being "unable to handle the tasks" of restoring order, while Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth announced the Guard was being mobilized "IMMEDIATELY" to support federal law enforcement. | | POLL Will anti-I.C.E riots match the severity of the 2020 BLM riots? | ? ? ? Trump makes hero's entrance to UFC 316 | | ---|---|--- At UFC 316, Saturday, at the Prudential Center to Kid Rock's "American Badass" while the audience erupted in "USA!" chants, greeting celebrities like Mike Tyson and Joe Rogan along with random fans during his arrival. High-profile Trump family members and administration officials attended the event \- The president was accompanied by Ivanka Trump, Eric Trump, Secretary of State Marco Rubio, and Acting New Jersey Attorney Alina Habba, showing strong family and political support at the sporting event. Notably absent was Elon Musk, who had accompanied Trump to previous UFC events \- The SpaceX billionaire, who previously joined Trump at UFC fights, was not present following his public feud with the president earlier in the week when he made "deranged posts" attacking Trump on social media platform X. * PolitiBrawl is a reader-supported publication. name: Charlie Kirk, Turning Point USA
subject: They couldn’t cancel this tour...
body:
One more reason to believe America’s not done yet
\- This tour went somewhere no one thought we’d reach - The Left’s strongholds are crumbling - This generation is choosing freedom - The comeback is happening — and YOU made it possible - This wasn’t just noise... - Packed crowds. Roaring students. The Left? Speechless. - We’re beating the Left. On their turf.

| | | [](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=6d4d170ee45c4050a79ba543817a1fb8&_e=x0WQZX2YeudBqpB6qRChXHzdf9JhgK6uvWkCd_JNC0wPQ-76sLO5aRiFgDglhbDjljQXvLJqeobeWCXnFZbbIWNa-d3ZEccNBT0MwunR0CtSvud_1B6rbO6EMEmkiXq8kNr7lOvuChR_2KMXjJkFX6Hhj2bl5Y0laBFJ7M6oQdPJPhVGiYhhP613fEzqn-YoZAPX8z5AaF8DAdZKBcD38gin49LrQbUBa7hzKH9cmTxdySAtJApytAS8DMNT7KmhBzn_3VV1oyDs8BMBhc9PVvTZWE248f31CovI4bUDNrNgn0EriKR2TGVyrNBqClFO)
---
Fellow Patriot, I’ve written a lot of messages to patriots like you over the years... but never one quite like this.Because I’ve never had this much good news to share. And I’ve never felt this much urgency to say one thing: **THANK YOU.** I don’t know if you’ve ever felt something just... _shift..._ while it was happening... But this spring on the American Comeback Tour?**I did.** And if you were standing where I stood — listening to the crowd roar before I walked up to the “Prove Me Wrong” table at our Spring Finale at UC Riverside...You would’ve felt this generational shift in real time, too.
---
[](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=6d4d170ee45c4050a79ba543817a1fb8&_e=x0WQZX2YeudBqpB6qRChXHzdf9JhgK6uvWkCd_JNC0wPQ-76sLO5aRiFgDglhbDjljQXvLJqeobeWCXnFZbbIWNa-d3ZEccNBT0MwunR0CtSvud_1B6rbO6EMEmkiXq8kNr7lOvuChR_2KMXjJkFX59Juxk12cRr-84MY-_PtddU7kgS2kwoIq1shMYOStHy73JLIgOMrZ2Acz9_E_LRvJa0x9TxGHpPSthCtjzaEhjEVMs4MuJfU-rwnHPK6euAUJM2jRX00ILWMkUmX91weOEiLIdVDdtoUhhvdYC1TA2wNLgmU2TccCHRRVnOWueE)
---
You may have seen the photos from the tour... caught some of the videos... read about the chants of _“USA!”_ from students...But let me tell you exactly what happened this spring:**Patriots like you helped launch the most powerful Conservative campus tour in American history.** It was BOLD. It was LOUD. And it was PACKED... From beginning to end.**And the American Comeback Tour’s Spring FINALE was in a place no one thought we’d ever touch: California.** The same state where Leftist professors shut down free speech... where mobs scream in the faces of our students... where conservative ideas aren’t just unpopular — _they’re punishable offenses._ And yet... We filled the campus quad at UC Riverside.Students came early. Packed shoulder-to-shoulder. Ringing around the “Prove Me Wrong” tent to hear the truth.And when I walked on stage and said: “It’s okay to love America...”They ERUPTED.
---
[](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=6d4d170ee45c4050a79ba543817a1fb8&_e=x0WQZX2YeudBqpB6qRChXHzdf9JhgK6uvWkCd_JNC0wPQ-76sLO5aRiFgDglhbDjljQXvLJqeobeWCXnFZbbIWNa-d3ZEccNBT0MwunR0CtSvud_1B6rbO6EMEmkiXq8kNr7lOvuChR_2KMXjJkFXy0o9rYvEewNBxaU3jDj16M1Kk_28fi_FKEaMoYT3SEDCVgYtIQLSmDjDBfsOxalm9j2UISiWBENwwRsPcePhebWfT6X7HKnb6a89dgyq77fjiX1mnYubppwYJoS6B_3EaSYxTUGuqqryvKdhmXQU7gqUBGg5N8q5WDp2W17C9pS)
---
It wasn’t just another great tour stop... **It was a BREAKTHROUGH.** Because this wasn’t the first stop in California this spring — it was the fourth IN MAY and the SIXTH of the tour.And each one was just as powerful...This wasn’t just another campus tour. _It was a line in the sand._ And every single time, the story was the same: The Left tried to dismiss us, hurl their obscenities, or shut us down...The students showed up anyway. And the truth rang out louder than ever before._But let’s back up for a moment..._ Because while the California finale may have been the last stop of the Spring, this all started months ago.**Back in January, when we were laying out the calendar... These were the goals: Go BIGGER. Go BOLDER. Go DEEPER into Leftist territory.** We wanted to hit not just the battleground states... Not just the safe “Red” states... _But the ones the Left claimed as their own._ And then? We wanted to plant our flag. And because of patriots like you — that’s exactly what we did.**Let me give you the big picture:** ✅ 21 American Comeback Tour stops✅ Overflow crowds with thousands of students✅ Deep “Blue” states seeing young people rising up ✅ The Left rattled by a movement of young people who are rejecting them... _wholesale._ Students who had never once heard a Conservative speak in person... _finally heard one._ Students who were afraid to wear a cross or sport an American flag... _were loud, proud, and unashamed to stand for God and their country._ Students who were told they were alone... _realized they were part of something BIGGER than they ever imagined._ There are too many great stories, moments and pictures to pack into this one message...**But just look at what we're accomplishing:**
---
[](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=6d4d170ee45c4050a79ba543817a1fb8&_e=x0WQZX2YeudBqpB6qRChXHzdf9JhgK6uvWkCd_JNC0wPQ-76sLO5aRiFgDglhbDjljQXvLJqeobeWCXnFZbbIWNa-d3ZEccNBT0MwunR0CtSvud_1B6rbO6EMEmkiXq8kNr7lOvuChR_2KMXjJkFX_Ha-Svaybhan2V04YLZ9NnFyUGipzo8p2EY1dEpr3RoaTP_3Y5W1KGbDw9HzRR1MiyuPOae6DxoCILfGBlWcK0wiW12te-BkdKHU3xJLFZohmQKQZZ2AJHFy4HiyOR12vtY_tiQkdvZAizSoafbop3El2TWHOvwqftx81n-iZSd)
---
_Fellow Patriot, this is why we fight..._ Not just for campus speeches. Not just for questions from students.**But for a generation-wide cultural reset — playing out in real time, in real places, in the hearts of real students.** This is why the American Comeback Tour matters.And I hope you know:**It wouldn’t exist without patriots like****YOU****.** Your support — your prayers, your belief in our students, your generous gifts — made all of this possible.Patriots like you put us on the road. You brought us onto these campuses. You sent us to the students who needed to hear our America First message the most.**You weren’t just watching this tour... You were powering it.** Now, let me be totally honest: _We’re not done. Not even close._ The American Comeback Tour may have just ended for the spring...But this summer?We’re preparing for something even BIGGER. We’re already mapping out new stops in the fall. New states. New targets in Leftist territory to break through.We’re building a plan to take this movement to the next level — to complete the cultural shift that started on this tour.To reach more students. To change more hearts and minds. **And raise up the boldest, most unapologetic generation of freedom-loving Americans since the founding of this country. **_I’m going to need you fighting alongside me, Fellow Patriot._ Because now that we’ve tasted victory... now that we’ve seen what’s possible...We can’t back down. Not now. _Not ever._ Let’s keep building. Let’s keep pushing. Let’s keep GOING.The American Comeback is well underway. Let’s make sure it keeps rolling strong.**I can’t say “thank you” enough to the patriots like you who’ve helped make Turning Point USA the force it is today.****Together, we’re SAVING America... one student at a time.**
---
For America, Charlie Kirk
Founder & CEO
Turning Point USA
---
[](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=6d4d170ee45c4050a79ba543817a1fb8&_e=x0WQZX2YeudBqpB6qRChXHzdf9JhgK6uvWkCd_JNC0wPQ-76sLO5aRiFgDglhbDjljQXvLJqeobeWCXnFZbbIWNa-d3ZEccNBT0MwunR0CtSvud_1B6rbO6EMEmkiXq8kNr7lOvuChR_2KMXjJkFX1l2Wl08VGilfBtQRcK4aR2CXELyBORHKcaY2k602lwlWEHzsrOncpNVldkI-vXvDvBy6Csl-MO5GfB0oXli0nVzZ-QM9r9GWPahD-CvLLwZbuBN63VDuYXgxGj99sK5mHFMScp4wsxLNlUyLgKV-vAS8KftEPMXL5jQOwqMjs8Z)
---
**P.S.** I’ve been doing this for over a decade now, Fellow Patriot... **_But I’ve never seen momentum like THIS._** These students are ready. They’re hungry for the truth and our ideas.This country is shifting — In a way you can genuinely FEEL.**And the Left is terrified.** You can see it in their mobs... The way they lash out at us and our students... But it’s not working anymore.**Because you and I are reaching the next generation — campus by campus, state by state, student by student.** **And that’s why I’m asking you to stand with us again today. Because every dollar you give today will be MATCHED.** That means your gift of $50 becomes $100... $100 becomes $200... And your impact? DOUBLED. _So, if you believe in this mission... If you’re proud of what we’re accomplishing... If you want to go even BIGGER this fall..._ Then this is your moment to step up and fuel what comes next.Let’s take the American Comeback Tour to every corner of this country when it returns this fall... Let’s train thousands of students this summer at our events to become the LEADERS we need for our America First movement...And let’s make sure the Left NEVER thinks they can own the hearts of America’s young people again. **[We’re not done. Let’s go DEFEAT the Left once and for all. Make your gift to Turning Point USA today and have your impact immediately DOUBLED.](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=6d4d170ee45c4050a79ba543817a1fb8&_e=x0WQZX2YeudBqpB6qRChXHzdf9JhgK6uvWkCd_JNC0wPQ-76sLO5aRiFgDglhbDjljQXvLJqeobeWCXnFZbbIWNa-d3ZEccNBT0MwunR0CtSvud_1B6rbO6EMEmkiXq8kNr7lOvuChR_2KMXjJkFXw6g06g3trMIYCRuMzFQGPjQX8FgIO_LE4Ei-twsuf0mpmSc5LH43qSlt36us28yKJmP1NJp5EPlsVnKfkh64wnSEb_FMMz7ER9TN8KlionogKp40Z49kqE3csZW8iYXjX_QaOpGyPMgWZhD_QBJj6FVU0FArPjMB6ySQsl57uPD)**
---
[ **Support Turning Point USA &**
**DOUBLE Your Impact**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=6d4d170ee45c4050a79ba543817a1fb8&_e=x0WQZX2YeudBqpB6qRChXHzdf9JhgK6uvWkCd_JNC0wPQ-76sLO5aRiFgDglhbDjljQXvLJqeobeWCXnFZbbIWNa-d3ZEccNBT0MwunR0CtSvud_1B6rbO6EMEmkiXq8kNr7lOvuChR_2KMXjJkFXy8NGWDeNiQgvwJNF3h1UJ8rxCojK8wo7onF_fFOngyVQd5CdIK88XrjvnAWMQWDN1Roke6p-yOcBlI53amfrpDAwsvuTZ6W1_UuJhld_rSCpgS5jOOziDNMhSNdV5Ii48QLH-u5mzS5RFNm9efMWq83VILZTuL1jKRq94gaT_kH)
---
4940 East Beverly Road
Phoenix, Arizona 85044
[Unsubscribe](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_s=6d4d170ee45c4050a79ba543817a1fb8&_t=VQJZ8LhiXDDs6Xy07klEE7GA7L5vy46P_sok6OfQLJizLNSPNFzuuCdtwuOykyv2Ep4xKcl-Wl9b3Ph6zjgqqa6IiJWJr1ZYYsAjI8alhhdYRWyxof-HW9FSVQWIbXCr)

I’m proud to be one of the leading lawyers in the ongoing fight to defend democracy and protect voting rights in the face of Republican extremism. Right now, we’re seeing Donald Trump and his cronies launch an assault on our government and the rule of law. They’re spreading dangerous lies, attacking our institutions, and working to undermine our democracy for _their_ own gain. **But here’s the truth: We’re not going to let them get away with it.** My friends at the Democratic Association of Secretaries of State are standing up to these ongoing threats, but they can’t do this alone. They need Democrats like you in this fight, friend. That’s why I’m asking you to make a donation to the DASS Legal Fund today. Your support – right now – will help Democrats defend democracy in the courtroom and stop attacks on our elections. Here’s a good link to donate: [**https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dass-legal-q2-2025**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109210185/550350076/-1751156451?refcode=em-6.8.25-all-rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhN2E3ZGMzZi03OTQ0LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rz8G8g1xRX7eqUGBriiH0UnmleWJNZ4oaKINtLmXCuE=) __If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: __ | | | **[Chip in $10 Now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109210186/550350107/-1751156451?refcode=em-6.8.25-all-rs&express_lane=true&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhN2E3ZGMzZi03OTQ0LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rz8G8g1xRX7eqUGBriiH0UnmleWJNZ4oaKINtLmXCuE=)**

clean_body: | = = Hi there, it’s Marc Elias. I’m proud to be one of the leading lawyers in the ongoing fight to defend democracy and protect voting rights in the face of Republican extremism. Right now, we’re seeing Donald Trump and his cronies launch an assault on our government and the rule of law. They’re spreading dangerous lies, attacking our institutions, and working to undermine our democracy for their own gain. But here’s the truth: We’re not going to let them get away with it. My friends at the Democratic Association of Secretaries of State are standing up to these ongoing threats, but they can’t do this alone. They need Democrats like you in this fight, friend. That’s why I’m asking you to make a donation to the DASS Legal Fund today. Your support – right now – will help Democrats defend democracy in the courtroom and stop attacks on our elections. subject: I’d love to meet you, Derek:

Derek, I’m excited to share that later this summer, I’ll get to meet a supporter like you and thank you personally for the work you’re doing. [**You can use this link to make a contribution and to enter the contest.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-meet-obama-sweepstakes-2025?amount=3&refcode=em_20250608_3662_fr&refcode2=3662_22930333_r0_-h6&akid=3662%2E22930333%2Er0_-h6) Right now, with everything going on, it would be easy to give in to fear or despair — but people like you aren’t doing that. You’re showing up at town halls in your communities, holding your representatives accountable, and maybe even planning to run for office yourself. I’m excited to say thank you in person. [**If you use this email to chip in $3 or any amount that feels right to you to support the DNC’s work, you’ll be automatically entered to meet with me. Team,

We wanted to tell you about a few ways you can get involved in fighting MAGA extremism!
* [**Volunteer with the PA Dems!**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109211606/550353868/624412622?source=EM_NBI_PADM_20250608_ENG_GetInvolved_0_3MO_PADems_NA_NA_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ3MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZTVjMjllZi03YTQ0LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MZ8MRIEB5Heupeo7liRRu-3fQ-OQsbGJT8GSkZVc06o=&emci=ad5c29ef-7a44-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=ae5c29ef-7a44-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=25616296) If you’re angry about what 2025 and a second Trump administration has brought, and will bring in the future, put those feelings into action. Our fight is far from over — in fact, it’s just beginning. Find ways to get involved as we gear up for our 2025 statewide elections and the 2026 midterms!
* [**Find an event near you!**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109211607/550353869/-551224848?source=EM_NBI_PADM_20250608_ENG_GetInvolved_0_3MO_PADems_NA_NA_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ3MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZTVjMjllZi03YTQ0LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MZ8MRIEB5Heupeo7liRRu-3fQ-OQsbGJT8GSkZVc06o=&emci=ad5c29ef-7a44-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=ae5c29ef-7a44-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=25616296) This is a great way to meet other Democrats near you, lean on each other for support, and find a community!

Thank you,

PA Dems

name: Royce White
subject: They want you silenced. I say: stand up.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ROYCE WHITE FOR SENATE
body:
This is bigger than politics. This is about the soul of our nation. | [ ](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=3f90b4259e364cf58e4618bdd78dc7dd&_e=zFJOvXjUDTeFsGFd2JjTLUDMwyR9DGNK2_sTUPC5tFpdNHdOq8tUdgISKzvb7HUDK1MhKR07SG2DV6n9cDnaLCWeUSfQSklxpQ97r81p83_ri4C1yu6xFcwbbjSfeJ6ZH1Z8ShVdSTOIfIIGN1B4My_1V45ZqglVagqP6TrTk_9UlNJS2P15krZz9mqQvOzWkfrXn80I8zurvLYPVRH8Rdin2d-9FPp_4dmuW03w3dDP88PEfyYcgOuDzpZuV8zNFfzUML26fe2HP60i_mSIoIFn3kOo3HNRtM7UfXK-NjfEYw2ssP5KL9EXNHBy4xvxXjiYxDhwDfxXUc_ECeENEA%3D%3D)
---

Peter,

They want you to sit down. To stay quiet. To forget you ever had a voice in this fight. **I won’t let that happen.**

I’m a Black Republican, and that alone makes me a threat to the ruling class.

Because when someone like me breaks from the script, the whole narrative begins to _crumble_.

My end-of-quarter deadline is here—and believe me, **they’re watching**.**The regime, the media, the RINOs — they want this movement silenced.**

But I’m not backing down. I’m doubling down.

They don’t just want our silence — they want our submission. They want to trade **God for government, freedom for fear, truth for comfort.**

**[I say no.](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=3f90b4259e364cf58e4618bdd78dc7dd&_e=zFJOvXjUDTeFsGFd2JjTLUDMwyR9DGNK2_sTUPC5tFpdNHdOq8tUdgISKzvb7HUDK1MhKR07SG2DV6n9cDnaLCWeUSfQSklxpQ97r81p83_ri4C1yu6xFcwbbjSfeJ6ZgYnYhvy0rXBW3szpq9MeAmORL8_JCo_C9UcnqQQ9_3BoHOZ1iREzEZ69T1QEIsrjkZb0KYvoiQV6Y-KWqymh_MYiMXtItCuNSzMmGY2KwV7Xv4ru2A9_fVo_sK9vABGN8BuqKA4v8_Mq5t3akyjOV7YCxDr4fMgTiSuORWRpU5TVjKWSYfLvKzS6bE-NFql00e7SvoPL-R1eEYeeyttiIg%3D%3D)**

This is a spiritual war dressed in political clothing. It’s not Left vs. Right anymore — it’s **Good vs. Evil**.

**[If you believe in something higher — in liberty, in sovereignty, in truth — then stand with us.](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=3f90b4259e364cf58e4618bdd78dc7dd&_e=zFJOvXjUDTeFsGFd2JjTLUDMwyR9DGNK2_sTUPC5tFpdNHdOq8tUdgISKzvb7HUDK1MhKR07SG2DV6n9cDnaLCWeUSfQSklxpQ97r81p83_ri4C1yu6xFcwbbjSfeJ6ZgYnYhvy0rXBW3szpq9MeAmORL8_JCo_C9UcnqQQ9_3BPG6DEqcyjeNJrGrLWmjTbUUXypgBqYlQWGbhTNZA9XzGxInHHOUTZLNGohYgTSB_3xXNbdjMBMxUUICHJpC6-N2EYiwfdrIy-mtwVQxe5fZlVaxquNkUEvyAcT0l4fo0_cG_iBXnc8raK6i2TOsfaa-T86a6Mj1kU08BP_KpaMw%3D%3D)**

Not with the elites. Not with the sellouts. Not with the RINOs.

| [ **SUPPORT REAL REPUBLICANS** ](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=3f90b4259e364cf58e4618bdd78dc7dd&_e=zFJOvXjUDTeFsGFd2JjTLUDMwyR9DGNK2_sTUPC5tFpdNHdOq8tUdgISKzvb7HUDK1MhKR07SG2DV6n9cDnaLCWeUSfQSklxpQ97r81p83_ri4C1yu6xFcwbbjSfeJ6ZH1Z8ShVdSTOIfIIGN1B4My_1V45ZqglVagqP6TrTk_9UlNJS2P15krZz9mqQvOzWoOSLVvMDeL9elyHiIOExacu0sIHOycJnqeiH3Cb_zE79DfrGIKr9wz44rm8jgymA1kpc7uMUwGA7m709dlp-bOzg2R9l3kEdALYXVGbyzp8gcF7poRhhwvewEFLi1GMggsWb0D5IK7v6ENmFCuAZrA%3D%3D)
---
[ **PRIMARY THE RINOS** ](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=3f90b4259e364cf58e4618bdd78dc7dd&_e=zFJOvXjUDTeFsGFd2JjTLUDMwyR9DGNK2_sTUPC5tFpdNHdOq8tUdgISKzvb7HUDK1MhKR07SG2DV6n9cDnaLCWeUSfQSklxpQ97r81p83_ri4C1yu6xFcwbbjSfeJ6ZH1Z8ShVdSTOIfIIGN1B4My_1V45ZqglVagqP6TrTk_9UlNJS2P15krZz9mqQvOzWRB8r3XlDpUSXwOPFGRHjKUcjAFx__3Us8exMAXHFLkKE_4sTFqpXFSa5cKVmnROeXyG9GCPmo9ONpU4vQTTDyWkUct4YzWGwr0g0iYdviqAJZQG0PdhDWtddD4MhiOtzKmPPPe6Hy1yH7qKarMguEQ%3D%3D)
---

We’re building a movement they can’t control.

Not of corporate puppets, but of warriors.

Midnight is the cutoff. Let’s make it count.

Thank you,
**Royce White**
_Black. Christian. American. Unbought._

[](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=3f90b4259e364cf58e4618bdd78dc7dd&_e=zFJOvXjUDTeFsGFd2JjTLUDMwyR9DGNK2_sTUPC5tFpdNHdOq8tUdgISKzvb7HUDK1MhKR07SG2DV6n9cDnaLCWeUSfQSklxpQ97r81p83_ri4C1yu6xFcwbbjSfeJ6ZH1Z8ShVdSTOIfIIGN1B4My_1V45ZqglVagqP6TrTk_9UlNJS2P15krZz9mqQvOzWJFUnNq_Gm_txGyim6BRhfJgSRVuUWpolM3q3oQl0B0CrTQFJBiH0KF0VqlPc04rgXkrEeeFYPxQNuJLby7qsEhDFmVjO-1Wg995RP9zuJLY1mjkbOnVUo65m37doqIMqS8bs4vYpsZtoeKOXqHst0Q%3D%3D)

Meet Royce White:

**Born and raised in the Twin Cities, Royce White was the son of a single mother and started playing sports at the age of 5 years old. Living in various neighborhoods growing up, much of his family remained in the Rondo community, where he spent much of his time and received schooling. White excelled at basketball and recieved a scholarship to play basketball at the University of Minnesota, and later transferred to Iowa State. He would go on to make Dean's List while receiving All Big-12 first-team honors and many other basketball awards.

_After being selected 16th overall by The Houston Rockets in the NBA draft, White began to voice concerns about the NBA’s collective bargaining agreement (CBA), specifically regarding mental health policy, which at the time did not exist. Eventually, his concerns became a public dispute between White and the NBA. This resulted in White demanding that the NBA, as a representative of the global corporate community, take up the responsibility of spearheading the mental health conversation – not just posturing through press statements, but through policy._

Royce then went on to win two championships in Canada before moving over to play Big 3 Basketball. White appeared at a game in a t-shirt that read “Free The Uyghurs.” After a game-winning basket, White did a post-game interview on CBS, where he called for 2 Million Uyghurs to be freed and released from concentration camps. As the season went on, White would touch on taboo topics such as Gain of Function Research, The Federal Reserve, Julian Assange, Edward Snowden, Larry Hoover, Jeff Fort, Muammar Gaddafi, The Great Reset, Ivermectin, Me Too, etc.

Now, Royce White is running for Senate in Minnesota to take down the Radical Left. Republicans have not seen recent success in Minnesota, but Royce's campaign is different: a grassroots movement that's sick of the Radical Agenda pushed by Far Left Democrats Tina Smith and Ilhan Omar. Royce needs your help to pull off a fourth quarter comeback victory and FLIP Minnesota Red for Republicans.

** [**PASS ROYCE AN ASSIST**](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=3f90b4259e364cf58e4618bdd78dc7dd&_e=zFJOvXjUDTeFsGFd2JjTLUDMwyR9DGNK2_sTUPC5tFpdNHdOq8tUdgISKzvb7HUDK1MhKR07SG2DV6n9cDnaLCWeUSfQSklxpQ97r81p83_ri4C1yu6xFcwbbjSfeJ6ZH1Z8ShVdSTOIfIIGN1B4My_1V45ZqglVagqP6TrTk_9UlNJS2P15krZz9mqQvOzWibZCSC3x2wXmxHoB2gDpbRiIiMmNxpCnLwbj4qJdGrnX9fVIC5YR3e7r88lhqRce9176J81Bg8EXjP1kO2fwjHo8z4Qz0bquuEWtaj7f_GqEqEYiqKzA5CWRjjIDZSoKlNf4Ku6kjce5tBCVAVZGEw%3D%3D)

---

PAID FOR BY ROYCE WHITE FOR SENATE
P.O. Box 5473 Hopkins, MN 55343

---

[ ](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=3f90b4259e364cf58e4618bdd78dc7dd&_e=zFJOvXjUDTeFsGFd2JjTLQLihEP6JjWU5gNZ2eY2hyMvKWQyywv8uLopobmIlcpAP3DLb590rFu6Hm4dLb7vMqechDUlCNyA6tBjG7xibD9tKVQiasXyQb2eZlUKsEzxDepi5uPqb_pImS-oRXmkPO-TyYQprAqUJdYKaXjrI2Ezl6v1cgGrVrvPBTdBb29RHIHxZ4c2QDcLEPtTeROYyiHnvIbIkCmpelK_ByUU3VXiAM2u9jEGARn1kdbGjEXG)

name: The Team at the Long Run
subject: Big Money vs. Grassroots
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Long Run PAC, P
body:
#
Friend, our fundraising model is simple.
Instead of relying on billionaires or corporate interests to write us a huge check, we rely on grassroots supporters like you.
Supporters who chip in $5, $10 or whatever they can afford at the time. It may not sound like much, **but trust us, it adds up.**
Just a couple months ago, Trump and Elon Musk tried to buy a supreme court seat here in Wisconsin. They dumped tens of millions of dollars into the race to support their far-right candidate.
But thanks to grassroots contributions and organizing on the ground, we were able to drive Susan Crawford’s campaign to victory and solidify a pro-choice, pro-democracy majority on the court.
It’s a reminder to all of us that we can beat the billionaires on the far-right if **everyone** does their part when the time comes.
Now, as we prepare to win even more elections across the nation over the next year and a half, we are asking for your support today.
[**Make a contribution to The Long Run today and help us build the warchest we need to elect progressive changemakers up and down the ballot. Every dollar you can give adds up when everyone chips in.**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-june25.d8eHX2&refcode=em250608-1-300&t=1&akid=5566%2E196590%2EKBzRnk)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._

| | Dear Fellow American,

Do you approve of President Trump's performance?

President Trump has ignited a conservative revolution! So far, he has:
* Secured our borders, deported criminal illegal aliens, and informed so-called sanctuary cities that their federal funding is at risk if they continue to violate America's immigration laws.
* Exposed billions of dollars of government waste, fraud, and abuse.
* Smacked down the woke agenda...just to name a few!

Now, like wounded animals, the Washington establishment and the mainstream media are lashing out at the President . . . the Left is completely unhinged!

We must support President Trump in the face of these attacks now more than ever. Which is why I invite you to sign The Heritage Foundation's **National Vote of Confidence for President Trump**.

**You can submit your Vote of Confidence at the secure link below.**

subject: They hate what I’m doing
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TIM SHEEHY FOR MONTANA
body:
Washington’s a different kind of warzone—high stakes, relentless battles, and no shortage of enemies. But I’m no stranger to tough fights. | [](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=a0b67eec5f644f5ab9c71ebb9d96d84e&_e=QZ52njKVhz3CEx4OLHcSoEDcOBGMeWN1MMhOJDlhgFKJmIpkfVtyeHeU0SHojE-zZ75hD7W6ny42siWIYk8wPfnEgdtlAXr9dkKD8w6UfwqUTv4XxiZP8jRBDvISYr3denPe0oeJ510Z0-lwrMIZBQPwPau7PS63RlkTarENga_27eRC2M4NuZ1LGedOu0AbDI1EQus4xSpCW0rXrUMtinOCCL5bEhNwjsD5iwCsNLyEGL_gj0chdzxE0D2A_nUGOOIe3yUJRgtzLeNqBg9_ZR6A_yRcYQJrPI41g8idGEWpLNt0mDQxVJ0HFvyMdu8AUyPld9kQNnQcaEjYOBSaJKtPcJt_6j-2z34HMAfznE8QtUFqMa3HVIwN8z5srtgkkfR7Ch9isy7YK03ziXtN-w%3D%3D)
