[**MESSAGE FROM NAVY SEALS TIM SHEEHY, ELI CRANE, & RYAN ZINKE**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=a0b67eec5f644f5ab9c71ebb9d96d84e&_e=QZ52njKVhz3CEx4OLHcSoEDcOBGMeWN1MMhOJDlhgFKJmIpkfVtyeHeU0SHojE-zZ75hD7W6ny42siWIYk8wPfnEgdtlAXr9dkKD8w6UfwqUTv4XxiZP8jRBDvISYr3denPe0oeJ510Z0-lwrMIZBQPwPau7PS63RlkTarENga_27eRC2M4NuZ1LGedOu0AbDI1EQus4xSpCW0rXrUMtinOCCL5bEhNwjsD5iwCsNLyEGL_gj0chdzxE0D2A_nUGJkc3yENnRStDEB6rya8co8klGKrq0X-5fHT355D2tOEbGzmU34KNfaUYq08ePXiFNYuNsa8P_oYNOhkq9iq6yTNFYCBLg6Tg1OFP8QpgPA9PQgm3yoBprh9ZtNgVJIeutOtLuqALdURsNRSWfvJSCQ%3D%3D)

Fellow Conservative,

Congress is like a battlefield—thrilling, mission-driven, and full of conflict. At least no one’s shooting at us here. Well, not with guns, anyway.

The out-of-touch fake news “reporters” at Politico decided they would target the most dangerous men in DC: Navy SEALs.

We all ran for office because we were still hungry to protect and fight for our country. The war may be over for us, but we can’t abandon the part of our lives that made us who we are. We were part of an elite unit on the front lines, and Congress is somewhere else we can be out front doing something special for our country.

_**Yet the liberal news corporations, who _desperately_ want to keep the status quo, _attacked us_ for wanting to take on the Swamp establishment and business-as-usual going on in our government.**_

All of us –**Navy SEALs Tim Sheehy, Eli Crane, and Ryan Zinke** – are teaming up to stop career politicians and lazy bureaucrats, but we’re up against more than just the DC establishment. We’re up against the liberal media, RINOs, and revenge-seeking Democrats.

**We need you, Fellow Conservative to keep us on the frontlines, bucking the corrupt status quo! **[](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=a0b67eec5f644f5ab9c71ebb9d96d84e&_e=QZ52njKVhz3CEx4OLHcSoEDcOBGMeWN1MMhOJDlhgFKJmIpkfVtyeHeU0SHojE-zZ_ZsPuOCWI5pO3ew8tBlNtK8lMrSe4i3niVVIdEy9Q7t7MHVAmumz80S9CAzvJmEdB27ykP-Gg4-H3MXt67YYA0kNu8XQuLX46muJ5D3oXnRaHGTS0egVM3BUhMCSRUe02wWUn5yNH9q77LxnvaUwWsiGSCllb2yi6Pty7UhnPmsPOhMmT26oBEkeKIphNsn8_mFbARh1hsykYNhJUsGnEGtoKa6_3vCKlZnuIoAGrj8bW6XfDDhgRxJx1tKKtYpJfa2JmzO9KWDPtmIZx3IiLAo_amcIMEfl5QHg0dnBDurrizbNjEgR2Ma4cm20Z-W7Xbji4ZXJZzoACQu_kE0Xg%3D%3D)

→ If the media wants to attack us for having a “warrior mentality” – the mentality to do whatever it takes to achieve a mission...

→ If the media wants to attack us for supporting President Trump’s MAGA movement – the movement that says we can make America great...

→ If the media wants to attack us for taking on the government corruption, fraud, and waste – which has been exposed by Trump’s DOGE department...

_**...Then they don’t understand WHY Donald J. Trump and ALL of us were elected!**_

As SEALs, we all shoot straight with each other. We’re going to shoot straight with you, too: **This hit piece was horsesh*t and part of a larger conspiracy to silence us.**

_**If they can silence us, they can sure as hell silence you.**_

**[We’ll stand in their way and hold them back, but we need you to send resources to the frontlines of the MAGA movement right this minute:](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=a0b67eec5f644f5ab9c71ebb9d96d84e&_e=QZ52njKVhz3CEx4OLHcSoEDcOBGMeWN1MMhOJDlhgFKJmIpkfVtyeHeU0SHojE-zZ75hD7W6ny42siWIYk8wPfnEgdtlAXr9dkKD8w6UfwqUTv4XxiZP8jRBDvISYr3denPe0oeJ510Z0-lwrMIZBQPwPau7PS63RlkTarENga_27eRC2M4NuZ1LGedOu0AbDI1EQus4xSpCW0rXrUMtinOCCL5bEhNwjsD5iwCsNLyEGL_gj0chdzxE0D2A_nUGe5bp4xAGGXP7mX-PVduQs5-ZVqaPwobuscIV2qE0WQ5k4YjUUgj63g0axxFgzQuWmKWNCY_56xfxAVUdbuutZIFbsmtiartRtotkO2HuqbcpOJ7TjdEPaC0L_8v70hClkxroSfQWEZ-fwkSiZ7hQCg%3D%3D)

_Three Navy SEALs Serving in Congress_ _

"
"I SERVED AS A NAVY SEAL, BUILT ONE OF THE LARGEST AERIAL FIREFIGHTING COMPANIES IN AMERICA CREATING OVER 200 MONTANA JOBS, AND STARTED A VETERAN-LED CATTLE RANCHING AND FEEDING OPERATION. WHETHER IT WAS IN WAR OR BUSINESS, I SEE PROBLEMS AND SOLVE THEM. AMERICA NEEDS CONSERVATIVE LEADERS WHO LOVE OUR COUNTRY. I'M RUNNING FOR THE U.S. SENATE BECAUSE OUR CAMPAIGN IS ABOUT SERVICE, DUTY, AND COUNTRY -- NOT POLITICS AS USUAL."

clean_body: Washington’s a different kind of warzone—high stakes, relentless battles, and no shortage of enemies. But I’m no stranger to tough fights. | Fellow Conservative, Congress is like a battlefield—thrilling, mission-driven, and full of conflict. At least no one’s shooting at us here. Well, not with guns, anyway. The out-of-touch fake news “reporters” at Politico decided they would target the most dangerous men in DC: Navy SEALs. We all ran for office because we were still hungry to protect and fight for our country. The war may be over for us, but we can’t abandon the part of our lives that made us who we are. We were part of an elite unit on the front lines, and Congress is somewhere else we can be out front doing something special for our country. Yet the liberal news corporations, who desperately want to keep the status quo, attacked us for wanting to take on the Swamp establishment and business-as-usual going on in our government. All of us –Navy SEALs Tim Sheehy, Eli Crane, and Ryan Zinke – are teaming up to stop career politicians and lazy bureaucrats, but we’re up against more than just the DC establishment. We’re up against the liberal media, RINOs, and revenge-seeking Democrats. We need you, Fellow Conservative to keep us on the frontlines, bucking the corrupt status quo! → If the media wants to attack us for having a “warrior mentality” – the mentality to do whatever it takes to achieve a mission... → If the media wants to attack us for supporting President Trump’s MAGA movement – the movement that says we can make America great... → If the media wants to attack us for taking on the government corruption, fraud, and waste – which has been exposed by Trump’s DOGE department... ...Then they don’t understand WHY Donald J. Trump and ALL of us were elected! As SEALs, we all shoot straight with each other. We’re going to shoot straight with you, too: This hit piece was horsesht and part of a larger conspiracy to silence us. If they can silence us, they can sure as hell silence you. Thank you so much for your time, Tim Sheehy Eli Crane Ryan Zinke Three Navy SEALs Serving in Congress | " "I SERVED AS A NAVY SEAL, BUILT ONE OF THE LARGEST AERIAL FIREFIGHTING COMPANIES IN AMERICA CREATING OVER 200 MONTANA JOBS, AND STARTED A VETERAN-LED CATTLE RANCHING AND FEEDING OPERATION. WHETHER IT WAS IN WAR OR BUSINESS, I SEE PROBLEMS AND SOLVE THEM. AMERICA NEEDS CONSERVATIVE LEADERS WHO LOVE OUR COUNTRY. I'M RUNNING FOR THE U.S. SENATE BECAUSE OUR CAMPAIGN IS ABOUT SERVICE, DUTY, AND COUNTRY -- NOT POLITICS AS USUAL." * | PAID FOR BY TIM SHEEHY FOR MONTANA Use of Tim Sheehy, Eli Crane, and Ryan Zinke's military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/29454?t=1011&refcode=email-20240608_v&akid=8718%2E5885482%2EIz4kA_ ]Our Revolution logo

Peter Willis,

Donald Trump just doubled down on his vow to defund public media, sending
Congress an official request to slash $1.1 billion in funding it ALREADY
approved. This is an all hands on deck moment – the House is expected to
vote NEXT WEEK.

If he succeeds, NPR, PBS and countless local stations could face
devastating cuts. But we've got a chance to stop this attack, and we need
your support now.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/29455?source=email-20240608&t=1061&akid=8718%2E5885482%2EIz4kA_ ]Headline: Congress finally gets Trump's request to codify DOGE cuts to
NPR, PBS, foreign aid

Our Revolution is mobilizing pressure in key battleground states –
including Maine, where Senator Susan Collins has already expressed deep
concerns about these cuts. We're ramping up quickly, hiring seasoned
organizers on the ground to bolster our campaign and rally public support.

in right now to help fuel our fight to save public media from Trump's
reckless attack?

Public media isn't just a collection of channels or stations – it's vital
infrastructure for a vibrant democracy.

That's exactly why Trump and the far-right MAGA Republicans are so
determined to silence it. In their eyes, anything that challenges their
misinformation narrative needs to go – even if it means defunding trusted,
independent journalism and educational programs for kids.

Right now, every vote matters – but especially in states like Maine, where
Senator Collins has already raised concerns and has a proven track record
of breaking ranks before, standing up to her party when pressure from
constituents mounts. Our Revolution is laser-focused on activating the
grassroots strength needed to influence key lawmakers to vote no, but we
have to move now.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/29455?source=email-20240608&t=1060&akid=8718%2E5885482%2EIz4kA_ ]Headline: Sen. Collins signals opposition to Trump administration plan
for cuts

In 2017, when Trump first proposed slashing funding for public media,
grassroots pressure was crucial to convincing Congress to reject severe
cuts. Together, we protected public media from the chopping block then –
and we can do it again.

But we can't seize this critical opportunity without your support today.
Your donation immediately powers critical on-the-ground organizing

mobilize voters, hold targeted events, and confront lawmakers face-to-face
when it matters most.

like Senator Collins a powerful message they can't ignore?

When we organize, we win.

clean_body: | | | | | | | Peter - I've been in some really rough situations in the past, but this could be the hardest mountain I'll have to climb... My Democrat opponent, Abigail Spanberger, was RAKING IN hundreds of thousands of dollars while I was barred from accepting any campaign donations during Virginia's legislative session! I'm not kidding - a Soros-backed group even dropped $500K on my head all in one shot, Peter! This is a BAD situation that will spiral out of control if folks like you don't step up to the plate! I am coming to you with a heartfelt plea; I'm doing everything I can to win this race and keep logging conservative wins. But I know I can't do this all on my own; it's going to take all of us, and I really meanall of us , to win. If you can't afford to send in even just $17, I'll understand. That's right - all I 'm asking is that you send in $17 or more to help me catch up with my Democrat opponent's LUDICROUS fundraising numbers! Look, this race is TIED. There's ONLY one thing holding me and my team back from winning right now; my liberal opponent's crazy cash advantage. Thank you for being a crucial part of my team, Peter. I can't tell you how much I appreciate your support! -Winsome Earle-Sears Mother Marine Lt. Governor of Virginia | Immigrant. Marine. Mom. Small Business Owner. Lieutenant Governor. name: Katie Porter
subject: Here’s how we fix Congress
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Truth to Power PAC
body:
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/9?t=1&akid=39787%2E3422442%2ESgb4t-)
Current California Governor candidate and former Member of Congress, Katie Porter, here.
Congress is broken. The biggest chunks of most families’ budgets—housing, child care, and college—have gotten more and more expensive, but Congress hasn’t made major investments in generations to bring these costs down for Americans.
**If we want Congress to work better, we need to change the kind of people we elect.**
In my first term in Congress, I started an organization called Truth To Power that supports a new generation of leadership. Our candidates reject the broken status quo and are willing to go against the grain if that’s what it takes to deliver for families.
We only endorse people who put the public interest above their own self interest. Every single one of our federal candidates commits to supporting a ban on Congressmembers trading individual stocks.
With all the insider deals and shady business happening in the Trump White House, there’s a real opportunity for Democrats to earn voters’ trust—and win back the House—with a strong anti-corruption stance.
**[So I’m asking you today, will you chip in to support Truth To Power’s work and send a message to Congressmembers and candidates that we demand leadership that works in _our_ interest?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_ttp_20250608_1_ak?refcode=em20250608-39787&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=39787_3422442_Sgb4t-&akid=39787%2E3422442%2ESgb4t-)**
[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_ttp_20250608_1_ak?refcode=em20250608-39787&refcode2=39787_3422442_Sgb4t-&akid=39787%2E3422442%2ESgb4t-)
Thanks for considering,
Katie

Former U.S. Congresswoman Katie Porter founded Truth to Power to support the campaigns of her fellow Democrats. Truth to Power supports candidates who will stand up to Donald Trump, fight to lower costs, and protect the environment. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/truth-to-power-1?refcode=em20250608-39787&amounts=&t=2&refcode2=39787_3422442_Sgb4t-&akid=39787%2E3422442%2ESgb4t-)**

Trump’s so-called “Big Beautiful Bill” is anything but.

**For weeks, New Dems have been sounding the alarm because this MAGA-backed plan will:**
-Strip healthcare from millions of vulnerable Americans
-Slash food assistance for tens of millions of families with children
-Raise costs across the board for the poorest 10% of U.S. households

Let’s be clear: this is a calculated attack on America’s most vulnerable so that MAGA Republicans give tax breaks to the top one percent, enriching their already wealthy backers. **We cannot let this stand and _we don’t plan to._**

We urgently need your help to hold them accountable and reverse these policies before too much damage has been done.

**[With House Republicans barely clinging to their razor-thin majority, we need to fight back. clean_body: We’re waiting on you to help us fight back! >> | = Trump’s so-called “Big Beautiful Bill” is anything but. For weeks, New Dems have been sounding the alarm because this MAGA-backed plan will: -Strip healthcare from millions of vulnerable Americans -Slash food assistance for tens of millions of families with children -Raise costs across the board for the poorest 10% of U.S. households Let’s be clear: this is a calculated attack on America’s most vulnerable so that MAGA Republicans give tax breaks to the top one percent, enriching their already wealthy backers. We cannot let this stand and we don’t plan to. name: Voter Verification 2025 Polling Team
subject: The Republican Senate Majority supports the MAGA agenda
body:
Please see a special message from our sponsor:

Unsubscribe
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xul=2qq8ny363wdaxf3eu1ztoj2052tdnu6ipemkz63ru1sawtnn9r1ltikeefj42eagnnhnbonffzf3624fqprlr83ce2odkci2jedjk92xr&__stmp=sxjrd7&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh

Please see a special message from our sponsor:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sxjrd7&__onlt=t

Dear Fellow American,

I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter.

It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future.

A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution.

That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a National Survey on Presidential Selection.

By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders.

You can complete the National Survey on Presidential Selection by using the link below:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=17x64w94u6jf1g6n96nenm37wejlesa01ds5xyuk69nbqok1h75vjudhmy21byzd2mx14wuuiabrmzgeic6ukkfl9tvrnuncyki7llrkrju8iww9e3b74rzhuxaqpw50pdk88s2k9pe09b9go3hirtgkt16ofs&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sxjrd7&__onlt=t
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sxjrd7&__onlt=t

Do you think that most Americans understand how the Electoral College works and its role in preserving free and representative government?

YES
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sxjrd7&__onlt=t

NO
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sxjrd7&__onlt=t

For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government.

But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.

This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty.

Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching millions of Americans in all 50 states.

These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include:

Teaching millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;"

Reaching over six million households and businesses nationwide with Imprimis, Hillsdale's free digest of liberty;

Promoting constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;

Sending millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and

Restoring excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale's American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers.

Your answers to the National Survey on Presidential Selection will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College.

And this is especially important in this critical time for America's future.

So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our National Survey on Presidential Selection and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time.

You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=17x64w94u6jf1g6n96nenm37wejlesa01dbea2cc443yxez88gnivpy60ve9oegmuedw89l4ncxoolhoox96fm62loowrpkoibx4ekoicjqldrqdec1z5jkf7ecnt6e001z5upvdek49l22ml3ck57ozwo419h&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sxjrd7&__onlt=t
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sxjrd7&__onlt=t

And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.

The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work.

Please represent your state and take the National Survey on Presidential Selection today. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn

President, Hillsdale College

Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

Unsubscribe from messages sponsored by Hillsdale College.
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xul=2qq8ny363wdaxf3eu1ztoj2052tdnu6ipemkz63ru1sawtnn9r1ltikeefj42eagnnhnbonffzf3624fqprlr83ce2odkci2jedjk92xr&__stmp=sxjrd7&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh

To Unsubscribe by email, please reply to this message with Unsubscribe as the Subject Line.
Unsubscribe from all communications
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xul=2qq8ny363wdaxf3eu1ztoj2052tdnu6ipemkz63ru1sawtnn9r1ltikeefj42eagnnhnbonffzf3624fqprlr83ce2odkci2jedjk92xr&__stmp=sxjrd7&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh
.

Privacy Policy
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=33g5tc4p3i8ugq89qb1u59kvfvqbfjuexisvrwxe0r3gumsra79nducwblt0inoayutaafazvi9yykh6ckbirnsoivuyhtzbbie20bo5shbr8bua9ceqnh0vuru4yzs2rme4w8l8cbpu0rod523vtn&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sxjrd7&__onlt=t

| Hi team — Senator Cory Booker and Gov. Tim Walz both delivered unforgettable speeches at our California Democratic Party Convention last weekend. **They laid it out plain and simple:_The eyes of the nation are on California_**. What we do next will decide if Democrats can flip the U.S. House and stop Donald Trump’s MAGA agenda in its tracks. _Now it’s on us to prove that we can turn this momentum into action on the ground_. That means organizing in battleground districts from the Central Valley to Orange County, and everywhere in between. **[We can’t afford to waste a single day. clean_body: everything that’s at stake | = | Hi team — Senator Cory Booker and Gov. Tim Walz both delivered unforgettable speeches at our California Democratic Party Convention last weekend. They laid it out plain and simple:The eyes of the nation are on California. What we do next will decide if Democrats can flip the U.S. House and stop Donald Trump’s MAGA agenda in its tracks. Now it’s on us to prove that we can turn this momentum into action on the ground. That means organizing in battleground districts from the Central Valley to Orange County, and everywhere in between. = = = = = = Cory Booker said it best: “We are going to show that the power of the people is greater than the people in power. And now, more than ever, this nation needs your light.” And Gov. Walz reminded us of everything that’s at stake here in California , saying that all the evidence shows the path to taking back the U.S. House, “runs right through California.” CADEM organizers are already knocking doors, training volunteers, and working to open new regional offices. But how fast and how far we can run depends on whether we can hit our urgent post-convention fundraising goal. = = Let’s show the country what it means to be California Strong. — The entire California Democratic Party | | = Our Democratic leaders are working hard to make California a better place to live. From fighting for good-paying jobs, combating climate change, to expanding healthcare access so all Californians can lead safe, healthy, prosperous lives — California’s Democratic leaders turn progressive ideas into meaningful action. NEXT: He tried to overturn the election, fueled an insurrection, and installed loyalists across government to shield himself from accountability.
NOW: He’s targeting ActBlue with an Executive Order that instructs the DOJ to target and investigate it.

name: Morghan Cyr
subject: It's so nice to meet you, friend 👋
body:
I'm Rep. Nellie Pou's Campaign Manager.

| |
---
Team, My name is Morghan Cyr, and I'm just getting started here as Nellie's new Campaign Manager. I’m the daughter of a school teacher and an auto maintenance manager. I most recently worked at a veterans nonprofit that advocates on behalf of the post-9/11 generation of veterans. I’ve got two cats, am a fan of all kinds of music, and enjoy a good cup (or three) of coffee. I also have a deep belief that politics should be about service, not ego. That’s why I joined this team. When I got the call to work for Congresswoman Pou, I said yes without hesitation. She’s the kind of leader who does the right thing – even when it is hard. That’s rare. We've got our work cut out for us, friend. I don't need to tell you what's at stake in this election and how Nellie's campaign is one of the top-targeted races by Mike Johnson and House Republicans. We don't have big money megadonors like Mike Johnson and the NRCC, **but we've got something better: our grassroots supporters like you.** With your help, we will beat them once more next fall. **[So here’s my first ask: Can you chip in $25 or whatever you're able to today? ### About Nellie Pou
Nellie Pou is the first Latina to represent New Jersey in Congress, and will be a target for the NRCC in 2026. As a mother and grandmother, Nellie knows what New Jersey families are facing and will continue to bring down costs while creating good-paying jobs. Nellie has dedicated her entire life to the community that raised her, and in Congress she will do the same. | [Donate Now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109218188/550376324/-3691057?refcode=emailfooter&refcode2=c7d510f8-8b44-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ms=250608_mc_intro&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMTU0MDYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYzdkNTEwZjgtOGI0NC1mMDExLThmN2MtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=wnNuX9c0EMIjaAz_3xjkFA2xHunhP2QEQqCcRWbNUaY=) | [Give Monthly](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109218189/550376325/-3691057?recurring=true&refcode=footermonthly&refcode2=c7d510f8-8b44-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ms=250608_mc_intro&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMTU0MDYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYzdkNTEwZjgtOGI0NC1mMDExLThmN2MtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=wnNuX9c0EMIjaAz_3xjkFA2xHunhP2QEQqCcRWbNUaY=)

clean_body: I'm Rep. Nellie Pou's Campaign Manager. | | Team, My name is Morghan Cyr, and I'm just getting started here as Nellie's new Campaign Manager. I’m the daughter of a school teacher and an auto maintenance manager. I most recently worked at a veterans nonprofit that advocates on behalf of the post-9/11 generation of veterans. I’ve got two cats, am a fan of all kinds of music, and enjoy a good cup (or three) of coffee. I also have a deep belief that politics should be about service, not ego. That’s why I joined this team. When I got the call to work for Congresswoman Pou, I said yes without hesitation. She’s the kind of leader who does the right thing – even when it is hard. That’s rare. We've got our work cut out for us, friend. I don't need to tell you what's at stake in this election and how Nellie's campaign is one of the top-targeted races by Mike Johnson and House Republicans. We don't have big money megadonors like Mike Johnson and the NRCC, but we've got something better: our grassroots supporters like you. With your help, we will beat them once more next fall. = | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately. Thanks for being part of this. I’m glad to be here — I'm fired up! — Morghan Cyr Campaign Manager, Team Pou | | | ---|---|--- About Nellie Pou Nellie Pou is the first Latina to represent New Jersey in Congress, and will be a target for the NRCC in 2026. As a mother and grandmother, Nellie knows what New Jersey families are facing and will continue to bring down costs while creating good-paying jobs. Nellie has dedicated her entire life to the community that raised her, and in Congress she will do the same. | = | = ---|--- Follow Nellie | | | ---|---|--- Checks may also be mailed to: Nellie Pou for Congress - PO BOX 2696, Paterson, NJ, 07509 Paid for by Nellie Pou for Congress Email is a critical way to stay in touch with our supporters, but if you wish to unsubscribe, you may do so . name: Rick Larsen
subject: Happy World Oceans Day!
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Citizens to Elect Rick Larsen
body:
Here in Washington's Second Congressional District, we have some of the most pristine oceans and aquatic ecosystems in the world.
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109218218/550376497/-201694504?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNjU4NTcxYy04YzQ0LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Qvd0Lvon870zbSiocl_QKrUsod7vJWsGipsuPjX_sm0=&emci=10e7d2a5-9840-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=3658571c-8c44-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=9494239)
---

| | Happy World Oceans Day! **Here in Washington's Second Congressional District, we have some of the most pristine oceans and aquatic ecosystems in the world.** Our communities have grown around these waters. For generations, Washingtonians have relied on these waters for transportation, jobs, and recreation. Take, for example, the Washington state ferry system. Since the ferry system was created 72 years ago, ferries have been an essential part of our infrastructure. You, your family, or your neighbor may plan your day around a ferry, and our entire community relies on ferries every day to connect us across the Puget Sound and its many inlets, straits, and bays. **Washington state relies on ferries because they are a necessity, not a luxury, and that is why I continue to fight for funding for our vital infrastructure. **Federal investment in ferries means more jobs for the women and men who build and maintain ferries in Northwest Washington and more reliable and more frequent service for passengers who rely on our ferry system to get to and from work, school, the store and recreational opportunities. **But on World Oceans Day, we cannot just remember what the oceans do for us, we have to act to protect them.** >From preventing ocean acidification to restoring marine habitats, I am committed to driving change and protecting our coastline and oceans. In Congress, I work hard to bring funding to our community to help restore our aquatic ecosystems. Just this year, I reintroduced the Northwest Straits Marine Conservation Initiative Reauthorization Act of 2025 and co-sponsored the West Coast Ocean Protection Act of 2025 and the Resilient Coasts and Estuaries Act of 2025. Today is the day to celebrate our oceans, and together, we can ensure they remain protected for generations to come. More soon, _Rick_ | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution to Rick Larsen instantly:

In yet another escalation of authoritarianism, Donald Trump has now begun deploying the National Guard to "settle unrest" caused by what he claims are "violent protests." But here's the truth: the "unrest" he's citing is nothing more than ordinary people peacefully protesting illegal ICE raids. That's not conjecture. It's fact--admitted to by both the Los Angeles Police Department and the U.S. Department of Justice. And unless we organize nationally across the political spectrum, including active duty military members, we invite a total dismantling of our republic. **Let 's Address This.**
**Support** _**Let 's Address This**_**as a paid subscriber and let 's continue to build this movement for justice together.**
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..OmHLVUTTFFucDIDKRY8ghR6RraampO2FgEoS5gEBkdw?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=165478700)
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/130481ed-01ac-4e30-bbe5-af9a6e678056?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Residents of Los Angeles protest illegal ICE raids on June 7.
While you see images of citizens allegedly creating violence, remember that any response from the American people here is just that -- a reaction. A reaction to ICE violating the U.S. Constitution. In a March memo, the DOJ instructed ICE officers to proceed with raids even when it was "impracticable" to obtain a signed warrant--including violating the sanctity of people's homes without a warrant. Their own words:
> Given the dynamic nature of enforcement operations, officers in the field are authorized to apprehend aliens upon a reasonable belief that the alien meets all four requirements to be validated as an alien enemy. **This authority includes entering an alien enemy's residence to make an AEA apprehension where circumstances render it impracticable to first obtain a signed notice and warrant of apprehension and removal.**
Let's be crystal clear: this is unconstitutional. The Fourth Amendment of the U.S. Constitution explicitly protects against unlawful searches and seizures. ICE raids without a judicial warrant are illegal. And deploying the U.S. military to enforce those illegal raids is not just unconstitutional--it is tyrannical. Yet Trump is doing both anyway. Therefore, here's what every member of the armed forces needs to know.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/02166370-6cac-42eb-a905-d1d7bb2a0d34?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
DOJ Memo from Pam Bondi to ICE, instructing ICE to violate the US Constitution to arrest innocent people.
### A Note to U.S. Armed Forces
I say this as a human rights lawyer and a citizen of this republic: you have sworn an oath to the Constitution, not to a man. Articles 90 and 94 of the Uniform Code of Military Justice (UCMJ) prohibit the execution of unlawful orders. So if anyone in the chain of command tries to gaslight you into storming civilian neighborhoods in defense of an illegal policy, remember: "_I was just following orders_ " was not a valid defense at Nuremberg, and it will not be a valid defense here either.
This is critical, especially as Trump promises to escalate military deployment on Americans. Last November I wrote that President Biden must act to secure the civil service from political interference by updating and strengthening the Posse Comitatus Act ("PCA"). Most people have never heard of this piece of legislation because it has not been relevant in 150 years beyond combatting drug trafficking. But sadly, it will be critical to prevent Trumpian fascism from expanding use of the PCA--[especially as he promises to deploy the military to quell civil and peaceful protest](https://substack.com/redirect/379f7351-5a02-455d-b1df-90a5437c0568?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). As the Department of Justice [explains](https://substack.com/redirect/5c24ffb4-000e-496a-9767-2a731d7538a6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg):
> The Posse Comitatus Act of 1878, which removed the military from regular civil law enforcement, was enacted in response to the abuses resulting from the extensive use of the army in civil law enforcement during the Civil War and the Reconstruction.
I called for Biden to pass additional restrictions, however possible, to prevent the military from being misused, and work with the Pentagon to ensure the military cannot be turned into a personal security force by future administrations. Unfortunately, those changes were never made. Therefore, it is that much more critical now that we continue to pressure elected leadership to do everything in their power to oppose the deployment of the U.S. military on the American people. This is especially crucial as known alcoholic and Secretary of Defense Pete Hegseth has threatened to deploy U.S. Marines on the American people.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/e2da3154-7d45-402b-81e3-c674ede53a7d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
So, if you are in the armed forces and want to know whether what you are being asked to do is legal, here's a tip: if it would've been considered a war crime in Iraq, Afghanistan, Vietnam, or WWII, it is a war crime here. Supporting those who order you to violate our Constitution--yes, that includes Donald Trump--is not loyalty. It is indefensible and contrary to your oath. And if you are unsure on how to proceed, then please utilize the resources at your disposal by visiting the [GI Rights Hotline](https://substack.com/redirect/9b9d5516-6e7f-4827-85f1-88ca079575ec?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) or by calling 1-877-447-4487 for free and confidential guidance.
**If you 're finding value in this analysis, join us as** **a free or paid subscriber.**
[ Upgrade to paid](https://substack..OmHLVUTTFFucDIDKRY8ghR6RraampO2FgEoS5gEBkdw?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=165478700)
### Even the LAPD Knows ICE Is the Problem
Finally, let us not not ignore how brazen this is. Even the LAPD, not exactly a bastion of progressive law enforcement, has admitted that the protesters were peaceful and that ICE provoked the confrontation. When even the LAPD is pointing fingers at ICE, you know things are dire. Here's the press release issued by the LAPD in response to yesterday's events:
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/5ade3b7d-c77e-4d9f-90e7-56fd3f4c9234?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
LAPD Statement on what they acknowledge were "Peaceful Protests" on June 7.
So what we're witnessing is not the military quelling violence. It is the military being used as a tool of political repression. And while the spectacle unfolds on our screens--cue the media coverage of "clashes" and "unrest"--Trump continues with his sleight-of-hand distractions. And what is he distracting us from?
* A healthcare bill that will strip coverage from 11 million people
* A policy that will cause 51,000 preventable deaths per year, per Yale research
* A tax scheme that will funnel more billions into the pockets of billionaires
* A claim from Musk that Trump is in the Epstein files (that Trump won't release)
* An American-made complicity in genocide in Gaza, as the Freedom Flotilla with Greta Thunberg nears a violent blockade
* Outbreaks of measles, salmonella, and whooping cough--caused by deregulated food and collapsed public health oversight
* A coordinated campaign to build a dystopian "Christian" nationalist regime

This is not theory. This is the present moment in the United States.
### Fascism Isn't Coming. It's Here.
Let me say it plainly: fascism isn't on the way--it has arrived. It wears the mask of national security, the armor of "law and order," and the flag of patriotism wrapped in a cross, but at its core, it is a rotting, gaslighting, anti-democratic force that seeks to crush dissent, criminalize compassion, and erase the constitutional protections that define our Republic.
So what do we do?
We organize, we educate, and yes--we prepare.
* **Everyone:** Stock up on non-perishable food and clean water. Not because fear should paralyze us, but because readiness empowers us.
* **Immigrants:** Ensure your loved ones know where you are at all times. If you are undocumented, ensure your immigration attorney knows your location at all times.
* **Everyone:** [Call your members of Congress](https://substack.com/redirect/d5eda2b3-cf0f-492a-adfc-89dc868cd981?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)--every day if you have to. Demand they defend the Constitution, block this healthcare atrocity, and stop the illegal deployment of troops on our own streets.
* **Veterans:** [Join organizations like Common Defense](https://substack.com/redirect/389902aa-3918-4874-9dc3-4de4dcfa2780?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), who are working relentlessly and nationally to uphold justice, peace, and the United States Constitution.
* **Everyone:** Invest in immigration justice orgs, independent media, and activists who aren't bought and sold by corporate cash.
* **Military Servicemembers:** Visit the [GI Rights Hotline](https://substack.com/redirect/9b9d5516-6e7f-4827-85f1-88ca079575ec?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) online or by calling 1-877-447-4487 for free and confidential guidance on conscientious objection
* **Everyone:** Vote, organize, and run for office yourself.

This is why I do this work. This is why I write. I am an American Muslim, an immigrant, and a human rights lawyer--and I will not sit quietly as my nation of citizenship descends into fascism. Finally, if you believe in this work--if you believe in truth, dignity, and justice--I need your support. Subscribe to _[Let's Address This](https://substack.com/redirect/81c13ca6-3273-4bbf-812d-50ee1ec76928?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)_, share this article, and help us elevate the truth above the noise. Because together, we still have power. And we must use it before it's too late.
**I am doing everything in my power to stave of fascism in the United States. And I cannot build without your support. Join our movement as a free or paid subscriber and let 's build together.**
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..OmHLVUTTFFucDIDKRY8ghR6RraampO2FgEoS5gEBkdw?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=165478700)

---|---|---

body:

| | |
---
Hey, Derek, John here.
I was just in Northwest PA, listening to folks who’d be stuck paying the price for the GOP’s budget – and let me tell you, they’re _mad as hell._ 🤬
Trump’s “big, beautiful bill” would:
* Make the _biggest_ cuts ever to Medicaid and food stamps – kicking millions off health care and taking food from hungry kids

* Hike costs for working families, including higher electric bills

* Trap students in deeper debt

* Add *TRILLIONS* to the deficit just to keep giving the ultra-wealthy tax breaks that even _our kids_ will still be paying for

Republicans think they can hand out goodies to their rich pals and leave working folks in PA holding the bag. _**They’re wrong.**_
**We need to show the strength of our grassroots team and make the GOP think twice about doing whatever Trump wants.[Before it's too late, will you rush $5 to show the GOP we won’t be steamrolled by Trump’s agenda?](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/51315?t=2&akid=10130%2E434096%2ER_M8Qp)**

John ❤️

name: Jeff Merkley
subject: World Ocean Day
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jeff Merkley for Oregon
body:
Our oceans are under assault from many directions, including plastics and climate change.
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109218487/550377690/150430950?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTMyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYzI0NjU4MS04ZDQ0LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=52OTjKEbrI7QEKbi7FWly8dz0d2FpEgXAsmk2x8n3Ew=&emci=9842f768-1143-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=fc246581-8d44-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=7731215)
---

| | Today is World Ocean Day, a day to recognize the importance of our global oceans because without healthy oceans, there's no healthy future. Oceans cover 70% of our planet. The world's oceans sustain life on Earth — from the water we drink to the air we breathe to the food we eat. **But today, they're under assault from many directions, including plastic pollution and climate chaos.** First: We need to end the world's addiction to fossil fuels. Every day we delay, we flood the world with more dangerous, planet-warming carbon dioxide and other gases from burning fossil fuels. Trump is making this problem worse by doubling down on oil and gas giveaways. But fossil fuels aren't the only force harming the planet. **We also need to take on the plastic pollution crisis with a bold, binding global plastics treaty.** We are drowning in plastics that are littering our beaches, destroying our ecosystems, and poisoning human health. clean_body: Our oceans are under assault from many directions, including plastics and climate change. | | | | Today is World Ocean Day, a day to recognize the importance of our global oceans because without healthy oceans, there's no healthy future. Oceans cover 70% of our planet. The world's oceans sustain life on Earth — from the water we drink to the air we breathe to the food we eat. But today, they're under assault from many directions, including plastic pollution and climate chaos. First: We need to end the world's addiction to fossil fuels. Every day we delay, we flood the world with more dangerous, planet-warming carbon dioxide and other gases from burning fossil fuels. Trump is making this problem worse by doubling down on oil and gas giveaways. But fossil fuels aren't the only force harming the planet. We also need to take on the plastic pollution crisis with a bold, binding global plastics treaty. We are drowning in plastics that are littering our beaches, destroying our ecosystems, and poisoning human health. That's why in 2023, I held the Senate's first ever series of hearings on plastic pollution, and it's why I introduced the "Break Free From Plastic Pollution Act" — a bold, comprehensive plan to hold corporate polluters accountable and tackle plastic pollution head-on. We need action, and we need it now. And that's why I will always use every tool I have — from legislation to oversight to appropriations to speaking out — to ensure healthy oceans for generations to come. Onward! disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
| | | Some folks write you emails pretending to be President Trump.

**I won 't do that to you. **

Some folks pretend donations will somehow fund DOGE.

**I prefer to be honest with you.**

This is Steve Scalise. As your House Majority Leader, I work hand and glove with President Trump, and I love what DOGE is doing for our country.

And when I ask you for support, I want to treat you with respect and be transparent about where your money is going.

You are not an ATM. You are a valued member of our MAGA movement. You deserve to be treated that way.

**_[So that's why I 'm dropping into your inbox right now:](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=1f2c61ef00f74b2c9be6cf62c8862621&_e=AmH1hov6MaBhE5Il95ySkjapDQHjYCqPJYSc5dpdwAqWocyJgQRQvJJv5jurktJ2_doe-2DumkpQU5-ykmq3qXQGccK3sbiKCpL8UiR0Y65KxhKTEzivfw-iH3cEWKxK9rdEgeXtqvk6ON5urwhp3Z07sYHVA5-rC14_v7RvadMSZzfbq1RiWpm7OMWROXzm0nmLIuLstySNKFalNiCAfSM1RMYKyqGnxWShTobZTLdyDFPDi5AwKdoPXLDBFCCHE3_pGJDpm1lsEDOJoncghabP1dI4DCfwDeXCA5nVKGtaP0mxPGklHqdgfDDBqTE6fb3RNjuywL6xdDBZlKIoJJA6e5uwX9YHe1d29T8yQRRbNOQFpbmitqPhRfTeDgdnRfLewJl4Ip083n1qxVKyhQ%3D%3D)_**

The Democrat Machine is firing on all cylinders to undermine, stonewall, and sabotage everything President Trump and DOGE are doing to make our government more efficient and cut waste.

Of course, the DC Swamp can't have that.

That's why they're mobilizing the courts, Deep State operatives, and Congressional Democrats to unleash a coordinated political hatchet job against the Trump Administration.

_Democrats are suing him. They 're pushing for partisan investigations. They're firing off hit piece after hit piece in the press. They're introducing legislation to block DOGE's access._

Their plan is simple:
**1.** Attack the Trump Administration
**2.** Drag them into court battles
**3.** Slow them down at every turn
**4.** Use the press to attack their work
**5.** Unload millions to win the Midterms
**6.** Block Trump's ENTIRE legislative agenda
**That 's where House Republicans - and most importantly, YOU - can make a major difference. **

Democrats have already pledged 50 million dollars to win the Midterm elections, take control of Congress, and exploit that power to sabotage EVERYTHING President Trump is doing to save the country. That includes the critical work of DOGE.

Cook Political Report just highlighted EIGHT toss-up districts that will determine who wins the House. If Democrats win even a few seats, it's over. They win the House.

That's why I'm tapping our entire grassroots movement for help.

_**[If you can afford to do so, I 'm imploring you to pitch in a few bucks to save our House Majority - and President Trump's entire legislative agenda along with it.](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=1f2c61ef00f74b2c9be6cf62c8862621&_e=AmH1hov6MaBhE5Il95ySkjapDQHjYCqPJYSc5dpdwAqWocyJgQRQvJJv5jurktJ2_doe-2DumkpQU5-ykmq3qXQGccK3sbiKCpL8UiR0Y65KxhKTEzivfw-iH3cEWKxK9rdEgeXtqvk6ON5urwhp3Z07sYHVA5-rC14_v7RvadMSZzfbq1RiWpm7OMWROXzm0nmLIuLstySNKFalNiCAfSM1RMYKyqGnxWShTobZTLdyDFPDi5AwKdoPXLDBFCCHtRk9-doxJNA9vojAJTvew82F4lPJrWZBZOSMniqSuNdS-iKNkitDxfz-p58pCl90wiEdYs2TuARnrCGuV-o2fXvzrjmKGv1inEPuEENDplMNzwSBqZR7vFngp6EzECqpg_OFz7CSSb0nW_sVP45gSQ%3D%3D)**___

God bless you,

clean_body: | | | Some folks write you emails pretending to be President Trump. I won 't do that to you. Some folks pretend donations will somehow fund DOGE. I prefer to be honest with you. This is Steve Scalise. As your House Majority Leader, I work hand and glove with President Trump, and I love what DOGE is doing for our country. And when I ask you for support, I want to treat you with respect and be transparent about where your money is going. You are not an ATM. You are a valued member of our MAGA movement. You deserve to be treated that way. The Democrat Machine is firing on all cylinders to undermine, stonewall, and sabotage everything President Trump and DOGE are doing to make our government more efficient and cut waste. Of course, the DC Swamp can't have that. That's why they're mobilizing the courts, Deep State operatives, and Congressional Democrats to unleash a coordinated political hatchet job against the Trump Administration. Democrats are suing him. They 're pushing for partisan investigations. They're firing off hit piece after hit piece in the press. They're introducing legislation to block DOGE's access. Their plan is simple: 1. Attack the Trump Administration 2. Drag them into court battles 3. Slow them down at every turn 4. Use the press to attack their work 5. Unload millions to win the Midterms 6. Block Trump's ENTIRE legislative agenda That 's where House Republicans - and most importantly, YOU - can make a major difference. Democrats have already pledged 50 million dollars to win the Midterm elections, take control of Congress, and exploit that power to sabotage EVERYTHING President Trump is doing to save the country. That includes the critical work of DOGE. Cook Political Report just highlighted EIGHT toss-up districts that will determine who wins the House. If Democrats win even a few seats, it's over. They win the House. That's why I'm tapping our entire grassroots movement for help. _ | Again, I'm NOT pretending this money is going to fund DOGE or anything these other groups are alluding to. This money will go directly to the most important battleground districts in the country so we can win the Midterms and keep delivering on President Trump's MAGA agenda. If you agree this is a noble cause to support, please consider pitching in right now. God bless you, - Steve STEVE SCALISE House Majority Leader A personal note from Majority Leader Steve Scalise: I'm humbled to announce that I am your new House Majority Leader. My first order of business is checking in with our best supporters, so I just launched my new MAJORITY LEADER SURVEY for that specific reason. "I’d be honored to get your unfiltered thoughts, feedback, and opinions using this secure link."** | "RESPOND NOW →" Thank you, Steve Scalise House Majority Leader | | Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC. Team Scalise is committed to restoring a Conservative House majority and electing Conservatives across the country. Thank you for being a part of our movement. This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you are a member of the Team Scalise Conservative grassroots network. Contributions to TEAM SCALISE, or any participating committee, are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, national banks, labor unions, foreign nationals without "green cards," and federal government contractors are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and employer of each individual who contributes over $200 in a calendar year. You can donate via mail by sending a check to: 320 First Street SE 2nd Floor Washington, DC 20003

body:
| Fight for Reform is dedicated to electing Democrats, transforming our broken campaign finance system, and ending _Citizens United_ state by state. If you would like to get fewer emails, [**_click here._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59469?t=1&akid=23122%2E4449941%2EmUO4tQ) If you would like to unsubscribe, [**_click here._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59470?t=2&akid=23122%2E4449941%2EmUO4tQ) **WOAH. We’re weeping... with JOY!!** Donald Trump and the ENTIRE GOP tried every dirty trick in the book to RUIN the campaign for a Constitutional Amendment to OVERTURN _Citizens United_. They KNOW they would never win another election if they couldn’t BUY it. _But now we’re over the MOON!_ Raphael Warnock
Chuck Schumer
Amy Klobuchar
Bernie Sanders
Jamie Raskin
Mark Kelly

Now EVERYONE agrees we need to get RID of _Citizens United_! We must be dreaming!!

[**_Look, we REFUSE to spoil our golden opportunity. It would be a SLAP in the face of every Democrat fighting to see this through! name: Wendy Balodis
subject: Why EOQ matters
body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP33/1/95655/images/kaptur-email-header-2.png]

Hi there,

It's Wendy, from Marcy's finance team. I wanted to be honest with you, friend, and let you know that you'll be hearing from us a lot this month.

For starters, I know you probably think we already email you a lot... we're not going to deny that, but June is important. It's important because it's the end of the FEC fundraising quarter. That means in the middle of July, we'll have to report what we raised in the months of April through June.

It's a little bit of inside baseball, but these reports mean a lot. The press and our opponents pore over them and scrutinize them, looking for any signs of weakness as they make plans for the 2026 cycle.

So when we say " this end-of-quarter fundraising deadline is really important ," know that we're serious, and always happy to explain how your grassroots supports into the big picture of our fight back against the dark-money campaigns the NRCC is launching against us.

If you want to receive fewer emails, consider becoming a recurring donor to Marcy's re-election campaign. Recurring donors will only receive the most crucial campaign updates. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kaptur25_em?refcode=250608_wb_EOQstart_l1]

GIVE MONTHLY [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kaptur25_em?recurring=trueamp;&refcode=250608_wb_EOQstart_b1]

Chip in another amount [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kaptur25_em?refcode=250608_wb_EOQstart_b2]

Thank you so much, friend.

— Wendy Balodis
Kaptur Finance Team
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP33/1/95655/images/kaptur-email-headshot.jpg]

About Marcy Kaptur
Marcy Kaptur is a fighter for high-wage jobs, growing a workforce to meet the needs of the 21st century, and protecting our region’s most vital natural resource, the Great Lakes. She’s worked with both parties to secure investments in our communities and has been a true friend of veterans, seniors, first responders and working people. She’s a voice for us all in the People’s House.
Donate Now [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kaptur25_em?refcode=emailfooter&refcode2=6494c953-8f44-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c] Give Monthly [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kaptur25_em?recurring=true&refcode=footermonthly&refcode2=6494c953-8f44-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c]
Follow Marcy
https://twitter.com/Marcy_Kaptur [https://twitter.com/Marcy_Kaptur] https://www.facebook.com/marcykapturforcongress [https://www.facebook.com/marcykapturforcongress]
Checks may also be mailed to:
Kaptur for Congress - PO Box 899, Toledo, OH 43697 Paid for by Kaptur for Congress Email is a critical way to stay in touch with our supporters, but if you wish to unsubscribe, you may do so here [https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/tcAb-PaXtEayL-mWUU_QGw2?unsubscribedata=T6AkmkHGjpd5R9Ry9I7ifcENA1dmA0iAnHU9vML1n5rz50cVYgyF4UmnifqaHFZHOVhaaHkHi%2BvKdXfizVoiHnkhRxA9%2BG4mZcHWHnNQUhgA92m7ZtInkJe1DFsH0XVXrFRF5VZCsKml%2FJ3ylm9X2ymDeXKrHh2G8xCJoawQrFRmQbK1Fe%2BoOTDqrER3R7Ny740n5D8ONq5v0tb1C650XXioTej0Bg%2FO2KhIxd4WdpLLm9t%2FwBsD%2B3x%2B4LbjU9YXHqCKFCYyDE4%2FtpmwoVWxJNU%2FfiuppPvsMwD6sTv2Mz%2F5%2B4Jz0mt%2BQfBb0%2FavkmfkjC9UyLODGHZypzRI%2FREMWe7aDaTj4AOAieStcQLrfjLLaodruLHJwoqDlhSR7YU4cKPWycIjZ5%2FBhGZH8aM2Tw7qtz59Fq%2B6fP5T0%2BYvvRY%3D] . name: Giffords.org
subject: Will you sign Gabby’s birthday card?
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
It’s a surprise!
#

Hi friend,
My name is Gloria Giffords. I’m Gabby Giffords’s mom. I stand in awe of my daughter.
I know every mom will tell you her child is perfect, but Gabby is just about as close as it comes.
Growing up, she was always a good kid. She was a loyal friend. And to know Gabby Giffords is to know one thing: _Don’t ever -- not for one moment -- underestimate her._
If she thought she could do something, she put her mind to it until it was done. And to anyone who thought she wasn’t capable of something...well, she quickly proved them wrong.
Our nation has seen what Gabby is capable of since that awful morning in January 2011. It’s been a long road to recovery, but she keeps fighting -- not only for herself, but for families all across our country.
She inspires me every day, and I know I’m not alone.
**There’s a reason why I’m reaching out: Today is Gabby’s birthday, and I wanted to surprise her.**
[**So I want to ask: Will you sign Gabby’s birthday card? You can even leave a personal note if you’d like >>**](https://go.giffords.org/signup/giffords_em_q22025_gabbybirthday//?source=em250607-1-b&refcode2=10557.3935704.0tDPtc&akid=10557%2E3935704%2E0tDPtc)
[](https://go.giffords.org/signup/giffords_em_q22025_gabbybirthday/?t=1&akid=10557%2E3935704%2E0tDPtc)
Growing up, Gabby never asked for anything extravagant (unless you count that one time she wanted a horse). But I know that, more than anything, she wants to make the world safer from gun violence.
And I know she won’t stop fighting until we can achieve that. Together, this movement can help Gabby continue fighting for a safer future.
[**Will you help me celebrate Gabby’s birthday by signing her card today?**](https://go.giffords.org/signup/giffords_em_q22025_gabbybirthday//?source=em250607-1-b&refcode2=10557.3935704.0tDPtc&akid=10557%2E3935704%2E0tDPtc)
**[SIGN THE CARD](https://go.giffords.org/signup/giffords_em_q22025_gabbybirthday//?source=em250607-1-b&refcode2=10557.3935704.0tDPtc&akid=10557%2E3935704%2E0tDPtc)**
This proud mom thanks you for all you’ve done for my Gabby and for this movement. Thank you.
Sincerely,
Gloria Giffords
**[DONATE](https://go.giffords.org/go/62200?t=2&akid=10557%2E3935704%2E0tDPtc)**

Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=10557%2E3935704%2E0tDPtc) if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

clean_body: | | Hey Peter – I emailed you a few days ago about how Republicans were attacking me for... not being rich. But I told you I have no shame, and I mean it. Republicans think that just because I’m not wealthy like other members of Congress, I shouldn’t have a seat at the table. But they’re so wrong. I’ll never stop fighting for those ignored by these out of touch politicians, but I need your support to keep me fighting in Washington in the face of these baseless attacks. So today, I’m asking you for just $1. name: Stasha Rhodes, United for Democracy
subject: Another one bites the dust
disclaimer_text: Paid for by United for Democracy
body:
Before Trump turned on Elon Musk, he had another ally in his sights. | |
---
Peter, By now, you’ve heard all about Trump’s feud with Elon Musk. **But you might have missed an even stranger clash between Trump and another of his staunchest allies: Leonard Leo.** Last week, a panel of judges ruled against Trump’s tariff agenda. Two of the three justices who made the call were conservatives—and one was even appointed by Trump himself. Trump immediately threw a temper tantrum, calling the man who singlehandedly allowed him to reshape the judiciary a “sleazebag” and a “bad person” who “probably hates America”: [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqsQNarR6PCR1lUtXpWTyhe6Da9yg3bnHYHcaDh07alt01qPgPeacqFkrd9dN8Gq-MoYF6rO_5s_OMCUftE1hTa7m7PcvhevQWhcr0MXKRCwCDf_YTjQlFE0xYxjXoFckpLdXiJPI12V1KSmJCcuHsgBGk6FWJVZgOpppxbA_gLl7rvBacjVV8-yR-lFxal7heFPjDofHvLrsz9EfZrOwa8_M9ZUMxg6UtHmTjImSiNM1a0CaVOb8DfYs1Dn48fdL4Yc7Gfntp33SRipcxE_flz_ZMQCej0VoRwPO0tI89b4M0qZAp7TRFl-e7y2ZtGJ5B0/4h6/-UcL5PwcTvGSRf_Ys9XyYA/h0/h001.Fbu14nWH5WZOSrxxk4vWScyuaDUQ29D0-HOo50aAxSE) **Trump is mad that any of “his” judges would dare stop his illegal and unconstitutional agenda.** And as much as we love watching the catfight, let’s be very clear: Trump is not actually mad about what Leo has done to corrupt the judiciary for him. **He’s upset that the MAGA courts aren’t obeying fast enough.** We’re not fooled by his rhetoric. He’s not breaking with the system, he’s demanding it stay rigged in his favor. Trump can pick all the fights he wants with his allies—the fascist judicial pipeline is still chugging along, and we still have to do everything we can to fight it. [**Trump isn’t suffering from Leonard Leo’s destructive legacy of corrupting our democracy—our rights and our democracy are. We’re organizing allies across the country in the fight against Leo and Trump’s unconstitutional agenda. Can you chip in $5 today to claw back their corruption?**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqsQNarR6PCR1lUtXpWTyhe6Da9yg3bnHYHcaDh07alt0xJnVFA4PD6KqNus0duVWsydfIBWVi4AkGmYBz2psuvwSnWLGXY-hLjj70jaYpcYKvThBWFsjNv1p_uLWltkbfzoxjo8_WUI4lqeEYBwzRwdb8PEWsEQTHn-4vuYtab0u7QN5r37uk3xkKM1xj7fwPWXj6FX9n-ZRgCt712fFUnQPVuVgEMh44Ow_0yVwG1xfvacPHj39GZyfo5Wp0rcL42gplB_frsJp-WykPeQLTUFTl8FBlJCNIhFbakJJ-iy2qeoEryxDn2mVeCFISHGzL8/4h6/-UcL5PwcTvGSRf_Ys9XyYA/h1/h001.vFgs1GMuzQOUF9E2zB6lIcwo0cv6ZWrjAQ-BV-PvYVE) [DONATE](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqsQNarR6PCR1lUtXpWTyhe6Da9yg3bnHYHcaDh07alt04BqgPD7B9uFx3MBb_NcFsbndgl9PEhzjinvaHCIX2EA8WOA0FKmDpZG25jsitw-TTOfeOTIixi0Ikoiv9nzXq4r1YHgWh95T-hyMucsBlsgQmbwlH372Ih5bSpqkuq4QlDOAD3QTML_ePS3bPRfDG0QLfWDRNL2gdCgwzbEa2iSn_yGeA2GFb9Urw7sfC0E1K_i29vBUV_cALuJ8-TwK3bk38l6_zNV4BMP2I5Uu1cmZ_24odxhfje8nUULpw5bHpCu0iejzR2CQLoML9sr1Qk/4h6/-UcL5PwcTvGSRf_Ys9XyYA/h2/h001.gy4Jlf1QGDjnoJHO_67CPOdg8LdZULm7h2y3PhEsiRg) **Leonard Leo is one of the most effective, shadowy players in Washington, DC. He’s spent decades raising billions from elite interests to pack the courts and reshape our democracy.** Leo is the one who connected Thomas with his now-infamous billionaire benefactor Harlan Crow. He’s also the one who arranged Supreme Court Justice Samuel Alito’s undisclosed fishing vacation with right-wing private equity billionaire Paul Singer. **Leonard Leo is the reason for our destructive MAGA Supreme Court today.** He’s the reason women have been stripped of their reproductive rights, and that Trump has been granted sweeping presidential immunity. **In short, Leonard Leo**** _is_****a sleazebag. But not because the corrupted judiciary he set up doesn’t rubber stamp 100% of Trump’s disastrous ideas.** Trump’s frustration is proof of the entitlement he feels to absolute loyalty from the judges Leo helped install. And his lashing out is a warning to any judges considering standing up to him in the future. [**Chip in today to support the fight to undo the decades of damage Leonard Leo and Donald Trump have wreaked on our judiciary branch, our rights, and our democracy.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqsQNarR6PCR1lUtXpWTyhe6Da9yg3bnHYHcaDh07alt0422YIYHDXa5iGwLpnGOb-QdQSU4l3yI1884-bWIf5lA9l_LVC_XRy3jMkCFqAIfTqG3FMr9D6diZk_8NBCEKk-05NYP38I4UZ_QJot6cFtTXpKdP4p9i6Jh4gud3kYV4KL6ycUJTNEo1dlkfWBJvXqVzyP2kcFFqX1JZlgaAngGxE4QT5f9OSrMI1hW3sxnGVbZAL0UnTQaJ7AoRpKQDTGpxTu47KnNKqpe1zcKxVaP44vQ4tr-aGXYO18S9JpuAMbJkL60uWpCqBUylVIIOGQ/4h6/-UcL5PwcTvGSRf_Ys9XyYA/h3/h001.-_bPkoo8uN1Wy5hz8b-vwAAjHt0W4UK7VRcDJilXCMg) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [Chip in $15 now](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqsQNarR6PCR1lUtXpWTyhe6Da9yg3bnHYHcaDh07alt00xg2DOjEny0fJ9JfyWhkdFacX0SSsD4hK4TA3iWImaRhQiVkjnKMcN6_pFbZ1JLhoPRWlsMQJfSKK-ouaoHvFVXCjQBwSg1B7D6bkuknK6ThaTXnHedIDlwgusoLeCDFrQevK2_PQ_hH7stisBu0Z49jDfdzllKHW0FtrMjHq_QQzVt-xYXda5XJiLFvtqH9Jr3zVQl0TBwAT9Ohx5lUgvdUhMdmY1m8zt0r9XgExhZ1PWYcJ2gkPH6GH8l_0qcFMbRzS7Hg21HQuGzqUo-22MGi7ytwa1osfmZlBoLt8TTvYNaeBDI-DulKCHr3CLoGA/4h6/-UcL5PwcTvGSRf_Ys9XyYA/h4/h001.eSSGgpbmYEPsauzjl5oBjsuRhPbNyhFuW1oG-G-_hVc)

clean_body: Before Trump turned on Elon Musk, he had another ally in his sights. | | Peter, By now, you’ve heard all about Trump’s feud with Elon Musk. But you might have missed an even stranger clash between Trump and another of his staunchest allies: Leonard Leo. Last week, a panel of judges ruled against Trump’s tariff agenda. Two of the three justices who made the call were conservatives—and one was even appointed by Trump himself. Trump immediately threw a temper tantrum, calling the man who singlehandedly allowed him to reshape the judiciary a “sleazebag” and a “bad person” who “probably hates America”: Trump is mad that any of “his” judges would dare stop his illegal and unconstitutional agenda. And as much as we love watching the catfight, let’s be very clear: Trump is not actually mad about what Leo has done to corrupt the judiciary for him. He’s upset that the MAGA courts aren’t obeying fast enough. We’re not fooled by his rhetoric. He’s not breaking with the system, he’s demanding it stay rigged in his favor. Trump can pick all the fights he wants with his allies—the fascist judicial pipeline is still chugging along, and we still have to do everything we can to fight it. Leonard Leo is one of the most effective, shadowy players in Washington, DC. He’s spent decades raising billions from elite interests to pack the courts and reshape our democracy. Leo is the one who connected Thomas with his now-infamous billionaire benefactor Harlan Crow. He’s also the one who arranged Supreme Court Justice Samuel Alito’s undisclosed fishing vacation with right-wing private equity billionaire Paul Singer. Leonard Leo is the reason for our destructive MAGA Supreme Court today. He’s the reason women have been stripped of their reproductive rights, and that Trump has been granted sweeping presidential immunity. In short, Leonard Leo isa sleazebag. But not because the corrupted judiciary he set up doesn’t rubber stamp 100% of Trump’s disastrous ideas. Trump’s frustration is proof of the entitlement he feels to absolute loyalty from the judges Leo helped install. And his lashing out is a warning to any judges considering standing up to him in the future. name: Rashida Tlaib
subject: Trump’s kicking kids out on the street (fight back!)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress
body:
Job Corps has provided 25,000 young Americans with stable housing, meals, career training, and more. | | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.X6XUC7u8ppFLNtMO_55SZlNseb7gEYIOhm_EWnhzEOZKmTtnV3k2h4V2x_O3H7rdW2az5rgktBwzxQ8Ml9Wgkmv85qW-UsBonL4KRa0bcNqdICU6T3NBDdNIZG7w7wEWuVOIjrvZ1Mv7VDDNLLpO8L6ocC2AhfaUHST7ChwTU8a8pwih5styntHsiWBzebOsKsSzgGlumWR9GYfsWNkhOaDCgEiZKhH-oKkc3AQ5eu1mxHwhfXwJoxvDnjF9IVd34ZBBeWjFklCFAYfmra4VD2SzSZ4gFX7OHTNYe-EWyMdljvloSYSwgIYW4-lkYwIB6G6CtxCzdQJnHltBLyWWNA/4h6/GE3-uIrSQDOQNX2oDYKhwg/h0/h001.Tj1cMkB4FqxDaLbu60F9IxShAPOq4W-1Pkgd8k17VzA)
---
Friend, The Trump administration abruptly cut a 60-year-old program called Job Corps, which provided 25,000 young people each year with stable housing, meals, career training, high school equivalency classes, trade certifications, and job placement assistance. Now teenagers are being kicked out on the streets with only hours’ notice, carrying their belongings in trash bags with nowhere to go. **The sudden closure of Job Corps centers around the country has left thousands of students devastated and unhoused.** In Michigan alone, more than 700 students were relying on this lifeline for stability, direction, and opportunities to get out of poverty. In my home city of Detroit, 217 students were in this program, and many were preparing to graduate after years of hard work. **I joined several of my Michigan colleagues in a letter to the Trump administration demanding that they immediately reverse this reckless decision.** Following this pressure, a U.S. judge temporarily blocked the elimination of Job Corps, noting that presidential administrations aren’t allowed to end programs that are set up and funded by Congress. But the Trump administration has been ignoring court orders, so we need to keep the pressure on. [**Will you add your name as a grassroots co-signer to our Congressional letter today, demanding Trump restore Job Corps and keep 25,000 students in their homes?**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm3_hs89zv4NOLBS3vbU0UYDzz7hMxXz1SM6gZJouOHDSoK_7rNFVP4XMgeSiwClvVx4WckoDXyrPWwMz9srBBgflkrF8llUfHrtp-1xvkS6GLV2IKThlss4EZ_HPE-C1Oh_hqrT4scMyaHJb4whBAqumxKRuxB8vO5Of_V4srHQwK8dnL7j4k5KsQlGMgwyb5lbe_tii5TfO6QH3NyDKMkhsZuQRv0xuwBlBleZPDa7sNl7Izhr1znul64whnZFAxU97igcKwJjlcMLfx4Y6BAg0zLP6PaJGNmOTNoLCAMJxbj5q3L4jdDaCn8sih0HY0rGun0_BZaU7loPZKJlGEHENJotiKpNrmAa0GQgNR6HAhZa4jqSTkuzqMq7LZc4YizPW9qn0cc1pR3Ac1x-168-RVg19sUSWJwmcU1yfBkYgMA/4h6/GE3-uIrSQDOQNX2oDYKhwg/h1/h001.jFo2NDB2yrWRumv8JiZ0TpeeG1yOlotwCRRio7PUcB8) | [SIGN ON](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm3_hs89zv4NOLBS3vbU0UYDzz7hMxXz1SM6gZJouOHDSoK_7rNFVP4XMgeSiwClvVx4WckoDXyrPWwMz9srBBgflkrF8llUfHrtp-1xvkS6GLV2IKThlss4EZ_HPE-C1Oh_hqrT4scMyaHJb4whBAqumMtXm0pCjVmHG5YsMQ9_uk5wOrS194_JyPKffzgwBgEXQ3lc6Rpjw4yTo6RbX0XXTF2F_j-Rlg4tH-yX_oVbF1t1aF98-yTMlCV6nbdZGVN5SSrW2KtTxGCcKZJdUw07FAE1QC3Q0WAZ5b3QsTvZ1T8vLrb42WM7u9QSx-2ggLsJ9xd97UwhI-FDebmOuMmUI2wfcI1JMOWKolKIKtDCbUBNtmP-qpR1ngUdt95ZhlDd0eTPzXDmfbf16-Z84oYI6Zj1-KfE73wZe4ZdmER5y6g/4h6/GE3-uIrSQDOQNX2oDYKhwg/h2/h001.iVS6igszCZUzyCJvwwPbKjSKA0QwGkvSoaLncyPBdKI)
---
Already, youth homelessness is at an all-time high. Around 150,000 children are without homes, and homelessness is on the rise. Most Americans can barely afford their rent and are living paycheck to paycheck.
Meanwhile, Trump and other Republicans are trying to slash housing assistance and other life-saving programs—all to pay for tax cuts to billionaires and to line the pockets of their corporate donors.
Instead, I’m pushing to put money directly in the pockets of our young unhoused neighbors **(the**** _Youth Homelessness Guaranteed Income Pilot Program Act_****)** and families with children **(the**** _End Child Poverty Act_****)**.
I’ve also passed legislation to expand homeownership opportunities and fund home repairs, and I’m leading fights for tenants’ rights and to guarantee access to utilities such as water and power.
I’ll use every tool I can to secure the human right to housing for all, fight back against Trump’s attacks on our communities, and restore funding for crucial programs like Job Corps.
Cutting programs like Job Corps is not only cruel, it’s also illegal and unconstitutional. As a U.S. federal judge just confirmed, **Congress authorized the funding for Job Corps and the president does not have the authority to snap his fingers and cut that funding.**
[**Please join me today by adding your name as a grassroots co-signer to our Congressional letter demanding Trump restore the vital Job Corps program nationwide.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm3_hs89zv4NOLBS3vbU0UYDzz7hMxXz1SM6gZJouOHDSoK_7rNFVP4XMgeSiwClvVx4WckoDXyrPWwMz9srBBgflkrF8llUfHrtp-1xvkS6GLV2IKThlss4EZ_HPE-C1Oh_hqrT4scMyaHJb4whBAqump0urfR4z52HiaZez2FSRzwlKlfYbb_Kp8QRG7KkbkM6iaViclvVjylrvrMI4drxRxPc7zQQDnPNcmLLWfHh-YTEAVoAu5nRiL-pRgAeqCoW7jvi5vLAOriruymhtYDDxiZExZZM6loXAdkBlwKoM-DlDFzkKOTyYA96hpYMmoM-L6TPcUSiIj4zvJMGn3defUj3Lyj074v9xDeEgs2OcBhC9RNw4K4kQVr6MOVa7wVeTGGJ1Y2obdql3U57PfhojY5Ljdw7PVdvMpVDzoorp6w/4h6/GE3-uIrSQDOQNX2oDYKhwg/h3/h001.AbDyVfTIXpXSU9Vs6ikncGR1ki5TgYcFW26Za_TluU0)
Thank you for taking action. Together, we have the power to fight back and demand a government of, by, and for the people.
With you in the fight against fascism and for a better future,
Rashida

The sudden closure of Job Corps centers around the country has left thousands of students devastated and unhoused. In Michigan alone, more than 700 students were relying on this lifeline for stability, direction, and opportunities to get out of poverty. In my home city of Detroit, 217 students were in this program, and many were preparing to graduate after years of hard work. I joined several of my Michigan colleagues in a letter to the Trump administration demanding that they immediately reverse this reckless decision. Following this pressure, a U.S. judge temporarily blocked the elimination of Job Corps, noting that presidential administrations aren’t allowed to end programs that are set up and funded by Congress. But the Trump administration has been ignoring court orders, so we need to keep the pressure on. | Already, youth homelessness is at an all-time high. Around 150,000 children are without homes, and homelessness is on the rise. Most Americans can barely afford their rent and are living paycheck to paycheck. Meanwhile, Trump and other Republicans are trying to slash housing assistance and other life-saving programs—all to pay for tax cuts to billionaires and to line the pockets of their corporate donors. Instead, I’m pushing to put money directly in the pockets of our young unhoused neighbors (the Youth Homelessness Guaranteed Income Pilot Program Act) and families with children (the End Child Poverty Act). I’ve also passed legislation to expand homeownership opportunities and fund home repairs, and I’m leading fights for tenants’ rights and to guarantee access to utilities such as water and power. I’ll use every tool I can to secure the human right to housing for all, fight back against Trump’s attacks on our communities, and restore funding for crucial programs like Job Corps. Cutting programs like Job Corps is not only cruel, it’s also illegal and unconstitutional. As a U.S. federal judge just confirmed, Congress authorized the funding for Job Corps and the president does not have the authority to snap his fingers and cut that funding. Thank you for taking action. Together, we have the power to fight back and demand a government of, by, and for the people. With you in the fight against fascism and for a better future, Rashida Rashida Tlaib for Congress PO Box 32777 Detroit, MI 48232 | Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress | | Sent via . To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from Rashida Tlaib for Congress, please .

name: Gavin Newsom
subject: Trump wants a spectacle and violence in Los Angeles
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CAMPAIGN FOR DEMOCRACY PAC
body:
Don’t give it to him

Friends -
Last night, President Trump ordered the deployment of 2,000 National Guard troops in Los Angeles, using the excuse of protests against his immigration raids.
Let me be totally clear about what is happening here.
We have been working closely with law enforcement. There is no unmet need. The President is attempting to inflame passions and provoke a response.
He would like nothing more than for this provocative show of force -- and Pete Hegseth's absurd threat to deploy United States Marines on American soil – to escalate tensions and incite violence.
These are not people who have some deep conviction about protecting law enforcement. This is a President who failed to call up the National Guard when it was actually needed -- on January 6th -- and then pardoned the participants as one of his first acts as president.
They want a spectacle. They want the violence.
They think this is good for them politically.
That is why White House aides were posting pictures of Trump getting popcorn last night.
This is not the way a civilized country behaves. It is completely deranged behavior.
To the people of Los Angeles and across the country who are protesting these immigration raids:
Don't give them the spectacle they want. Never use violence. Speak out peacefully and in large numbers.
I know many of you have been watching the news about this, so I thought it important to reach out.
Thank you for reading,
Gavin Newsom
* * *

i️ To my fellow Democrats — don't scroll past this. 🇺🇸
Before you go, we are humbly asking you to support Gavin Newsom's Campaign for Democracy with a contribution. If you believe Democrats need to go on offense, even in Red States, we're asking you to donate $20 to help Gavin Newsom get it done.
If you care about abortion access, voting rights, and the future of our democracy, please take a minute to donate today.
