name: Dr. Annie Andrews
subject: I'm a doctor. I'm scared. And I'm running for Senate.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Ohio House Democratic Campaign Committee, 545 E Town St
body:
I need your help to defeat Lindsey Graham and protect our kids.

|
---
**[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109220609/550385240/658992212?refcode=250608_Andrews_Scared&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDI2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkOTQxYWEwYy05NDQ0LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qXDFlcLXKjjzp8vi-UTYJnWPo4hB06D-LgEQUJ_rHcQ=)****I'm a pediatrician. I’m pissed. I’m scared. And I need your help to defeat Lindsey Graham in the U.S. Senate.** I’m not the “monsters-under-the-bed” kind of scared. I’m the “I’ve watched children suffer from preventable illness and injury while politicians do absolutely nothing” kind of scared. I’ve treated kids who’ve been shot. Kids whose families struggle to afford their medications. Kids who live with mold that causes asthma attacks, miss school for climate disasters, and watch politicians use them as political pawns. And now? Trump is causing chaos and Lindsey Graham is right by his side. And Medicaid — the program that keeps half our pediatric patients insured, healthy, and...alive — is on the chopping block to pay for tax breaks for billionaires. So yeah, I never planned to run for Senate. _**But I’m scared. I’m pissed. I’m motivated. And I’m 100% in.**_ [**I’m running for Senate in South Carolina to defeat Lindsey Graham and to fight for the kids no one in D.C. seems to be thinking about. So I need you with me on day one. We need to hit 10,000 donations before midnight to prove that this campaign can go the distance. Can I count on you to split a donation with my campaign and Ohio House Dems?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109220610/550385241/658992212?refcode=250608_Andrews_Scared&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDI2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkOTQxYWEwYy05NDQ0LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qXDFlcLXKjjzp8vi-UTYJnWPo4hB06D-LgEQUJ_rHcQ=) | | [**$15 »**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109220611/550385242/-979257485?amount=15&refcode=250608_Andrews_Scared&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDI2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkOTQxYWEwYy05NDQ0LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qXDFlcLXKjjzp8vi-UTYJnWPo4hB06D-LgEQUJ_rHcQ= "https://secure.actblue.com/")

I’m running because the Republican Party, led by people like Lindsey Graham, is dismantling the very systems that keep our kids safe here in South Carolina.
I’m running because the issues I care about — children’s healthcare, vaccines, gun violence, public education, Social Security, Medicaid and Medicare — are under direct attack right now.
And I’m running because I consider it my professional duty as a pediatrician — to give children a strong voice at the national level. Too many are comfortable on the sidelines. That won’t work for me.
We need bold leaders who aren’t afraid to fight. I’m ready.
Even though the path will be hard, I know Lindsey Graham must be held accountable. He certainly doesn’t deserve a free pass back to D.C. for six more years.

clean_body: I need your help to defeat Lindsey Graham and protect our kids. | a pediatrician. I’m pissed. I’m scared. And I need your help to defeat Lindsey Graham in the U.S. Senate. I’m not the “monsters-under-the-bed” kind of scared. I’m the “I’ve watched children suffer from preventable illness and injury while politicians do absolutely nothing” kind of scared. I’ve treated kids who’ve been shot. Kids whose families struggle to afford their medications. Kids who live with mold that causes asthma attacks, miss school for climate disasters, and watch politicians use them as political pawns. And now? Trump is causing chaos and Lindsey Graham is right by his side. And Medicaid — the program that keeps half our pediatric patients insured, healthy, and...alive — is on the chopping block to pay for tax breaks for billionaires. So yeah, I never planned to run for Senate. But I’m scared. I’m pissed. I’m motivated. And I’m 100% in. = | | = "" | = "" | = "" | = "" I’m running because the Republican Party, led by people like Lindsey Graham, is dismantling the very systems that keep our kids safe here in South Carolina. I’m running because the issues I care about — children’s healthcare, vaccines, gun violence, public education, Social Security, Medicaid and Medicare — are under direct attack right now. And I’m running because I consider it my professional duty as a pediatrician — to give children a strong voice at the national level. Too many are comfortable on the sidelines. That won’t work for me. We need bold leaders who aren’t afraid to fight. I’m ready. Even though the path will be hard, I know Lindsey Graham must be held accountable. He certainly doesn’t deserve a free pass back to D.C. for six more years. = | = "" | = "" | = "" | = "" Thank you for believing in this campaign, Dr. Annie Andrews = = OHDC 545 E. name: David Hogg
subject: We can’t wait until 2026
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE
body:
We don’t have 50 years. But we do have a plan.
# [](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/852?refcode=em20250608-1&t=1&akid=2233%2E587540%2EhRLfWi)
Hey Peter — it’s David Hogg.
Some folks think 2025 is an “off year.” That we can take a break. Regroup later. Wait until 2026 to start fighting back against Trump and the MAGA Republicans.
**But that mindset is _exactly_ how we lose.**
This is something the far-right already understands: **Power isn’t won overnight.**
It’s built slowly and strategically — school board by school board, statehouse by statehouse, year by year. That’s how they pulled off a 50-year chess game to dismantle our rights, rig the courts, and shut our generation out of power.
**We don’t have 50 years.** But we do have a plan — and it starts _now._
This year, we’re recruiting new candidates, helping them hire staff, shape their message, and build their campaigns from the ground up. Not next year. **_This year._**
This work takes real resources — and every dollar we raise today helps a future leader win their race in 2026.
Our candidates don’t accept corporate PAC contributions. They don’t cozy up to the special interests and billionaires. **Their grassroots campaigns are funded by support from folks like you.** And that means they actually answer to the people.
**[If you believe we need more young, dynamic leaders in office, then I’m asking you to contribute $5 right now to power our work in 2025 and beyond.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_lwd_20250608_1_offyear?refcode=em20250608-2233&amount=5&refcode2=2233_587540_hRLfWi&akid=2233%2E587540%2EhRLfWi)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_lwd_20250608_1_offyear?amount=5&refcode=em20250608-2233&refcode2=2233_587540_hRLfWi&akid=2233%2E587540%2EhRLfWi)**
Thanks for believing in this movement — and for helping build it.
— David Hogg
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-footer?refcode=em20250608-1&t=2&refcode2=2233_587540_hRLfWi&akid=2233%2E587540%2EhRLfWi)**

name: Jane Fonda
subject: I had the honor of addressing world leaders at the UN
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee
body:
This World Ocean Day, I’m asking you to speak up for something bigger than all of us.

| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/109220807/550385871/1328794144?refcode=ea.d0f42f06-9544-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ms=ea.d0f42f06-9544-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImQwZjQyZjA2LTk1NDQtZjAxMS04ZjdjLTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=rvRbJ5g8qEeHNJWqtqpaMbHIUckVgj33Ls0U5u4ah7k=&emci=c7f42f06-9544-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=d0f42f06-9544-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=4823105)
---
Back in April, I had the incredible honor of addressing world leaders at the United Nations during negotiations over the Global Ocean Treaty — **an ambitious treaty to protect 30% of the ocean by 2030.** I didn’t go as a scientist or diplomat. I went as someone who’s spent her life fighting to protect people and the planet, and as someone who believes we are running out of time. I told them exactly what I want to tell you now: We are living in a world that feels increasingly divided. Nationalism is rising. Trust in institutions is eroding. The very idea of global cooperation is being questioned. And all the while, corporate polluters are exploiting our oceans and treating them as bottomless dumping grounds. But the truth is: We are not powerless against the challenges we’re facing. The Global Ocean Treaty is a beacon of hope in these turbulent times. It shows that when we focus on our common humanity and our dependence on a healthy planet, we can push back against the tide of extraction and corporate greed. **[That’s where you come in. If you do one thing today for World Ocean Day, let it be this: Add your name to our petition demanding world leaders keep their promise to protect 30% of the ocean by 2030.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/109220808/550385872/-809249528?refcode=ea.d0f42f06-9544-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ms=ea.d0f42f06-9544-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImQwZjQyZjA2LTk1NDQtZjAxMS04ZjdjLTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=rvRbJ5g8qEeHNJWqtqpaMbHIUckVgj33Ls0U5u4ah7k=&emci=c7f42f06-9544-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=d0f42f06-9544-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=4823105)** | [**ADD YOUR NAME →**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/109220809/550385873/-809249528?refcode=ea.d0f42f06-9544-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ms=ea.d0f42f06-9544-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImQwZjQyZjA2LTk1NDQtZjAxMS04ZjdjLTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=rvRbJ5g8qEeHNJWqtqpaMbHIUckVgj33Ls0U5u4ah7k=&emci=c7f42f06-9544-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=d0f42f06-9544-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=4823105)
---
Protecting nature from those who prioritize profit can feel impossible, but we must remember: Despair is not an option. We can't retreat into our corners. The challenge we face from the climate crisis to the destruction of biodiversity transcends borders.
The high seas cover half of the planet. They are home to so much beauty and wonder, and they support every living being, including all of you reading this email.
This fight isn't just about protecting the ocean. **It's about protecting ourselves and recognizing that the fate of humanity is inextricably linked to the health of the natural world.**
Every delay, every broken promise, brings us closer to the point of no return. But I believe in us and this grassroots movement. I believe that millions of people around the world, the ones who can’t speak at the United Nations, sign petitions, or march in protest, are counting on us to keep going.
**[So today, I hope you’ll add your name and raise your voice. Let’s show the world that we’re still willing to fight for something larger than ourselves.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/109220810/550385874/-809249528?refcode=ea.d0f42f06-9544-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ms=ea.d0f42f06-9544-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImQwZjQyZjA2LTk1NDQtZjAxMS04ZjdjLTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=rvRbJ5g8qEeHNJWqtqpaMbHIUckVgj33Ls0U5u4ah7k=&emci=c7f42f06-9544-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=d0f42f06-9544-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=4823105)**

name: Ashley Moody
subject: I’m starting at square one
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
humbly asking for your help

Fellow Patriot, my name is Ashley Moody.

**[I'm Florida's newest U.S. Senator.](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=8a9f3d97b20d409e898c4830986f2f39&_e=UtZCM61U5R558Jr2MnmfI-oc3prpS70vTp-r3mMSfeiaVkVGinNfnAnTpQRYSApWC2mWJKWhooHGOq2rMny5-DWq5RkojvpjsSgjFWwujj9LPbGhbfd-kifz08Ou47PiOuVCm-d7TnUX7I9kvCPF6GaIKPlpnipqSRG8fuZDK5kjPhK7ko4f5cBDpjngkGrxxryvCVPeU-vNg6O0w0pyR2eJp5wb5otAEIHpypZAR79Ds-Gh8FiGlf0WFnB4wSHsq_W2-5mhhjOjZ0ZRHZiJTk5vceX3ESjc-zLxxdVYWjTsXZMzu1xtYAk-mLcvs-P14PJhv2GzqRsLqv0gRm1t02pB8Ei7XDga0_-u_xFb4miOvCr1hUWe2quDYBaCxukUU1OATuU6DXVagDYdsdWoB9C6zeXDbD5BB02Q-V4ngPsbHEawPixRmojdAo_12nADyb4sp6xVLZsA4lX-Mw0ZWsuYG52ToThzODLee_pIM96PDVxddpQhlKARwY6d3yUY)** I was appointed when Marco Rubio was confirmed as Secretary of State.

**[Since coming to the Senate,](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=8a9f3d97b20d409e898c4830986f2f39&_e=UtZCM61U5R558Jr2MnmfI-oc3prpS70vTp-r3mMSfeiaVkVGinNfnAnTpQRYSApWC2mWJKWhooHGOq2rMny5-DWq5RkojvpjsSgjFWwujj9LPbGhbfd-kifz08Ou47PiOuVCm-d7TnUX7I9kvCPF6GaIKPlpnipqSRG8fuZDK5kjPhK7ko4f5cBDpjngkGrxxryvCVPeU-vNg6O0w0pyR2eJp5wb5otAEIHpypZAR79Ds-Gh8FiGlf0WFnB4wSHsq_W2-5mhhjOjZ0ZRHZiJTk5vceX3ESjc-zLxxdVYWjTsXZMzu1xtYAk-mLcvs-P14PJhv2GzqRsLqv0gRm1t01S9Eg44_zcBCQdHFNYY4AU82YoTc4KjRuaOaNEABjAAcWTzBMOwq8-j7RRoFr5nQj5FQBAOfh7Iq98tGBiHrLqXpIWH_vbCt0dR8YIT7TRpu4hvxDbENC6TrMH9N7edwOisqRZz1gMGRxOHNhpha23xzU4KUHBSKHc7DzdJpxHI)** I've hit the ground running. I'm working to keep our border secure, lower costs for your families, and support President Trump's agenda.

name: Congresswoman Sarah Elfreth
subject: Don’t Give Up the Ship
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Elfreth for Maryland
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/blu-sefc-q1-2025-em?refcode=BLU_EM_SEFC_2025-01-04_1&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/blu-sefc-q1-2025-em?refcode=BLU_EM_SEFC_2025-01-04_1&amount=25]
Last month, at the behest of Secretary of Defense Pete Hegseth, nearly 400 books were removed from the Nimitz library at the U.S. Naval Academy in Annapolis. American classics like Maya Angelou’s I Know Why the Caged Bird Sings were removed while Adolf Hitler’s Mein Kampf remained.
But Maryland didn’t just stand by and let this happen. We organized. We fought back. And I was proud to lend my voice to this cause. As a member of the House Committee on Armed Services and the Naval Academy Board of Visitors, I led the fight on the Committee and in the House. I introduced multiple amendments. I wrote to Secretary Hegseth. And thanks to our work together, it was announced that most of the books would be reinstated.
While this outcome is a positive step in the right direction, it should never have been necessary. We must preserve our history and ensure that knowledge is never censored in our nation’s military institutions. If our soldiers and sailors do not learn from history – the victories and the struggles, the successes and the hard-fought progress of our great nation’s military and servicemembers – we are doomed to repeat it.
I’m fighting against this censorship and fighting for our servicemembers. Will you stand with me? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/blu-sefc-q2-2025-em?refcode=blu_em_sefc_2025-06-08]

subject: They want to gut Medicaid. We’re fighting back.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fair Shot PAC
body:
Republicans are attacking the care that families rely on. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109221212/550387350/-1346133780?refcode=AU_FSP_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250608_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTk2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MDQ5M2ZiNy05NjQ0LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SQrqOpeXeU6rOUpYn6wpUBfjq6vHFU9mP-wu4iAXgC0=)

Peter, Medicaid covers 40% of all births in this country. It provides 40% of all health care for our kids. It ensures postpartum care in nearly every state. And it makes reproductive care accessible for more than 16 million women. If that’s not a cornerstone of family values, what is? **And yet, Republicans are hellbent on gutting it.** Over and over again, they’ve tried to rip health care away from women and families, all while pretending to stand for “family values.” We’re calling them out, and we’re letting them know we won’t forget who they threw under the bus to pay for tax cuts for the rich. **[Fair Shot PAC is fighting to elect leaders who will actually protect the people Republicans keep putting at risk. name: Martin Heinrich
subject: Social Security is a promise. Let’s keep it.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Martin Heinrich for Senate
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109221473/550388161/-272948131?refcode=AU_MTH_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250608_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMWYxMjE2Ni05NzQ0LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SO_nKaAlzOzYdxKEo1xPqSvzU-AJR1hbuLQ8RnKxrdw=&emci=c0f12166-9744-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=c1f12166-9744-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=252045)
---
Team, Social Security isn’t just a line item in a budget — it’s a promise. A promise to our seniors who earned their benefits. A lifeline for Americans with disabilities. A reflection of who we are as a nation. But right now, powerful people are trying to dismantle it from the inside out. Elon Musk and others like him want to sabotage Social Security. They’re working to make it harder for folks to get help, lengthen appointment wait times, and make it nearly impossible to reach a real person when you call. This is deliberate. It’s part of a bigger plan to undermine public confidence and privatize Social Security so Trump’s billionaire allies can profit off your hard-earned benefits. Let me be crystal clear: **These are _your_ benefits. You paid into the system. And you have a right to get the support you’ve earned.** I’m going to fight like hell to protect Social Security, but I can’t do it alone. If you believe Social Security should be strong, accessible, and public — not sold off to the highest bidder — Democrats need your support. **[Let’s be honest: We need more votes in the Senate. We can only get there by supporting my colleagues in close elections and doing everything we can to win battleground states next year. Will you chip in now to help us win?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109221474/550388162/-1386246667?refcode=AU_MTH_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250608_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMWYxMjE2Ni05NzQ0LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SO_nKaAlzOzYdxKEo1xPqSvzU-AJR1hbuLQ8RnKxrdw=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $5 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109221475/550388163/-1386246667?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=AU_MTH_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250608_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMWYxMjE2Ni05NzQ0LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SO_nKaAlzOzYdxKEo1xPqSvzU-AJR1hbuLQ8RnKxrdw=)

clean_body: Team, Social Security isn’t just a line item in a budget — it’s a promise. A promise to our seniors who earned their benefits. A lifeline for Americans with disabilities. A reflection of who we are as a nation. But right now, powerful people are trying to dismantle it from the inside out. Elon Musk and others like him want to sabotage Social Security. They’re working to make it harder for folks to get help, lengthen appointment wait times, and make it nearly impossible to reach a real person when you call. This is deliberate. It’s part of a bigger plan to undermine public confidence and privatize Social Security so Trump’s billionaire allies can profit off your hard-earned benefits. Let me be crystal clear: These are your benefits. You paid into the system. And you have a right to get the support you’ve earned. I’m going to fight like hell to protect Social Security, but I can’t do it alone. If you believe Social Security should be strong, accessible, and public — not sold off to the highest bidder — Democrats need your support. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Thank you. — Martin | Paid for by Martin Heinrich for Senate Senator Martin Heinrich is committed to helping New Mexico become a leader in defense, tech, and energy with opportunities in every corner. body:
Elizabeth Warren is carrying our Democracy on her back!
| **THIS CHANGES EVERYTHING, folks:** [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/90861?t=6&akid=20133%2E878179%2E7Zaf8o) **THE GOOD NEWS:** It’s never been clearer or more undeniable: _Trump and Musk are CORRUPT and DANGEROUS!_

**THE BAD NEWS:** MAGA Republicans are FURIOUS that Elizabeth Warren pulled back the curtain on their MAGA schemes for all of America to see:

Trump, Musk, and MAGA Republicans are doing everything they can to take her down — _so we’re rounding up MASSIVE support for Senator Warren:_

[**Please, friend: Donate $3 to add your signature to STAND WITH ELIZABETH WARREN! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/90861?t=7&akid=20133%2E878179%2E7Zaf8o) | [**DONATE $3 TO SIGN »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/90861?t=8&akid=20133%2E878179%2E7Zaf8o)
---
TO: Senator Elizabeth Warren
FROM: A proud supporter
Subject: THANK YOU! Dear Sen. Warren,

**THANK YOU for leading the charge to SAVE our Democracy and STOP TRUMP!**

Donald Trump and Elon Musk are TERRIFIED of strong Democrats like you — that’s why you’re at the top of their revenge list.

Please know that millions of Americans have your back. We REFUSE to stand idly by and let MAGA billionaires destroy our Democracy!

**We know Trump and Musk will lie, break the law, and do _everything possible_ to turn America into a DICTATORSHIP — but they don’t have an army of grassroots support behind them the way that you do!**

[**So I'm signing this letter and donating $3 to the Voter Protection Project to show that I stand with you, and to THANK YOU for putting it all on the line to save our country! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/90861?t=9&akid=20133%2E878179%2E7Zaf8o) | [**RUSH $3 TO SIGN ON BEFORE WE CLOSE THIS LETTER AT MIDNIGHT »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/90861?t=10&akid=20133%2E878179%2E7Zaf8o)
---
**_X A proud Democrat_**
\- The Voter Protection Project
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=20133%2E878179%2E7Zaf8o). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=20133%2E878179%2E7Zaf8o).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=20133%2E878179%2E7Zaf8o) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=11&akid=20133%2E878179%2E7Zaf8o). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=20133%2E878179%2E7Zaf8o)

clean_body: Preview text here Can I get your input in our House Republican DOGE Survey | | | | Peter, There's a reason the Radical Left is up in arms about DOGE. They can't stand the fact that someone is finally holding the bloated bureaucracy accountable and making the government work for the people of our country once again. They'd rather spend YOUR tax dollars on transgender comic books in Peru, forcing unsuspecting Serbians into feminist sensitivity training, or on a drag rendition of Hamlet in Columbia. | | "TAKE THE DOGE SURVEY" DOGE is finally fighting back, and House Republicans and I are glad to see it. Reform couldn 't come soon enough! But do you have thoughts on DOGE? "House Republicans have reopened our new DOGE Survey for a limited time, and I’m inviting you to complete it today." | | | "TAKE THE DOGE SURVEY" DEPARTMENT OF GOVERNMENT EFFICIENCY (DOGE) SURVEY Issued By House GOP HQ PATRIOT: Peter STATUS: "MISSING" | | "TAKE THE DOGE SURVEY" For too long corrupt bureaucrats and corrupt politicians have gotten away with nothing short of highway robbery of the American people. The buck stops here. House Republicans are committed to working with DOGE to fight waste, fraud, and abuse, but we need your help to guide our strategy. | | "TAKE THE DOGE SURVEY" "Will you complete our DOGE Survey right away?" name: Rev. Raphael Warnock
subject: My message for Meet the Press on the GOP's Big Ugly Bill
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warnock for Georgia
body:
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109222980/550393268/-646207574?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&code=jtk5548-su-seg1&refcode=jtk5548-su-seg1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTEvMS85MDkwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMWIwNWY5Mi05ZDQ0LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=al4oQoykCotsBRMxFP2-AzKYsmkd14YpETeFxuUQ3zc=&emci=a722b26e-7244-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=d1b05f92-9d44-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=1586379)
Friend, on my way to church last weekend, I joined Meet the Press to talk about the GOP's Big Ugly Bill – because what Donald Trump and Republicans are doing is just plain wrong, and I refuse to stay silent.
Here's what you need to know: **The Big Ugly Bill will rob children of health care AND explode the debt. **_Think about that_. Washington Republicans want to take health care away from children and then saddle them with trillions in debt.
**It’s wrongheaded and it’s cruel** – and I will continue to speak out as loudly and as often as I can to protect benefits for millions of the most vulnerable Americans.
**Will you join me, friend? I need 5,000 of my most engaged grassroots supporters to speak out – including you. Will you respond to our live poll before midnight to answer one question: Do you approve of the GOP's extreme budget bill? Please make your voice heard now.**
| | **Do you approve of the GOP's extreme budget bill?**
---
| | | [YES](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109222981/550393269/-646207574?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&code=jtk5548-su-seg1&refcode=jtk5548-su-seg1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTEvMS85MDkwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMWIwNWY5Mi05ZDQ0LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=al4oQoykCotsBRMxFP2-AzKYsmkd14YpETeFxuUQ3zc=&emci=a722b26e-7244-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=d1b05f92-9d44-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=1586379)
---
| [NO](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109222982/550393270/-646207574?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&code=jtk5548-su-seg1&refcode=jtk5548-su-seg1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTEvMS85MDkwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMWIwNWY5Mi05ZDQ0LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=al4oQoykCotsBRMxFP2-AzKYsmkd14YpETeFxuUQ3zc=&emci=a722b26e-7244-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=d1b05f92-9d44-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=1586379)

Our voices are so much more powerful when we raise them together. Thank you for staying engaged and staying loud. I'm grateful to have you with me in this fight.
Onward,
Rev. Raphael Warnock

It’s wrongheaded and it’s cruel – and I will continue to speak out as loudly and as often as I can to protect benefits for millions of the most vulnerable Americans. Will you join me, friend? I need 5,000 of my most engaged grassroots supporters to speak out – including you. Will you respond to our live poll before midnight to answer one question: Do you approve of the GOP's extreme budget bill? Please make your voice heard now. | | Do you approve of the GOP's extreme budget bill? | | | | Our voices are so much more powerful when we raise them together. Thank you for staying engaged and staying loud. I'm grateful to have you with me in this fight. Onward, Rev. Raphael Warnock | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. For your reference, any donor history or identification in this message reflects what we have on file for the email address [dpwillis67@gmail.com] to which this message was sent. If you have donated from another address or via another method, many thanks for supporting our historic campaign for Senate! If you’d like to receive fewer emails, please click here: . | | © 2025 | Paid for by Warnock for Georgia. Title and affiliation are provided for identification purposes only. name: Dan Crenshaw
subject: 🚨 Future Forward’s warning just dropped
body:
https://secure.winred.com/crenshawforcongress/future-forward/?utm_campaign=20250606&utm_medium=email&utm_source=TLC_A

Peter,

I hate to bother you right at the beginning of summer, but I have nowhere else to turn.
My race looks more and more competitive by the day.

House Majority PAC and the DCCC are setting fundraising records month over month and Democrats are targeting traditionally red districts like ours.

And now we’ve got something even bigger to worry about:

Future Forward PAC, the same Soros-linked super PAC that spent over $900 million trying to elect Kamala Harris just showed their cards.

They said, and I quote:

“The best way to stop Donald Trump at the federal level is to win control of the House of Representatives in 2026.”

Make no mistake, that means flipping districts like this one.

I know what you might be thinking: Dan’s district is safe. Trump won it by more than 15 points.

But here’s the truth:

✅The DCCC has already announced they’re targeting districts just like this one.
✅A poll just showed a Democrat could win Texas’ Senate seat for the 1st time in 33 years.
✅And now Future Forward is bringing its massive war chest to the battlefield.

We can’t afford to play it safe. We can’t afford to come up short. Not now. Not with this much on the line.

[Please make a contribution to help me DEFEND this Texas district and protect our Republican House majority.](https://secure.winred.com/crenshawforcongress/future-forward/?utm_campaign=20250606&utm_medium=email&utm_source=TLC_A)

https://secure.winred.com/crenshawforcongress/future-forward/?utm_campaign=20250606&utm_medium=email&utm_source=TLC_A

[CONTRIBUTE $25 >>](https://secure.winred.com/crenshawforcongress/future-forward/?utm_campaign=20250606&utm_medium=email&utm_source=TLC_A/&amount=25)

[CONTRIBUTE $50 >>](https://secure.winred.com/crenshawforcongress/future-forward/?utm_campaign=20250606&utm_medium=email&utm_source=TLC_A/&amount=50)

[CONTRIBUTE $75 >>](https://secure.winred.com/crenshawforcongress/future-forward/?utm_campaign=20250606&utm_medium=email&utm_source=TLC_A/&amount=75)

[CONTRIBUTE $100 >>](https://secure.winred.com/crenshawforcongress/future-forward/?utm_campaign=20250606&utm_medium=email&utm_source=TLC_A/&amount=100)

[CONTRIBUTE $250 >>](https://secure.winred.com/crenshawforcongress/future-forward/?utm_campaign=20250606&utm_medium=email&utm_source=TLC_A/&amount=250)

[CONTRIBUTE OTHER >>](https://secure.winred.com/crenshawforcongress/future-forward/?utm_campaign=20250606&utm_medium=email&utm_source=TLC_A/&amount=other)

I’ve said it before – if Democrats take the House, they won’t waste a second.

There will be no border security. No tax relief. No push to restore American strength.

Just impeachment hearings, partisan witch hunts, and an all-out war on President Trump’s agenda.

This is about more than defending our district, it’s about defending our Republican majority, our America First movement, and our mission.

And Peter, I need your help if we’re going to be successful mounting this defense.

[So please make a contribution to help me DEFEND this Texas district and protect our Republican House majority.](https://secure.winred.com/crenshawforcongress/future-forward/?utm_campaign=20250606&utm_medium=email&utm_source=TLC_A)

In Service

https://secure.winred.com/crenshawforcongress/future-forward/?utm_campaign=20250606&utm_medium=email&utm_source=TLC_A

Dan Crenshaw

Peter — As Trump purges diversity efforts and weaponizes equity to sustain white supremacy, Mazie is proud to lead legislation reaffirming that diversity, equity, inclusion, and accessibility make our nation great. Mazie led her colleagues in the Judiciary Committee in reintroducing a resolution that reaffirms the importance of diversity, equity, inclusion, and accessibility. And recently, her resolution marking May as Asian American, Native Hawaiian, and Pacific Islander (AANHPI) Heritage Month was unanimously passed for the fourth consecutive year. Since she first ran for office, Mazie has firmly believed that diversity is one of our greatest strengths. name: Jenna Burns
subject: Fani Willis is facing my husband in court right now
body:
My police officer husband’s trial has started| | |
---
Dear Fellow Patriot,If the name Fani Willis sounds familiar to you, there's a reason.She's the radical District Attorney in Georgia who's been abusing her office to target innocent police officers.And right now, my husband is facing Fani Willis in court as she’s trying to lock him up for the rest of his life for doing his job as a police officer and trying to keep our city safe.**[Before I ask for your urgent help, let me start at the beginning...](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=eec8404c2a4e4db49901b4144664eff7&_e=ohYlCtglxAImoWIdmdwm6RiOG382fuurejmqF6Vs2zIGspbumu_jxvTJwBtEEb4X7Q-D_rEx51X-FeRWrRhV-vJk9LUwZlYYbu7gB9YyNdSOXY-X5vV8YMBqMVidr9AhB9dYFyZg3VVLoB_1y_9yGOOaicZ7mWYFrYA0mXfAUlzNPJcDFRWjrZFryA4tw4G_FGtbmHzITHOOI6b7pBcOXCI4VVLMH3iELSfePbvaeADFRADJfnqDLsVYFbstSUOXw94PhyPcuqLpH6GnpfczBh6lJzW6IqOYmTMDjwMOCh1_2SKqRUGc8tMUt8SZwYZlwvBblAoot84X_Cl-GZGJwDZ1hVNYAdsnyd6dogFlv6I7hzvrEbqdntSfXa9ZCWxvEWWChY2NlfTlhjwVT5tqLQ%3D%3D) **My husband, James, served in the Atlanta Police Department. That's me, James, and our son in the photo I sent.
---
[](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=eec8404c2a4e4db49901b4144664eff7&_e=ohYlCtglxAImoWIdmdwm6RiOG382fuurejmqF6Vs2zIGspbumu_jxvTJwBtEEb4X7Q-D_rEx51X-FeRWrRhV-vJk9LUwZlYYbu7gB9YyNdSOXY-X5vV8YMBqMVidr9AhB9dYFyZg3VVLoB_1y_9yGOOaicZ7mWYFrYA0mXfAUlzNPJcDFRWjrZFryA4tw4G_FGtbmHzITHOOI6b7pBcOXCI4VVLMH3iELSfePbvaeAB6iFGayCKkKLjCvUZowci1VzuyjESg7gXQW7zpJNFCtA77MjCXsN9xp9piqDqVcYlmWIYNvD_mQSiCjfLyrKGs9nnhXyILYgN7MVfIGEy_LNL5tN9nldQ5SQyc_9DFEFRbVpb1daYcqRsn69HzQNt3dGnlYrbWOQMRCCcv9uQVGA%3D%3D)
---
Being a police officer meant the world to James. He was born and raised in Atlanta, and saw his job as a way to help his neighbors. But if Fani Willis has her way in court... **life in prison** could be his reward.Our nightmare started nine years ago, when my husband responded to a call about a man breaking into a parked car at an apartment complex.When he got there, he saw a running car parked facing the wrong way on a one-way street. With his emergency lights on, James got out to investigate._That's when it happened._ The suspect saw my husband, slammed on the gas, and drove straight at him.With only a split second to act, James drew his weapon and fired a single shot at the vehicle bearing down on him. It struck the suspect, who died instantly. James was shaken by the incident, but thankfully he was unhurt. He went home, certain he had done everything by the book. **So you can imagine our shock when James found out he was being charged with murder!** You see, James is white, and the suspect he shot was black. So, the woke, anti-police prosecutors in Atlanta have made it their mission to destroy my husband. Now you understand why I'm so upset and why [**I'm turning to you for help.**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=eec8404c2a4e4db49901b4144664eff7&_e=ohYlCtglxAImoWIdmdwm6RiOG382fuurejmqF6Vs2zIGspbumu_jxvTJwBtEEb4X7Q-D_rEx51X-FeRWrRhV-vJk9LUwZlYYbu7gB9YyNdSOXY-X5vV8YMBqMVidr9AhB9dYFyZg3VVLoB_1y_9yGOOaicZ7mWYFrYA0mXfAUlzNPJcDFRWjrZFryA4tw4G_FGtbmHzITHOOI6b7pBcOXCI4VVLMH3iELSfePbvaeABIois63K9lRXIOJEiqT1xehNp6-z3OUVNm_5Wha820NuU_fdMyiXTH0rpGza_lb2wTXov1pMy1aJLZd9LQr26PeurzIu0fbIm4Yq218Y3YNM0Hw7CvEnMXb7V0QkuzrnogP6cYBoEFOai7TLm1vBicUPjicX7tYiMWII_ldScRGA%3D%3D) James is an honest, hardworking, good-hearted man who only wants to help people.My husband is exactly the kind of man you want keeping your city safe.But none of that matters to radical prosecutors like Fani Willis. She knows what happened that night. She knows James was in a life-or-death situation. She knows that the charge should have been dropped years ago.Fani Willis just wants to make an example out of my husband. Friend, for years we've been trapped in limbo. We've lost nearly all our friends, and we've even been forced to move because of the terrible lies the prosecutors have been spreading about my husband.By some miracle, we've been able to get by, but every day is difficult.As you can imagine after 9 years of prosecution, what's been truly overwhelming is the cost of James' legal defense.When we ran out of money, we had all but given up hope... **And then we got a call from Jason Johnson, the President of the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund, or LELDF.** If you've ever heard of LELDF, you know they're a national group fighting on behalf of wrongfully-accused police officers like James. Not only did the LELDF board decide to help my husband get the legal defense he deserves, they're also raising money to pay for the best attorneys so James can finally clear his name.Friend, that's why I'm writing to you today to ask you one of the toughest questions I've ever asked anyone... **[Could you send an emergency gift today to help defend James while his trial is ongoing?](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=eec8404c2a4e4db49901b4144664eff7&_e=ohYlCtglxAImoWIdmdwm6RiOG382fuurejmqF6Vs2zIGspbumu_jxvTJwBtEEb4X7Q-D_rEx51X-FeRWrRhV-vJk9LUwZlYYbu7gB9YyNdSOXY-X5vV8YMBqMVidr9AhB9dYFyZg3VVLoB_1y_9yGOOaicZ7mWYFrYA0mXfAUlzNPJcDFRWjrZFryA4tw4G_FGtbmHzITHOOI6b7pBcOXCI4VVLMH3iELSfePbvaeADNsvoPZgWgGQWtrCsndnfPgqkV6Uul5rJqc3UvyxB3yw_R7XY50_dbAAkqVBGtVXxY2g-9Px2H3oZ3bPDcWRUWYJorvqd5RbDlXch86u4f4zkxRe0Du1_MH-diHnUiobG4_TE3BiFmWT40XtIZv9IVQ-eQ71DnwIG0Txj9589rlw%3D%3D)** His legal team is working day and night as they fight Fani Willis’ team in the courtroom and get my husband declared NOT GUILTY once and for all. We have nowhere else to turn. And I'm so scared for what will happen to my husband as the trial can conclude any day now and we’re quickly running out of time. **[So, if you're able, can you send your emergency tax-deductible donation of $35, $50, $100, or even $500 or $1,000 to LELDF today to defend James before it’s too late?](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=eec8404c2a4e4db49901b4144664eff7&_e=ohYlCtglxAImoWIdmdwm6RiOG382fuurejmqF6Vs2zIGspbumu_jxvTJwBtEEb4X7Q-D_rEx51X-FeRWrRhV-vJk9LUwZlYYbu7gB9YyNdSOXY-X5vV8YMBqMVidr9AhB9dYFyZg3VVLoB_1y_9yGOOaicZ7mWYFrYA0mXfAUlzNPJcDFRWjrZFryA4tw4G_FGtbmHzITHOOI6b7pBcOXCI4VVLMH3iELSfePbvaeAAQJlFhzW_BGzjptCYlAvE8S6dEdiroKu2tgOjj_UZzBCIcSASFY0hSDt_9S98Yk87TsfbYUKZ9MmgcjlHD0_a-TtgTE2MeVqFEKrw4nsqgkt9Vt2o3R1xK691HFXgZZIoNQ7x0y1XAjBCuoDZza87c5un4psnoinxYG6iG1rEXgQ%3D%3D)** It's [**your emergency gift of $35**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=eec8404c2a4e4db49901b4144664eff7&_e=ohYlCtglxAImoWIdmdwm6RiOG382fuurejmqF6Vs2zIGspbumu_jxvTJwBtEEb4X7Q-D_rEx51X-FeRWrRhV-vJk9LUwZlYYbu7gB9YyNdSOXY-X5vV8YMBqMVidr9AhB9dYFyZg3VVLoB_1y_9yGOOaicZ7mWYFrYA0mXfAUlzNPJcDFRWjrZFryA4tw4G_FGtbmHzITHOOI6b7pBcOXCI4VVLMH3iELSfePbvaeACwqUAO8HPuNww1uAl-jtB9zsp3NOm7cCsGTwT7Tm5KAPh4HDcVJgRnGUh5ONirb7tQI8CZKG1lmnQP2D9Jb0eHzPqO1-kaEB23wS0peHnJQ6EQa52kQYSiep90dUY1y90tXK8PEzJC7vJoj6ZTPdeHqFRCt-WVyUCkV2oEPEiD6A%3D%3D) that could make the difference between defeating radical Fani Willis and ensuring justice -- and my husband spending the rest of his life in prison.Thank you for taking the time to read about my husband. And thank you in advance for helping my James.
---
Sincerely,
---
Jenna Burns
---
P.S. My husband did EVERYTHING he needed to survive that night. He doesn't deserve to die in prison. But that's EXACTLY what will happen if radical prosecutor Fani Willis gets her way in court. Please help James before it's too late! His trial is currently ongoing. [**Please follow this link right now to make your emergency tax-deductible gift of $35 or more to LELDF.**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=eec8404c2a4e4db49901b4144664eff7&_e=ohYlCtglxAImoWIdmdwm6RiOG382fuurejmqF6Vs2zIGspbumu_jxvTJwBtEEb4X7Q-D_rEx51X-FeRWrRhV-vJk9LUwZlYYbu7gB9YyNdSOXY-X5vV8YMBqMVidr9AhB9dYFyZg3VVLoB_1y_9yGOOaicZ7mWYFrYA0mXfAUlzNPJcDFRWjrZFryA4tw4G_FGtbmHzITHOOI6b7pBcOXCI4VVLMH3iELSfePbvaeACSmcXL0l5I30qeZ51o9UMGGvzIpbrnTJJKA_ahR1BfFdh8bguDrZIXSD7n553Tp-lLvuIxTadkp5yoGOcwLaR6vyGihEnIrusYXtCgj9TLzNVqBywXGpnWBfXZy7wup7BGwcpUILnSYp5Wxa1rYCmqhVBJcmnFiWTGWp9_rZuhlA%3D%3D) Thank you for helping me save my husband and my family.
---
|
---
_More such officers who sacrifice so much for will face similar fates unless we speak out and stand up for the brave men and women in blue. The next time you see a police officer in your community, please thank them for their service. To read more about our mission or the other Law Enforcement officers we're defending, please visit. And remember –Blue Lives Matter!_ © Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund | [www.PoliceDefense.org](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=eec8404c2a4e4db49901b4144664eff7&_e=ohYlCtglxAImoWIdmdwm6X7WxzHK1RZ3FQPdVAYroiUAOL-76izthgEVofFrEBXULpvI05d69Xn4vu4jV4DW7XUjZd_y8b0AH4OWSpYvD_kuIEr9VyOZdd84WSgnNMxVLKvlYLTJI_BRAPKm7VLagirGWlQQKEIL4EL3NXxWm_cKxZSYBDQDrvAr90ynNLtmvUQx7cVR-AC0IPdABFENNhv4Ib1LrsNNxSGDH6xWMckrlt75b1lvl58GYEvjYtlGIw5mQl4-CKfD31ua77PBnOHmYrZ3NGmpnQ6sA6xd2aiqAU0AvpNS0rA5v1OLZGxGHF9NU4gyI3FSYIw1S7gqxiuh1c-o5XEap4aIR_MaVW5adasRea6UuVa7P9wz417c0nMMT1wPRHZ_1i83o6mzDBdlOm0Lu3ZfnTQQahBdK39Bp-AiT-BVOM5kS1bXwQey4q4szT6twTUdZ5tq0vVPZxriUQ5XxKIk_Z9NhdBHwe2sU5LywxVwUvbTNYHWkPgp-qPyxctkX0ejKpBxicA4hqsC9zFLwaTCR7EcGic3qOKHoI0s-paM1Sdsg8LURXbybgt9_-JPXtMCrGm67AT4oWO9l3aBUrIrTgADQsgD-oWw75KTPEv2rKFgi6ExcUH9eBPbe_z2B5Rd1snF75reYh7s6sUVgprJlOkTKWNOYmZhbJz8qSNFAxhNr1YYV8ejDVHRSQCGJeIJep78l-_QejeONWeoStppGiGsEhyZWliliPclHesQ36t9e2Iw1ElJimD2hmqUUKicYbHftceKfHie_lZC8hNq6UiR4eTBd1OLYuDNd7tCPsU0sp_PEcotAhl0IjOrlydmmZOHWiRjhEsaPPswfS24MOuuYWXcjB5Ydt-8PdglbWzMb1Vrvr9dS8nRryf1HadIur6usxBZgcv5x6yFsTNDCckSrYrkqWPg3icg5kSydn3J1IbXAcErjicnbrHQ8bPEYQT4koF3iC2wxL6ZYjqtjw0x8WRx-iQ7mGBPzi2CCUVDJJOXuXlFgmgI0n-Egfx075DPiNNfog%3D%3D)

And I'm so scared for what will happen to my husband as the trial can conclude any day now and we’re quickly running out of time. It's that could make the difference between defeating radical Fani Willis and ensuring justice -- and my husband spending the rest of his life in prison.Thank you for taking the time to read about my husband. And thank you in advance for helping my James. Sincerely, Jenna Burns P.S. My husband did EVERYTHING he needed to survive that night. He doesn't deserve to die in prison. But that's EXACTLY what will happen if radical prosecutor Fani Willis gets her way in court. Please help James before it's too late! His trial is currently ongoing. Thank you for helping me save my husband and my family. | More such officers who sacrifice so much for will face similar fates unless we speak out and stand up for the brave men and women in blue. The next time you see a police officer in your community, please thank them for their service. To read more about our mission or the other Law Enforcement officers we're defending, please visit. And remember –Blue Lives Matter! © Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund | 2560 Huntington Ave. Suite 203, Alexandria, VA, 22303

name: Massachusetts Democratic Party
subject: Major Wins in May for Team Healey/Driscoll
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Massachusetts Democratic State Committee
body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93809/images/Logo.png]
Hello Peter,
May was a month of bold leadership and meaningful progress across Massachusetts, thanks to the tireless work of Governor Healey and Lieutenant Governor Driscoll. From expanding access to AI innovation and workforce development to standing up for working families and defending critical federal funding, the administration continues to lead with vision and urgency.
Here are just a few highlights from a month filled with action, results, and a deep commitment to making Massachusetts stronger, fairer, and more resilient for all.
On May 1, The Healey-Driscoll Administration celebrated Massachusetts once again being named the Best State for Working Moms. [https://wallethub.com/edu/best-states-for-working-moms/3565]
On May 5, Governor Healey and five other northeastern governors invited [https://www.mass.gov/doc/new-england-governors-and-canadian-premiers-tariff-convening/download] Canadian Premiers to a convening in Boston to discuss the impacts of President Trump’s tariffs and how American and Canadian leaders can continue to work together to maintain strong trade relations that benefit local businesses and residents.
On May 6, Governor Healey announced major updates on the state’s effort to grow the artificial intelligence ecosystem in Massachusetts through the Massachusetts AI Hub . The Governor announced a $31 million state grant to expand access to sustainable high-performance computing that is necessary for AI innovation, the hiring of the first director of the AI Hub, and the exploration of a new partnership between the AI Hub, IBM and Red Hat to create a startup accelerator program for entrepreneurs to develop AI technologies and build cutting-edge AI businesses.
On May 6, the Healey-Driscoll Administration announced new Innovation Career Pathway designations to 37 high schools , including 20 that are receiving a designated pathway for the first time.
On May 7, the Healey-Driscoll Administration opened registration for a new teacher training opportunity, called Literacy Launch Institutes , that is focused on early childhood literacy.
On May 8, Governor Healey signed an Executive Order [https://www.mass.gov/executive-orders/no-642-instituting-age-friendly-practices] and released a new age-friendly state plan which will outline improved ways for Massachusetts agencies to serve older adults , following feedback gathered from across the state.
On May 13, Governor Healey filed the Energy Affordability, Independence & Innovation Act [https://www.mass.gov/info-details/the-energy-affordability-independence-and-innovation-act] that will save ratepayers billions.
On May 14, Governor Healey and Attorney General Andrea Campbell shared resources and reminded student borrowers of their rights as the Trump Administration restarts involuntary collection on federal student loans [https://www.ed.gov/about/news/press-release/us-department-of-education-begin-federal-student-loan-collections-other-actions-help-borrowers-get-back-repayment] in default through the Treasury Offset Program.
On May 14, Governor Healey posted a new public dashboard, mass.gov/fedimpact [https://www.mass.gov/fedimpact] , displaying the total amount of funding that the Trump Administration has cut to state agencies in Massachusetts.
On May 15, the Massachusetts Commissioner of Insurance issued a decision rejecting a proposed 7.1 percent increase in the cost of workers’ compensation insurance in Massachusetts for the period beginning July 1, 2025. This action by the Healey-Driscoll Administration is expected to save Massachusetts businesses nearly $80 million .
On May 15, Governor Healey sent a letter [https://www.mass.gov/doc/governor-healey-snap/download] to the Senate Committee on Agriculture, Nutrition, and Forestry and the House Committee on Agriculture urging them to reject changes proposed by Congressional Republicans to the federal Supplemental Nutrition Assistance Program (SNAP).
On May 15, Governor Healey announced that her administration would make a $25 million match commitment to help redevelop the Worcester Memorial Auditorium, a critical project key to spurring new economic growth in Worcester and the broader region.
On May 15, Governor Healey and her administration took action to limit the cost of health care deductibles and co-pays that patients are required to pay. This is the first time the state has taken action to require insurers to limit this health cost driver.
On May 19, in recognition of Mental Health Awareness Month, Governor Healey partnered with Mass General Brigham (MGB) and McLean Hospital to unveil an exhibition titled Deconstructing Stigma: Changing Attitudes About Mental Health. This exhibition consists of pop-up banners that challenge misconceptions, reduce stigma and promote open conversations about mental health.
A huge thanks for our amazing Governor and Lieutenant Governor for all their work!
Onward, together -
MassDems
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93809/images/2025_06_05_Roosevelt-Dinner_JRasaiah_081%20%281%29.JPG]
Governor Healey, Lieutenant Governor Driscoll, and Chair Kerrigan together at the 2025 MassDems Roosevelt Awards Dinner. Lieutenant Governor Driscoll was awarded the Franklin and Eleanor Roosevelt Award, the Party's highest accolade, for her enduring leadership and dedication to the well-being of the Commonwealth.
https://www.facebook.com/massdems [https://www.facebook.com/massdems] https://twitter.com/massdems [https://twitter.com/massdems] https://instagram.com/massdems [https://instagram.com/massdems] https://www.tiktok.com/@massdems [https://www.tiktok.com/@massdems]
Paid for by the Massachusetts Democratic State Committee
Massachusetts Democratic Party
11 Beacon St
Suite 410
Boston, MA 02108
United States

Peter,
Right now, access to quality healthcare and life-saving prescription drugs is under attack. As a doctor, I’ve treated countless patients on Medicaid, and I know firsthand the devastation they’ll face if it’s stripped away. My opponent Gabe Evans voted to pass a bill that would result in almost 11 million Americans losing their health insurance. This is the opposite of what leadership and government should look like. And when I’m re-elected, this is exactly the type of legislation I’ll fight against.
I’m running for Congress to help people. Plain and simple. But first, I need to win.
Can you donate today and join me? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ycfcemail]

name: Scalise, Steve
subject: I'm asking you directly to take action right now and sign my petition to MANDATE proof of citizenship to vote
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
This is a full-blown assault on the very idea that American elections should be decided by American citizens.

| |
---
| | | _You deserve to know the truth,_ Peter.
**IN NOVEMBER:** **A Chinese national in Michigan ILLEGALLY voted in the General Election.**

**IN FEBRUARY:** **President Trump took action issuing an executive order requiring states to require proof of U.S. citizenship to vote.**

**IN APRIL:** **Top Democrat committees filed legal action to STOP Trump 's executive order.**

_Let that sink in ..._

Democrats are racing to undermine our President and the integrity of our elections - and weaponizing our justice system to do it.

_This is not just another political fight - this is a wrecking ball to the very idea that American elections should be decided by American citizens._

So if you believe only American citizens should be allowed to vote... If you believe non-citizens should be removed from the voter rolls...If you agree with President Trump's strong executive action...

Just imagine, Peter — If Democrats controlled the House...
* _The SAVE Act would not have passed_ , and there’d be no threat of disenfranchising tens of millions of voters across the country with strict new voter identification rules.
* _Funding would not have been cut_ for veterans, health care, nutrition assistance, medical research, and so much more — critical programs that serve millions would not be in danger.
* _Trump’s “Big Beautiful Bill” would be dead-on-arrival_ — meaning no more tax cuts for the wealthy while kids, seniors, and people with disabilities lose essential support.

**[What could make all of this possible? Fairer maps.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/109224089/550397012/-1156862612?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_HouseControl_email_20250608-NDRC-Tier1-HouseControl_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250608-NDRC-Tier1-HouseControl_&utm_campaign=HouseControl&amount=30&sourceid=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjFiZTFiZmQ5LWEzNDQtZjAxMS04ZjdjLTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=0zErrLNi0-p-lhEet47php9woX9Tz0Te5ngUKXjyQAA=)** Remember, before the last election, the GOP was able to gerrymander three more congressional districts in their favor in North Carolina, and Republicans only won control of the U.S. House by _three seats_. name: Senate Conservatives
subject: Patel Ends Years of DOJ Corruption
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SENATE CONSERVATIVES FUND AND NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE
body:
Supreme Court Leaker Finally Being Hunted | | |
---
|
---
For years, we watched in frustration as serious crimes were swept under the rug by the Biden administration. Cocaine found steps away from the Situation Room in the White House. A pipe bomb planted outside the DNC. The unprecedented leak of a Supreme Court draft decision — all of these shocking incidents were met with bureaucratic shrugs and convenient "investigations" that led nowhere.
_**But that ends now.**_
The new FBI leadership under Director Cash Patel and Deputy Director Dan Bongino has announced they are reopening investigations into all three cases — finally bringing real accountability to crimes that the previous administration refused to properly investigate.
**The Cover-Up is Over**
For the first time in nearly 250 years of our nation's history, a Supreme Court draft opinion was leaked — an act that damaged the very foundation of our judicial system. A terrorist planted a pipe bomb that could have killed multiple people, yet we've had four years with no answers. And cocaine was discovered in one of the most secure buildings in America, with the investigation quietly closed without consequences.
These weren't just crimes — they were attacks on our institutions, our security, and our rule of law.
The Biden DOJ treated little old ladies waving flags on January 6th like terrorists while ignoring the actual terrorist who planted explosives. They weaponized federal law enforcement against conservatives while protecting their political allies from accountability.
_**That double standard ends now.**_
**We Need Constitutional Conservatives in the Fight**
The senators leading this charge for accountability didn't happen by accident. Conservative champions who have spent years demanding answers, fighting the Deep State, and defending our Constitution are finally seeing results.
**[But this is just the beginning.](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=c24d1c3fa91b43689f8f7dc81a01e68d&_e=-HYBjpIJSI5rHMLK9F4pTasYSDyFIUCbdLl4TSOuoi5Rt1yWiSh_2nYco_KTCnPCf1M2wh4HRFPL6vfatdWjM1rNJeS7IEmcP2LB6MMTb_bFTheGt-hdhUPJFgd3qcnH9jbr4dxDdPJ_X5fuWYGmc9l2RUDVVyiw_k95VfN_PvYcpYt-smQTzQfoLAx_DeEO_-gpOqMLPDjy8QKhvNzrRpURc7rj9FMpaRk8uHd1EEquaRAeeh6Fhfc9BVzIRUdO)**
The same corrupt bureaucrats who covered up these crimes are still embedded throughout the federal government. The same partisan prosecutors who went after President Trump while protecting Hunter Biden are looking for their next opportunity to strike.
We need principled conservatives in the Senate who will:

▶︎ Continue demanding transparency and accountability ▶︎ Expose Deep State corruption wherever it hides

▶︎ Defend the Constitution against all enemies, foreign and domestic ▶︎ Fight the weaponization of federal agencies
▶︎ Ensure equal justice under law for ALL Americans

**Your Support Makes the Difference**
The establishment wants us to forget. The media wants us to move on. The Deep State wants us to stay quiet.
**We won't.**
**[Every contribution — whether $25, $50, $100, or more — directly supports the conservative senators who are fighting to:](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=c24d1c3fa91b43689f8f7dc81a01e68d&_e=-HYBjpIJSI5rHMLK9F4pTasYSDyFIUCbdLl4TSOuoi5Rt1yWiSh_2nYco_KTCnPCf1M2wh4HRFPL6vfatdWjM84OceHtveu4jUvSj7wn_tYtZZ0m-C2up8LRv5JRHN2bkYENK0DrMtBG1WjYhcek6SnidcynuuvwUXmo4UVBtOZk2bFVT7vhZTPhosv2Vn0K7n0NZhM2agY8dYq3cDcIk0UENPeiDnU_LjgHPRFT6Z9Z6dEM4haTBFPs9lAvlqVC)**
▶︎ Expose corruption in federal agencies

▶︎ Demand accountability from unelected bureaucrats

▶︎ Defend constitutional principles against partisan attacks

▶︎ Protect the rule of law for future generations

▶︎ Save America's future from radical leftist destruction **The Time is NOW**
We finally have a Justice Department willing to investigate real crimes instead of manufacturing them against conservatives. **But this window won't last forever, and the forces of corruption are already mobilizing to fight back.**

clean_body: Supreme Court Leaker Finally Being Hunted | | | | For years, we watched in frustration as serious crimes were swept under the rug by the Biden administration. Cocaine found steps away from the Situation Room in the White House. A pipe bomb planted outside the DNC. The unprecedented leak of a Supreme Court draft decision — all of these shocking incidents were met with bureaucratic shrugs and convenient "investigations" that led nowhere. But that ends now. The new FBI leadership under Director Cash Patel and Deputy Director Dan Bongino has announced they are reopening investigations into all three cases — finally bringing real accountability to crimes that the previous administration refused to properly investigate. The Cover-Up is Over For the first time in nearly 250 years of our nation's history, a Supreme Court draft opinion was leaked — an act that damaged the very foundation of our judicial system. A terrorist planted a pipe bomb that could have killed multiple people, yet we've had four years with no answers. And cocaine was discovered in one of the most secure buildings in America, with the investigation quietly closed without consequences. These weren't just crimes — they were attacks on our institutions, our security, and our rule of law. The Biden DOJ treated little old ladies waving flags on January 6th like terrorists while ignoring the actual terrorist who planted explosives. They weaponized federal law enforcement against conservatives while protecting their political allies from accountability. That double standard ends now. We Need Constitutional Conservatives in the Fight The senators leading this charge for accountability didn't happen by accident. Conservative champions who have spent years demanding answers, fighting the Deep State, and defending our Constitution are finally seeing results. The same corrupt bureaucrats who covered up these crimes are still embedded throughout the federal government. The same partisan prosecutors who went after President Trump while protecting Hunter Biden are looking for their next opportunity to strike. We need principled conservatives in the Senate who will: ▶︎ Continue demanding transparency and accountability ▶︎ Expose Deep State corruption wherever it hides ▶︎ Defend the Constitution against all enemies, foreign and domestic ▶︎ Fight the weaponization of federal agencies ▶︎ Ensure equal justice under law for ALL Americans Your Support Makes the Difference The establishment wants us to forget. The media wants us to move on. The Deep State wants us to stay quiet. We won't. ▶︎ Expose corruption in federal agencies ▶︎ Demand accountability from unelected bureaucrats ▶︎ Defend constitutional principles against partisan attacks ▶︎ Protect the rule of law for future generations ▶︎ Save America's future from radical leftist destruction The Time is NOW We finally have a Justice Department willing to investigate real crimes instead of manufacturing them against conservatives. But this window won't last forever, and the forces of corruption are already mobilizing to fight back. The Biden era of selective justice and partisan cover-ups is over, but the fight to restore equal justice under law is just beginning. With your support, we can ensure that constitutional conservatives have the resources they need to continue this critical work — not just for the next two years, but for the next generation. name: Brent Hennrich
subject: The National Guard is in the streets and Marie Gluesenkamp Perez helped normalize it.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Brent Hennrich for Washington
body:
| | [ ](https://url1005.email.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMU_BeZcmRBr16dPjlrMKhhjiC51ataw3Peft1wIO87ITap1HS7uUqQvuXEol3EUnZa1LVrO9iOgE9caWZwP1fP5TQDf-uhM_kkInphDMZpPpValOh_kVIikEDCLx_sE5XwRugbdD-wy-YY7eJ5Wb-d4hyye_4ILDOtORrVOCtCaRXMOyG1OzBSKElIgF_wYDaIBmY7oZIyb5X9QmpVaNr6yTP9f-8xsvSd1wqtk5hYmhr3vykbMTeam2KeBZ-rxmZiSDybKCPy3iFl5VuK2AfOTcEdh5WmBpxrOGxQ3VRi2nw_t9YtBPzjzHbUBkZC_I6Q/4h6/J3nq6K9ZRXSQ_ANimuKDoQ/h0/h001.544NyHxnDyzRKL0fbTt44qbQfA3M_G4wcULtbuOlgmY)

Peter,

Donald Trump just deployed the National Guard to Los Angeles.

Not because the governor requested it. Not because the situation demanded it.

**But because peaceful protests over reckless and draconian immigration policies don 't fit his authoritarian agenda.

**California Governor Gavin Newsom, LA Mayor Karen Bass, even the LAPD and Sheriff's Department have said there's no need for the National Guard.

But Trump wants a show of force. He wants to scare voters. He wants to turn immigrant communities and Democratic cities into scapegoats for his failing agenda.

And I need you to understand something: this didn't happen in a vacuum.

Trump and MAGA are to blame but when Democrats like my opponent Marie Gluesenkamp Perez echo MAGA lies and support their bills, **they give authoritarian escalation tactics like what we see in Los Angeles a bipartisan stamp of approval.

** Marie has championed legislation like the Laken Riley Act, a bill Trump now cites to justify mass deportations and domestic military action.

She also voted for the SAVE Act, built on the dangerous lie that undocumented people are voting in federal elections.

She's joined the chorus of "both sides" noise that lets fascists set the terms of the debate and then pretends her hands are clean.

**Marie says "national politics aren't my job." But her votes are national. ****And those votes helped pave the path to what 's happening in LA today.

**If Trump can send in troops to silence protest on a whim, based on whatever disinformation his movement spins next, we've already lost our democracy.

Taking back the House in 2026 isn't about slowing the bleeding. It's about stopping the authoritarian takeover. And we can't do that with Democrats who fold, cave, or echo MAGA talking points.

We need leaders with clarity, courage, and conviction. Leaders who know the stakes. That's why I'm running. That's why I'm asking:

[**Will you chip in $15, $25, or whatever you can today to help me fight for a Congress that stands up to Trump not one that helps him get away with it?

name: Ruben Gallego
subject: A personal note on what Trump’s doing in California
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
I can tell you that this action from Trump is deliberate chaos and an unnecessary escalation.
#

Peter, as of last night, Trump has deployed American troops against American civilians.
As a Marine, I know the primary responsibility of our military is to defend our country from foreign threats, not to batter American protestors. And as a Senator, I can tell you that this action from Trump is deliberate chaos and an unnecessary escalation.
Trump isn’t trying to solve anything—he’s putting on a show to look tough on TV. He’s hoping this blows up so he can crack down even harder, but that’s not how this has to go.
If literally any Republicans in Congress are listening, I am still interested in solutions that will actually bring about law and order. [**I've released a border security and immigration reform plan that will unleash economic prosperity and make America safe.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/3244?t=1&akid=3885%2E734936%2EpctoS8)
Most of the people serving in the National Guard signed up to serve their community during things like earthquakes, fires, or natural disasters. They deserve better than this.
I’m going to do whatever I can to prevent those good men and women from being used as political pawns by this president, and I’m going to keep working to stop Trump’s assault on our democracy.
I swore an oath to support and defend our Constitution, and I am not going to break it.
Semper Fi,
Ruben

If you'd like to receive only the most important emails going forward, [tell us at this link](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/signup/fewer_emails/?source=fewer-emails&t=3&akid=3885%2E734936%2EpctoS8). Or, if you need to, you can [unsubscribe here](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=3885%2E734936%2EpctoS8). If you would like to support Ruben's campaign for Senate, please consider [making a donation today.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ruben-em-footer?refcode=em-footer&t=5&refcode2=3885_734936_pctoS8&akid=3885%2E734936%2EpctoS8)
clean_body: I can tell you that this action from Trump is deliberate chaos and an unnecessary escalation. Peter, as of last night, Trump has deployed American troops against American civilians. As a Marine, I know the primary responsibility of our military is to defend our country from foreign threats, not to batter American protestors. And as a Senator, I can tell you that this action from Trump is deliberate chaos and an unnecessary escalation. Trump isn’t trying to solve anything—he’s putting on a show to look tough on TV. He’s hoping this blows up so he can crack down even harder, but that’s not how this has to go. If literally any Republicans in Congress are listening, I am still interested in solutions that will actually bring about law and order. Most of the people serving in the National Guard signed up to serve their community during things like earthquakes, fires, or natural disasters. They deserve better than this. I’m going to do whatever I can to prevent those good men and women from being used as political pawns by this president, and I’m going to keep working to stop Trump’s assault on our democracy. I swore an oath to support and defend our Constitution, and I am not going to break it. Semper Fi, Ruben Paid For By Gallego for Arizona Use of military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform do not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

name: Deb Haaland
subject: Pathetic, but not surprising.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY DEB FOR NEW MEXICO
body:
In the United States of America, we don’t bow to kings, tyrants, or dictators.
# [](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/133?t=1&akid=2462%2E400544%2Ey2s8O3)
In the United States of America, we don’t bow to kings, tyrants, or dictators.
**That’s why I’m asking you to join me in loudly opposing Donald Trump’s plan to hold a massive military parade through the streets of Washington D.C. next Saturday on June 14 — the day of his 79th birthday.**
[**Add your name to say NO to Trump’s shameful birthday parade. The brave men and women of our military deserve better than to be used as props in Trump’s egotistical birthday parade.**](https://act.debhaaland.com/sign/em_ms_dh_20250608_1_militaryparade/?source=em20250608-2462&akid=2462%2E400544%2Ey2s8O3)
**[Add Your Name »](https://act.debhaaland.com/sign/em_ms_dh_20250608_1_militaryparade/?source=em20250608-2462&akid=2462%2E400544%2Ey2s8O3)**
**I’m the proud daughter of a military family, and I grew up going to military parades.** My dad was a drill instructor. And on the weekends, he’d take us kids to the parades to watch the marching bands. I hold those memories close, and I still love to go hear the music the Marine Corps bands play.
But the parades I grew up going to were always about honoring the service and sacrifice of our military – _not about inflating the ego of a draft-dodging wannabe dictator._
[](https://act.debhaaland.com/sign/em_ms_dh_20250608_1_militaryparade/?source=em20250608-2462&akid=2462%2E400544%2Ey2s8O3) [](https://act.debhaaland.com/sign/em_ms_dh_20250608_1_militaryparade/?source=em20250608-2462&akid=2462%2E400544%2Ey2s8O3)
_My father was a U.S. Marine Corps combat veteran. My mother served in the Navy._
It’s pathetic, but not surprising, that Trump would take what should be a prideful celebration of service and co-opt it into a forty-five-million-dollar birthday celebration for himself.
**Especially while he hollows out the VA and threatens essential health care and housing services for veterans and their families.**
My parents taught me the meaning of service to our country and to our Constitution, and I’ve spent my entire life striving to honor those lessons. **That’s why I’m asking you to join me in speaking out against Trump’s selfish military parade.**
[**Add your name to oppose a military parade honoring Trump’s birthday.**](https://act.debhaaland.com/sign/em_ms_dh_20250608_1_militaryparade/?source=em20250608-2462&akid=2462%2E400544%2Ey2s8O3)
Be fierce,
Deb
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_footer?refcode=em20250608-1&t=2&refcode2=2462_400544_y2s8O3&akid=2462%2E400544%2Ey2s8O3)**
* * *
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.debhaaland.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails-dh/?t=3&akid=2462%2E400544%2Ey2s8O3)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.debhaaland.com/signup/update-your-information-dh/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.debhaaland.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe-dh/?t=4&akid=2462%2E400544%2Ey2s8O3)

Email us: [info@debhaaland.com](mailto:info@debhaaland.com)
PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY DEB FOR NEW MEXICO

## Trump Sends National Guard to Los Angeles Amid Riots
President Donald Trump deployed the National Guard to the Los Angeles area after protests against Immigration and Customs Enforcement raids escalated into riots over the weekend. ICE began the raids Friday, and agitators took to the streets in downtown Los Angeles and Paramount, Calif. body:
Voter Action Project [https://secure.everyaction.com/Qyv_-_BiF0iduOUt5sZ0yw2?am=25.00&contactdata=TNvTxlXXSk4f8PgitD5pD0S9zdpEmNbcDi4oYvowczdLcYAgfsa1fEICBsQCxfNS3VaUpMMp/BXThMHOxyrQPakXCOi7jEwZru5N2QUPaXQ=]
ABC: Election integrity concerns fade after resounding Trump victory [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/EA/EA007/1/89215/images/ABC_ElectionIntegrityConcerns.png]
Joe Biden addressed the nation after the 2024 election, stating, " I hope we can lay to rest the question about the integrity of the American electoral system. It is honest, it is fair, and it is transparent, and it can be trusted, win or lose. "
We want to hear from voters in your area about the relentless attacks on our elections and the conspiracy theories on voting that we've heard nonstop for nearly a decade. Will you take our one-question poll right away?
Team: Do you think opponents of voting rights were dishonest in their attacks on voting the last few years?
By clicking a response below, your answer will be automatically recorded:
YES [https://secure.everyaction.com/WI7XQsH6D0Kn6HzC8Tsadw2?am=15.00&contactdata=TNvTxlXXSk4f8PgitD5pD0S9zdpEmNbcDi4oYvowczdLcYAgfsa1fEICBsQCxfNS3VaUpMMp/BXThMHOxyrQPakXCOi7jEwZru5N2QUPaXQ=] NO [https://secure.everyaction.com/WI7XQsH6D0Kn6HzC8Tsadw2?am=15.00&contactdata=TNvTxlXXSk4f8PgitD5pD0S9zdpEmNbcDi4oYvowczdLcYAgfsa1fEICBsQCxfNS3VaUpMMp/BXThMHOxyrQPakXCOi7jEwZru5N2QUPaXQ=]

Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [https://secure.everyaction.com/Qyv_-_BiF0iduOUt5sZ0yw2?am=25.00&contactdata=TNvTxlXXSk4f8PgitD5pD0S9zdpEmNbcDi4oYvowczdLcYAgfsa1fEICBsQCxfNS3VaUpMMp/BXThMHOxyrQPakXCOi7jEwZru5N2QUPaXQ=]
Donate Now [https://secure.everyaction.com/Qyv_-_BiF0iduOUt5sZ0yw2?am=25.00&contactdata=TNvTxlXXSk4f8PgitD5pD0S9zdpEmNbcDi4oYvowczdLcYAgfsa1fEICBsQCxfNS3VaUpMMp/BXThMHOxyrQPakXCOi7jEwZru5N2QUPaXQ=]

clean_body: Voter Action Project [=] ABC: Election integrity concerns fade after resounding Trump victory [] Joe Biden addressed the nation after the 2024 election, stating, " I hope we can lay to rest the question about the integrity of the American electoral system. It is honest, it is fair, and it is transparent, and it can be trusted, win or lose. " We want to hear from voters in your area about the relentless attacks on our elections and the conspiracy theories on voting that we've heard nonstop for nearly a decade. Will you take our one-question poll right away? Team: Do you think opponents of voting rights were dishonest in their attacks on voting the last few years? By clicking a response below, your answer will be automatically recorded: YES [=] NO [=] = [=] [] [] [] [] Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country. Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities. Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [=] Donate Now [=] Contributions or gifts to Integrity First Voter Action Project are not tax deductible as charitable contributions or as business expenses under IRC Section 162(3). Integrity First Voter Action Project is organized and operates under section 501(c)(4) of the Internal Revenue Code. name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: Trumpcoin? Seriously?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
Donald Trump is enriching himself with memecoins—and pushing Congress to pass laws to benefit his billionaire backers.
# [](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/892?refcode=em20250608-5123-footer&t=1&akid=5123%2E420207%2E7D_05j)
Have you seen this, Peter?
**FIRST:** Donald Trump made millions off a memecoin called **Trumpcoin**.
**THEN:** He invited the top investors to dinner.
**NOW:** He’s asking Congress to pass legislation to boost the crypto industry.
Let’s be clear: That’s not leadership. _**That’s corruption.**_
Trump and his billionaire buddies are actively exploiting every loophole to enrich themselves — and rewrite the rules to keep the cash flowing. This isn’t about the future of technology or financial innovation. **It’s about greed, plain and simple.**
And unless we fight back, they’ll win.
I’ve spent my life organizing against systems rigged for the rich and powerful.
And I’ll never stop speaking the truth about Trump’s corruption — even when it makes billionaires mad. It’s my responsibility to call it out and fight to stop it.
**But I can’t do it alone.**
[**Peter, can you chip in $3 — or anything you can — to help me keep fighting back against Trump’s crypto corruption and corporate greed?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20250608-1?refcode=em20250608-5123&amount=3&refcode2=5123_420207_7D_05j&akid=5123%2E420207%2E7D_05j)
Here’s the truth: Donald Trump doesn’t care about working people. He’s building a pipeline straight from your wallet to his. And he’ll use every tool at his disposal to make sure his ultra-wealthy donors get even richer — _**unless we stop him.**_
**Grassroots movements are our best defense.** That means people like you stepping up to power campaigns that reject corporate PAC money and stand up for everyday Americans. Every grassroots contribution adds up to something even bigger, something powerful enough to compete with the right’s resources.
Together, we can shine a light on this corruption, organize for real change, and fight for a government that works for _all of us_ — not just the crypto billionaires.
[**Are you with me, Peter? Contribute $3 or anything you can now.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20250608-1?refcode=em20250608-5123&amount=3&refcode2=5123_420207_7D_05j&akid=5123%2E420207%2E7D_05j)
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20250608-1?amount=3&refcode=em20250608-5123&refcode2=5123_420207_7D_05j&akid=5123%2E420207%2E7D_05j)**
In solidarity,
Pramila
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20250608-5123-footer&t=2&refcode2=5123_420207_7D_05j&akid=5123%2E420207%2E7D_05j)**
